title: Finger Heart Monster Refill
description:
Do you love Finger Heart posing? Do you want to make Finger Heart with a cute character? Let's Play This Game. In Finger Heart: Monster Refill, you must choose how to fit your finger with other
adorable monsters to form a perfect heart. To fill a perfect heart, you don’t need any special skills, just use your imagination and creativity.  They can change its shape in many ways. You'll need to think carefully about which form fits the shape of your fingers. Come make hearts with cute monsters!

title: Capybara Xmas Merge
description:
Capybara Xmas Merge is a cute and cozy holiday game where you combine adorable Christmas capybaras!
Drop festive capybaras into the box, watch them roll and bump into each other, and merge into bigger, funnier holiday characters.
Create giant capybaras, score points, and enjoy the warm winter atmosphere.

title: Fun Mini Games For Princess
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Princess, a collection of mini casual games for kids. Dive into the gaming world and enjoy the fun of playing at your fingertips! Whether you are a casual gamer who looks for relaxation or a skillful player with a purpose, you will find your favorite game and enjoy endless fun in our mini games. Our mini games cover a large range of categories.

title: Lion Family Sim Online
description: Step into the wild and rule the savannah in Lion Family Sim Online. It’s a full animal simulation adventure where you live the life of a mighty lion. Build and grow your own lion family, explore vast open landscapes, and face thrilling challenges. Hunt for food to survive, protect your territory, and lead your pride with strength and strategy.

title: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City
description: Car Crash Test: Abandoned City throws you into a thrilling sandbox of chaos and destruction. Explore a vast, deserted city where every street is your testing ground. Drive, crash, and experiment with powerful vehicles while mastering realistic physics and dynamic crash effects. Whether you’re speeding down empty highways or performing daring stunts, this game lets you push every car — and your reflexes — to the limit.

title: Burger Empire
description:
Welcome to Burger & Beans Cafe, the ultimate restaurant-management game where you cook juicy burgers, brew the perfect coffee, and build the eatery of your dreams!

• Serve Delicious Orders: Flip patties and pour lattes for hungry customers—fast!
• Earn & Upgrade: Collect coins to unlock chic new tables, comfy booths, and vibrant dining areas.
• Customize Your Space: Choose décor, layout, and special menu items to keep guests coming back.

title: Brainrot Mob Clash 3D
description: Welcome to the wild and chaotic world of Brainrot Mob Clash 3D. It’s a full-blown racing and fighting adventure. Dash through 3D obstacle courses, avoid deadly traps like spikes and spinning saws. Match and merge your stickman army. Crush enemy mobs in exciting action-packed battles. As you run, collect brainrot characters to increase your numbers and merge them to form powerful units.

title: Survival On Raft Multiplayer
description: Begin an exciting survival adventure in Survival On Raft: Multiplayer. Have an addictive survival-adventure simulation on an island. Here, you'll be gathering various foods, stones, and other items. Collect ocean resources like wood, leaves and rare items. Sharks in the sea will attack your raft at any moment.

title: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat!
description: Snake Puzzle: Slither to Eat is an exciting and relaxing puzzle game that will test your strategic thinking and planning skills!

title: Fish Master: Go Fish
description:
You’d think that a game called Go Fish would be based on the classic card game, but you’d be wrong. Fish Master – Go Fish is all about taking your ship to the middle of the sea and fishing until your boat can’t hold any more fish!

There are dozens of different fish types in the sea, and it’s your job to reel them all in! As you catch fish, your library of fish types will fill up, so you’ll always know what’s left to catch.

title: Magic Sort
description:
Welcome to Magic Sort! — a relaxing and satisfying color-sorting puzzle with a cute cat café twist!
Your job is to organize colorful water layers inside multiple bottles. Each bottle contains mixed colors, and you must pour them carefully to sort every color correctly. Remember:
You can only pour when the top layers are the same color.
Once a bottle is perfectly sorted and filled with a single color, it magically transforms into a finished drink for your adorable cat customers!

title: Island Puzzle: Build & Solve
description: Welcome to the ultimate Island Puzzle adventure! Test your logic and strategy skills in this captivating logic puzzle and building game.

title: Challenge Your Friends
description: Challenge yourself! With seven different games, you can experience thrilling moments whether you're playing solo or competing against your friends. Drunken Duel, Tug The Table, Stick Duel, Milk The Cow, and many more games are waiting for you! Plus, to make the competition even more fun, you can choose exciting dares to make  the matches unforgettable! For those who prefer solo play, 6 games are ready to keep you entertained! Step into this world of fun and enjoy the thrill of competition!

title: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3
description: Magic Christmas Tree Match-3 is a free New Year's match-3 game where you'll complete vibrant levels, create combinations of three or more, earn bonuses, and help the heroes decorate the festive town. Solve match-3 puzzles, combine elements, use power-ups, explosions, and super combos to complete tasks faster and advance the story.

title: Dinosaur Shifting Run
description: Get ready for a prehistoric race unlike any other! Dinosaur Shifting Run throws you into a thrilling adventure where you transform into mighty dinosaurs to overcome obstacles and outrun rivals.

title: Steal Brainrot Duel
description: Steal Brainrot Duel is a fast, competitive collector-raider where you hunt for the best brainrot characters, defend your base from thieves, and outsmart rivals in Solo or 2 Player mode. Start with simple picks like Noobini Pizzanini, then grind your economy to unlock rare and legendary favorites such as Tralalero Tralala, Cocofanto Elefanto, and Graipussi Medussi. Build income, raid others, protect your stash, and style your obby avatar with hats, glasses, backpacks, wings, outfits, and pets!

title: Neon Gravity
description:
Defy gravity in this intense neon-soaked arcade runner! In Neon Gravity, your goal is to survive as long as possible by switching gravity to avoid deadly spikes, saws, and mines.

Master the timing to pass safely between rotating gears and trigger the "Perfect" bonus for massive points. As your score increases, the game speeds up, testing your reflexes to the limit. Can you unlock all 10 unique skins, including the Ninja and the Eye?

title: Butterfly Sort Puzzle
description:
Various kinds of butterflies sitting on leaves.
Shy butterflies can only fly next to friends of the same kind.
Bring its friends to one leaf and fly them together~

title: Student and Teacher
description:
The school is not ready for you!
Broken laptops, chairs in splinters, the dining room is looted!
Revenge is a dish served in the form of chaos!
Forget about the silent protest – only crushing anarchy!
Make your classmates regret it!
The teacher is in a panic!
The head teacher is furious!
The main thing is not to get caught and avenge the setup!

title: Dalgona Game2
description:
There's a cute shape on the dalgona, a snack from the past.
Be careful not to break the shape.
It's complete if you take it out nicely in a pretty way to go!

title: Flower Block
description: Dive into our unique COMBO gameplay, where you strategically place blocks to clear rows or columns. Watch as clearing multiple lines triggers exciting animations and earns you bonus points. Challenge your mind and plan your moves wisely to ace Flower Block!

title: Juicy Match 2
description: Juicy Match 2 returns with even more natural, fresh, and juicy fun! Step into the best Juice Bar in town and match delicious fruits to create perfect juice blends. Your cheerful Banana friend will guide you with helpful tips along the way. Match three or more fruits to juice them, trigger chain reactions for big bonuses, and master hundreds of new levels. With Daily Missions, Weekly Challenges, and endless juicy puzzles, the adventure never stops in Juicy Match 2!

title: Yoga Master
description:
Yoga is a great way to improve your quality of life. It is also a great way to entertain yourself in this game: Yoga Master.

Yoga Master is an addictive 3D running game with different levels that will challenge even the fastest reflex.

title: Wave Road 3D
description: Wave Road 3D is a fast-paced reflex game that challenges your focus, timing, and precision. You control a sleek arrow gliding through a floating road filled with gears, traps, and collectible gems. Whether you’re chasing high scores in endless mode, conquering 20 handcrafted levels in classic mode, or racing head-to-head with a friend in 2 player mode, Wave Road 3D offers a refreshing and dynamic experience.

title: Space.io
description: Jump into the cockpit of a powerful spaceship and engage in fast-paced 3D space battles! Face off against 9 other enemy ships in an intense dogfight where only the best pilot survives. Shoot down your opponents before they take you out, climb the rankings, and prove you're the ultimate space warrior! Unlock a wide variety of skins to customize your ship and dominate the battlefield in style. Can you claim the top spot?

title: Prism Match 3D
description:
Enter a dazzling 3D world of colorful prism cubes and test your mind like never before. 
 Immersive 3D Graphics – Rotate, zoom, and explore beautifully crafted levels full of hidden tiles.
 Addictive & Relaxing – Easy to learn, hard to master. Balance logic, timing, and focus to win.
 Endless Challenges – Progress through creative stages that keep the fun fresh and engaging.
 Think & Unwind – Relax your mind while sharpening memory, observation, and problem-solving skills.

title: Hidden objects: Lost Island 2
description: Discover an immersive adventure on a lost island full of secrets, mysteries, and ancient artifacts. Together with a charismatic explorer, you’ll find yourself deep in tropical jungles where a forgotten temple of an ancient civilization lies hidden beneath overgrown vines and trees. Every location is a handcrafted scene packed with hidden objects, puzzles, and clues about the mysterious past.

title: Save little red hood
description:
Match-3 puzzles combined with physics-based gameplay: eliminate blocks to make stones fall and become Little Red Riding Hood's weapons, which she then uses to attack the wolf.
Plan your elimination route carefully, utilizing gravity to make the stones fall and become weapons—that's the ultimate goal. Various power-ups can also help you.

title: Drunken Fighters
description:
Are you ready for an adrenaline-filled fighting adventure?

Step into the ring in Drunken Fighters’ single-player mode and face opponents that will test your reflexes, or grab a friend and fight in two-player mode on the same device.

Master ragdoll physics and boost the thrill with Funny Mod options: Stretch Kick, Stretch Punch, Big Punch, Super Punch, and Big Head or let Random Mode surprise you with chaos!

title: Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle
description: Get ready for Car Jam: Traffic Puzzle, the ultimate test of logic and fun! Untangle the traffic, move the cars, and clear the way in this addictive puzzle adventure. With every level, new challenges appear—packed parking lots, tricky buses, and colorful traffic jams waiting for your brainpower. Easy to play, hard to master, and endlessly entertaining.

title: Pixel Journey
description: The “Pixel Journey” will appeal to all fans of exploration, collecting resources in a cozy pixel world. It combines a cozy atmosphere and addictive gameplay. Reach the end and find out all the secrets! Support us by leaving a review and comment! If you have any comments or suggestions, please describe them and we will try to make improvements quickly!

title: 2248 Blast
description: Are you ready to train your brain while having fun? 2248 Blast is a highly addictive number-connecting puzzle game designed to relax your mind and sharpen your logic skills! With simple swipe controls and engaging gameplay, this game is perfect for puzzle lovers of all ages.

title: Obby - Escape Barry's jail parkour
description: An incredible escape from the New Barry Prison awaits you! Cool locations, parkour and obby. Show your agility to avoid getting caught by Barry.

title: Heroic Knight
description: Guide the noble knight through peril and claim the treasure! In this exciting puzzle game, you'll shift barriers to clear a path to victory. Help the knight defeat enemies, avoid traps, and uncover hidden riches. Plan your moves carefully, as one wrong decision could cost you the treasure!

title: Italian Brainrot Drag Merge Puzzle
description: A Revolutionary Jigsaw Experience. Each level, one image is randomly selected and split into 3×3, 4×4, 5×5, or 6×6 pieces, then completely shuffled. Your goal is simple: restore the picture by placing every piece in its correct position. But this is no ordinary jigsaw. When two neighboring pieces are placed correctly next to each other, they merge into a single movable cluster. Instead of slow, one-by-one placement, you can drag any piece or merged group onto another to instantly swap positions.

title: Spider Bubu
description: Spider-Bubu swings from wall to wall across the city. Halloween has arrived, and you need to collect all the Halloween candies along with Spider-Bubu. Don’t forget to grab the giant pumpkin too! You must be very careful in the city — sharp spinning blades and pointed spikes are everywhere. Collect all the pumpkins and safely reach the portal that appears in the city.

title: Fashion Stylist Salon Makeover
description: Do you want to create your own fashion styles? Join our best hair salon simulator game and enjoy the utmost fun. You will act as a fashion stylist who does haircuts, hairstyling, and skin care. Welcome customers with different requirements and use your hairstyling skills to make them satisfied and happy!

title: Slicer Duo
description: Slicer Duo is a satisfying ASMR game where precision, timing, and rhythm come together in a sharp slicing adventure. Move through level-based stages, cut through fruits and all kinds of objects, collect points, and try to keep your knife in motion for as long as possible. While the controls are simple, every section demands focus because one bad move can send your knife straight into danger.

title: Save the Bees
description: In "Save the Bee", you will play as a hero in the unique world of bees. Bee, the cute and necessary bee, is facing despair and your mission is to solve puzzles by drawing to the rescue. You will have to confront unpredictable threats that seem easy but are difficult but extremely attractive

title: Sniper Master
description: Take aim in mid-air and strike at the perfect moment! In Sniper Master, you jump, float, and fire while airborne—time your shots to eliminate targets with clean, satisfying hits. Stay calm, lead your aim, and master precision shooting across multiple levels. Earn rewards, improve your skills, and become the ultimate airborne marksman.

title: 99 Balls
description: 99 Balls 3D is an endless arcade game that mixes brick breaker and bubble shooter action in full 3D. Launch balls to smash numbered cylinders before they reach the bottom. Collect stars to unlock fun ball skins like sports balls, gems, or fruit. Simple to play, endlessly challenging, and highly addictive!

title: People Playground! Ragdoll Arena!
description:
People Playground! Ragdoll Arena! is a fun physics-based adventure where chaos is the goal. Tap and hold objects to move them, then release to throw them at the doll.

Your goal:
Inflict maximum damage and destroy your doll using everything at your disposal. Drop a car on his head, throw a rock at him, or throw him off a cliff. Every action triggers a reaction, so experiment with different ways to destroy. Sometimes there will be multiple dolls: twice the targets, twice the strategies!

title: Geometry Tower Defense
description: Fast, stylish tower defense game where geometric towers blast incoming enemies along winding paths. Build on key spots, upgrade and sell towers, manage gold, and survive wave after wave. Use speed controls to handle pressure and protect your base.

title: Popcat Clicker
description:
Popcat Clicker is a fun idle clicker game where you tap a cute cat to earn coins, unlock upgrades, boost your income, and progress through different levels. 
The more you tap, the faster your cat grows and the more rewards you earn.
Simple, addictive and perfect for all ages!

title: Chain Puzzle
description: Chain Puzzle is a relaxing logic game where you carefully untangle intricate chained constructions. Each construction is a single system of two same-colored balls connected by a chain. Every move changes the shape of the structure: the chain can automatically shorten, opening new ways to solve the puzzle. Observe, adjust positions, and find the right sequence of actions to completely unravel the knot.

title: Paws Off My Clues!
description:
Explore unique locations filled with hidden objects and unexpected mysteries. From sunny beaches to the ancient ruins of Persia, every corner of this fluffy world comes to life as you hunt for hidden treasures.

Watch as the cats go about their lives, adding charm and humor to the atmosphere, while you search through their delightful mess. Solve puzzles, progress through levels, and become the ultimate hidden object master!

title: EQ Test Puzzle
description: A puzzle game that tests emotional intelligence through emotion recognition and jigsaw puzzles. Match emotional icons, scenarios, and puzzle pieces to train your emotional awareness and problem-solving skills.

title: Halloween Fruit Slice
description: Halloween Fruit Slice is a high-energy arcade action game set in a spooky Halloween world. Vivid fruits and devious traps streak across the screen in an instant. Your task is to slice as many fruits as possible with lightning speed, chaining spectacular combos and racking up points while dodging explosive bombs. Rich visuals, splashy juice effects, and eerie backdrops create a thrilling, immersive atmosphere. The tempo keeps rising, so every moment tests your reflexes and precision.

title: Daring Jack
description:
Jack, an adventurer, was flying over the sea in his small aircraft. When he reached a jungle island, his aircraft's engine failed and he lost control. He escaped from the crashing aircraft, landed safely on the island, and now must find a boat to leave.

He knows of the old boathouse on the island but is uncertain how to reach it. Guide him through the jungle to the boathouse. Help him gather items for survival, focusing on securing food and shelter while navigating the challenging terrain.

title: Robby The Lava Tsunami
description:
In this game, you have to get to the finish line and not get caught in the lava tsunami. The game is similar to the popular mode from roblox, but there are unique abilities waiting for you. Use them to be better than your opponents.
This is a game for fans of jumping, speed, parkour.
The game has many skins for your character, and you can also buy a fashionable hat.

title: Racing Master 3D
description: Racing Master 3D is a 3D racing driving simulation game that'll get your adrenaline pumping in seconds! Here, you'll drive ultra-cool cars at full throttle. Race through the fully immersive 3D tracks. Enjoy the realistic car driving simulation. Hit the nitro button and blast past every rival in seconds.

title: Cozy Kitchen Merge
description: This is an addictive cooking-themed merge game you won't be able to put down. Here, you'll become a kitchen master by merging identical ingredients and dishes to create new, more delicious cuisine. From simple vegetables to exotic feasts, continuously unlock tasty recipes from around the world. Fulfill customer orders to earn coins, and use them to upgrade and decorate your kitchen, transforming it from a humble diner into a dream culinary paradise.

title: Knockout Dudes
description: Knockout Dudes is a very cute multiplayer racing game. You will race with other adorable chicks. There are many different and interesting modes you could choose to play. You have to beat others, Win the championship! I believe you will love this game!

title: Gloves Grow Rush
description: “Gloves Grow Rush” is a 3D arcade game where you control stickman boxers in a vertical running challenge. Collect boxing gloves, battle weaker opponents, and take on the final boss at each level. If you encounter a stronger boxer, evade rather than fight to survive. Beware: a direct punch means game over! Claim gems to upgrade your starting level and attack power (ATK). The shop offers 6 unique boxing gloves, but they don’t grant extra ATK or levels. Best of luck!

title: Match Find 3D
description:
Are you a master player of finding games?Do you enjoy matching puzzle games?Come to challenge this addictive puzzle game - Match Find 3D!
Unique gameplay, a combination of collecting and matching, and well-designed levels that will keep you entertained.

title: Kiss O Neck
description:
Kiss O Neck: Stretch, Kiss, and Laugh Out Loud
Each level brings a new, funny, and totally unexpected situation.
You never know what’s going to happen when you stretch that neck a little further

title: Noob: Skyblock Survival
description:
Welcome to the game Noob: Skyblock Survival!

Noob: Skyblock Survival is a sandbox survival game on an island in the style of Minecraft, where you need to dig blocks.

Features of the game:
- Dig blocks
- Plant trees and wheat
- Survive on a cube island
- Expand your island, and then fight zombies!

Remember, you are a cool cube digger and you must survive!

If you liked our game "Noob: Skyblock Survival", then rate it and write a review, and also play our other games about Noob.

title: Mahjong Masters
description:
Enter the world of Mahjong Masters, where classic Mahjong meets fast-paced tile matching! 
In this exciting game, players have 2 minutes to match as many Mahjong tile pairs as possible. 
Each round is a thrilling battle against a new opponent. 
Accumulate battle points with each victory to climb the leaderboard and become the ultimate Mahjong Master.

title: Papas Burger Cook
description:
Cook and travel through amazing burger restaurants, discover delicious recipes, prepare tasty meals, and serve hungry customers in the best burger shop.
This is a crazy cooking game full of fast kitchen action, burger fever, and food madness. Papas Burger Cook - fun cooking simulation game.
Become the ultimate burger chef, master every recipe, and reach the highest rank in this exciting food cooking adventure.

title: Eye Art Perfect Makeup Artist
description: Eye Art Perfect Makeup Artist is a very sophisticated makeup game. This game has an eye makeup  theme that is very targeted. This game has 26 levels, which means there are 26 types of eye makeup  for you to choose from. No matter what style of makeup you prefer, you can find one that satisfies  you in this game. Want to know more about this game?

title: Basketball Stars 2026
description: Basketball Stars is a cool 2 player basketball game by MadPuffers. Prepared for the 2025 basketball season. Choose your team and enter a challenging tournament. Control your player to perform awesome dunks and 3-pointers to win the game. Feel free to block and slap your opponent to knock him out and get the ball, and pay attention to the supershot bar on the top of the screen. Once fully loaded, you can use the hot special dunk from wherever you stand; it never fails. Be the best player!

title: Roblo X Zombie
description: Get ready for an intense solo survival experience in Zombie Defense Builder! As the last survivor, you must gather supplies, scavenge for collectibles, and build strong defenses to hold off waves of relentless zombies. In this action-packed, strategic game, every second counts. Gather materials, craft powerful barricades, and upgrade your defenses before the next wave hits. Can you survive the apocalypse and fend off the undead for as long as possible

title: Bublix: Bubble Hit
description: Bublix: Bubble Hit is a fast-paced bubble shooter where precision and strategy matter. Aim, shoot, and match 3 or more bubbles to clear the board. Use clever angles, wall bounces, and combos to boost your score. With endless gameplay and rising difficulty, it’s perfect for quick, addictive sessions.

title: Piggy Clicker
description: Piggy Clicker is a classic Clicker game, where you get to have Piggy as your pet and trough clicking buy him toys and such

title: Obby Pinata Party
description: Help the Obby guy to fight those pinatas and Explore the world. Choose from wide variety of weapons, collect coins and upgrade them. Make the pinatas give you every penny they have!

title: Frogtastic Marble Adventure
description:
Get ready to dive into a world of colors and adrenaline with Frogtastic, the puzzle game that will keep you glued to the screen! Jump into the adventure and save your world from the invasion of colorful spheres by combining strategy and lightning-fast reflexes!

Endless fun! Whether you have a few minutes for a quick game or want to dive into long gaming sessions, Frogtastic is perfect for you.

Play now and experience a puzzle game you won’t forget!

title: Smashdoll
description:
Smashdoll – Ragdoll Smash Game is a fast and chaotic physics game where you smash through floors, obstacles, and enemies to reach the bottom! Collect coins, dodge bullets, and upgrade your smash power, jump force, and trails.

Break enough floors to charge your smash meter and transform into an unstoppable bullet of destruction. How far can you smash?

title: Steal Car Duel
description:
Step into a high-energy world of engines, rivalry, and fast reflexes. Steal Car Duel is a competitive action game that evolves the idea of Steal a Brainrot into a car-based experience filled with duels, rare collectibles, and endless upgrades!

Race, collide, and steal your way to the top. Build your own garage, earn coins and tickets, and outsmart rivals to prove who rules the arena. Each match combines skill, timing, and strategy as you fight for dominance in Solo or 2 Player mode.

title: Quest by Country
description: Quest by Country - an engaging game that allows players to identify countries by their flags. This captivating task serves as an educational tool, expanding players' knowledge of the diversity of countries and the symbolism conveyed through their flags.

title: Farm Animal Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to Farm Animal Sort Puzzle, a fun and relaxing casual puzzle game set on a lively farm. Your mission is simple but addictive: match the appropriate animal or vegetable to the customer's needs. Sort adorable farm animals into the correct spaces and enjoy the satisfying challenge of smart organization.

title: ChickZ Stack
description:
ChickZ Stack is a fun and addictive arcade game where flying chickens take to the sky! stack your chickens to overcome obstacles and glide through colorful, challenging levels.

The taller your chicken stack, the easier it is to pass walls, traps, and enemies.

Unlock adorable flying chickens, explore new worlds, and compete for high scores.

With simple one-tap controls and fast-paced gameplay, ChickZ Stack is easy to play but hard to master.

Stack, fly, and flap your way to victory!

title: Cannon Shooter
description: Cannon Shooter is an exciting arcade shooter where you can have endless shooting fun in fast-paced combat! You will control a cannonball firing hordes of heroic characters, facing many enemies. A quick click to launch more heroes and help you generate more heroes through the digital gate.

title: Words from words: Sea
description:
An exciting game where you need to find words from the given letters and solve hidden words in crosswords.  

Welcome to the game "Words from words: Sea" - where many words and interesting crosswords are waiting for you. Make words from letters, discover new words from words, and enjoy the amazing world where words turn into magic. Join us right now and dive into the world of fillwords, creating and finding the most amazing words!  

Dive into the world of exciting levels and find all the words!

title: Phantom thief Cat Running
description: Avoid obstacles and reach the goal! Tap to change direction, and the game ends when your stamina reaches zero. Pick up items to increase your score or restore stamina. Collect three stars to enter Invincible Mode. Fish bones reduce stamina, but collecting ten turns coins into high-scoring diamonds for a short time!

title: 2 Player Battle
description: Seeking an exciting way to spend time with friends and family is most significant. Look no further than Party Battle, the ultimate 2-4 player game! With 30 different games, this exciting collection has something for everyone.

title: Duo Family Santa
description: Steve and Alex need to race against each other. The one who holds the Lucky Block wins the game. Hold onto the Lucky Block until the time runs out to win the game. You can earn money by collecting socks and you can also earn money by defeating your friend. You must be very careful; steal the Lucky Block from your friend and keep it until the time is up.

title: Brawl Stars
description: Welcome to a multiplayer arena game! Brawl Stars will take you into a world full of action .io battles! You will experience nervous PVP battles and a unique evolution system. Choose your favorite hero including fire dragons, electric dogs or flower spirits.

title: Steal Brainrot Monsters!
description:
Step into a world of fun, charm, and Italian flair with Buy Cute and Funny Animals! From the tiny and delightful Nubini Pizzanini to the rare and majestic Tralalelo Tralala and the playful Los Tralalelitos, there’s no shortage of adorable creatures to collect.

Build your very own cozy base, place your animals in it, and make them feel right at home. In return, they’ll reward you with coins, which you can use to unlock even more animals and exciting upgrades.

title: Word Search Universe 2
description: Word Search Universe 2 is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you find hidden words across many themed levels. Explore categories like science, history, food, nature, and more while sharpening your focus and vocabulary. Simply swipe letters to form words, complete challenges, and unlock new chapters. With clean visuals, smooth controls, and hundreds of words to discover.

title: Elementz
description: ElementZ is a Match-3 game similar to Bejeweled or Candy Crush. Its particularity lies in giving each color its elemental power, allowing you to trigger different powers of fire (red), water (blue), earth (brown), plants (green), and electricity (yellow).

title: Battle Arena
description: Fight enemies, grow your army, and dominate the battlefield! Upgrade your camp, train your soldiers and earn tons of coins to expand your unstoppable arsenal. Ready to battle?

title: Frog Knight
description: Frog Bubble your mission is to help a spirited frog pop an array of mischievous bubbles! Using your swift reflexes and strategic skills, you’ll throw your lily pad-shaped projectiles at bubbles to clear each level.

title: Merge Beasts
description: A fun and addictive merge game where you combine cute and quirky beasts to create stronger and rarer creatures. Each merge brings you closer to discovering powerful evolutions and unlocking new surprises. Collect coins, upgrade your beasts, and watch your monster city grow!

title: Army Defence Dino Shoot
description: Army Defence Dino Shoot is a third-person defense idle game. It seems that a lot of dinosaurs surround you. To protect the base from incoming dinosaurs, you can summon more soldiers and engineers to create a defensive line. Don't forget to upgrade your weapons, damage, and fire rate skills. The longer you hold this position, the more dinosaurs you will meet. Have a good time building a military base.

title: Claw & Merge: Labubu Drop
description:
"Claw & Merge: Labubu Drop" – A Charming Puzzle Game About Merging Jelly Dolls!

In this addictive game, you'll drop adorable Labubu dolls, match identical ones, and create new characters! When two matching Labubus collide, they transform into the next doll in your collection. Earn coins for every merge, then spend them to operate the claw machine – fish out exactly the Labubu you need to complete each level!

Can you collect all the Labubus?

title: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3
description: Mobile Legends Slime 3v3 will bring you into a fun arena of exciting battles! In this 3v3 PvP game, you can unblock many slime characters. Enter a variety of colorful battle scenes. Each character has unique skills and fighting styles, ensuring you find the best gameplay.

title: Northern Lights - the secret of the forest
description:
A new hit for fans of the Match 3 game genre!

The Scientist Cat is already hiding items throughout the mysterious forest so you can enjoy finding things and earn as many emeralds as possible. The cat is happy to have new guests!

title: Coffee Color Blocks
description: Coffee Color Blocks is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you move colored shapes around the board and guide them to gates of the matching color. Each correct connection fills the cups inside the shape — your goal is to fill the entire figure without blocking the path.

title: Pyramidz2
description: PyramidZ 2 is, as the name suggests, the sequel to PyramidZ. It's a Match-3 game where you have to slide a row or column to align Egyptian symbols. This version is faster and allows for more combos.

title: Number Rush
description:
You can absorb smaller or equal numbers while avoiding obstacles.
If you collide with a number bigger than you, it's game over.
Make the largest number possible to break through the wall and get the treasure chest~!

title: Nubik in the Monster World
description:
Nubik saved the kittens, but the monsters are back! Evil Huggy has kidnapped them again!
Now Nubik has new weapons: AK-47, M16, grenade launcher, machine gun, and shotguns!
Help him rescue the kittens, collect loot, earn coins, upgrade, blast TNT, and escape traps. Even his friend gets captured—help Nubik save him too!

title: Flip It 3D
description: In this fun and challenging puzzle platform game, test your strategic thinking as you navigate through levels where flipping platforms is the key to survival! Goblins and knights have different abilities, and they must be moved carefully across platforms to complete each level. But be careful—characters can only survive a limited number of flips, and platforms can't be flipped if they are occupied!

title: Youtuber Mcraft 2Player
description: You need to help the YouTuber girl and her boyfriend escape from prison. In this two-player adventure, they must collect all the YouTube plaques without getting too far apart, obtain the key and the golden plaque, and reach the chest. Open the chest and run to the door. You need to be very fast, you must escape from prison!

title: Stickman Adventure
description: This is an adventure that will take you through time and space! Along the way, you'll encounter various traps and monsters; you'll need to defeat them and rescue your friends. Come on, Hero, a whole new world awaits!

title: IDLE Pet
description: Anatomical clicker. Start with one cell and create a whole animal! You will see what the body is made of from the inside, gradually growing bones, organs, skin and wool!

title: My City Hospital
description:
My City Hospital is a sophisticated digital doll placement game. Have you ever thought about being a doctor or running a hospital to help others? you can realize your dream without
leaving home. In this game, you run a large hospital with 7 management areas. In this hospital, you can help others deliver babies and take care of babies, examine patients, and help patients
with surgery.

title: Zombie Defense: War
description: Progress through the different environments and defend the last sanctuaries of humanity! Merge your towers and use boosters to bolster your chance of success.

title: The Sort Agency
description: You are the head of the best object sorting agency. Your goal is to bring order and cleanliness to the world. On the many levels you will be able to test your attentiveness and tactical thinking. Look for the right items in a pile of other items. But keep track of how many items you already have in your hands!

title: Epic Stunts PvP 3D
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning muscle car through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills. Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Wave Dash : Geometry Arrow
description: Ride the wave in Wave Dash, a rhythm platformer where each tap steers your arrow through tight corridors. Read patterns in waves, time jumps to music, and beat brutal stages. Build routes with the level editor, share creations, unlock icons, chase ranks, and perfect speed runs. Simple controls, fast restarts—pure focus and flow. Inspired by classic geometry platformers, tuned for dash mastery.

title: Triangle Way
description: Soar into action with Triangle Way, a thrilling neon-themed arcade adventure where you pilot a small neon plane through a maze of dangers. Guide your plane safely through hazardous territory, avoiding enemies and obstacles at every turn. With fast-paced gameplay and escalating challenges, this game will test your reflexes and quick thinking. Experience vivid neon graphics, smooth controls, and heart-pounding action as you dodge threats and aim for high scores.

title: Crazy Axe
description:
In Crazy Axe, you take control of a fearless warrior, armed with a powerful axe, to conquer a series of action-packed challenges. Swing your axe with precision, crush obstacles, and defeat waves of enemies. The game tests your reflexes and accuracy as you navigate through dangerous environments, dodging traps and outsmarting your foes. With each level, the difficulty ramps up, demanding quick thinking and faster reactions to survive.
Are you ready to take on the challenge and go axe-crazy?

title: Tap It Away 3D
description: Tap It Away 3D is a fun and relaxing 3D block puzzle game. Tap the arrows to move and clear blocks, solve brain-teasing puzzles, and plan your moves carefully as blocks can block each other. Enjoy smooth, stress-free gameplay with no time limits. Play this free online puzzle game to relax, sharpen your logic, and train your brain anytime.

title: PoppyTile
description: PoppyTile is a soothing and delightful tile-matching puzzle game set in a peaceful, picturesque countryside farm full of charm!

title: Maido
description: Welcome to the Maido Shop! Pull items from the box and merge them together. The more you merge, the better the items become. Do you have what it takes to unlock the final item? Set the right price to sell your goods! If it's too cheap, you lose profit. If it's too expensive, you gain nothing. Start managing your shop now!

title: Meteoheroes
description:
THE PLANET’S SUPERHEROES
Fulmen, Nix, Nubess, Pluvia, Thermo and Ventum are six children that one day find out that they have superpowers.
Train the skills and superpowers of each MeteoHeroe in the gym with six games of marksmanship, speed, ability, coordination, strength, and synchronization.

title: Xytrian Runner
description: Xytrian is an endless flight runner where you pilot a spaceship through a dangerous course. Dodge obstacles, score points, and survive as long as you can! Click to control your shuttle and hit the timing perfectly! Only precise altitude changes will let you overcome the obstacles ahead.

title: Mahjong Connect Cookware
description: Help your chef to clean his kitchen and remove all cookware by connecting them with a line that can change it's direction no more than 2 times!

title: Angry Flappy
description: "Angry Flappy is a fast-paced twist on the classic game, where players not only navigate through obstacles but also shoot bullets to destroy enemies and barriers. Get ready for an action-packed flying adventure!"

title: 2 Player Games Kids Kitchen
description: Do you want to run your own restaurant? Want to experience the blend of collaboration and cooking fun? Join H5games4u's best restaurant tycoon game and enjoy cooking fun. You will engage in different gaming modes. The best part is that you can work together with your friends in the virtual restaurant!

title: Demolition Derby Derby
description: Welcome to Demolition Derby the mobile sensation where you control the chaos! Strategically tap to toss dynamite and swipe to send rocks crashing down. Decimate buildings and statues with precision in this hyper-casual game.

title: Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo
description: Welcome to Ink Shop: Dress & Tattoo, a unique and immersive game that lets you unleash your inner tattoo artist. This isn't just any game; it's your gateway to a world where art meets relaxation, and where your creativity can truly shine. Prepare to immerse yourself in the satisfying and intricate process of tattooing, all at the tip of your fingers!

title: Cool Cars: racing at altitude
description:
Cool Cars: racing at altitude is an exciting racing game in which you can buy cars, build your own garage and compete with other players.

Earn points by collecting bonuses on a straight track, compete with other players to complete special tracks against the clock, equip your auto repair shop and collect cool cars!
In the game you will find a large number of cars, exciting tracks, your own garage with purchased cars, the ability to change the environment to suit you and much more.

title: Guess The Drawing
description: This is a casual puzzle game where you draw and I guess. Maybe you've played a game like that before, where someone draws on your back and you draw on the front, and then you see if you agree. If you like that kind of game, then this game is for you. In this game, you need to memorize what the person behind you draws.You can use the coins you get to buy the brushes you need. Come and experience this new and interesting game world.

title: Frost Land - Snow Survival
description: Frost Land - Snow Survival is a strategic base-building game where you battle the harsh cold to stay alive. You’ll wield a flamethrower to melt snow, uncover hidden resources, and expand your shelter. Every choice matters—manage supplies wisely and decide which frozen zones to explore as you carve out survival in a relentless winter.

title: Wood Block Puzzle 3
description: Wood Block Puzzle 3 is a polished, relaxing 10×10 wooden block game featuring a fresh UI, smart boosters, and satisfying break animations. Drag shapes from the right tray, complete rows or columns to score, and chase your best record. Use boosters at the bottom—watch rewarded ads to earn coins and unlock boosters when needed. Simple to learn and hard to master, it’s perfect for quick breaks or long zen sessions.

title: Blockapolypse Zombie Shooter
description: Blockapolypse: Zombie Shooter is a defense shooting simulation game with 3D pixel undead creatures. To defend this position, you need to use weapons to defend incoming zombies from 3 directions. After you kill all zombies, you still need to defeat a giant undead creature. As long as you lose all of your HP, you will lose the game. When you earn enough gold coins, you can buy better weapons in the gun shop. Good luck and survive!

title: Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake
description: Dive into a world of sweetness with Tiny Baker Ocean Jelly Cake! Create a shimmering ocean-inspired jelly dessert using playful shapes and colors, then decorate it with sea-themed toppings for the perfect underwater delight.

title: Sausage Man Shooting Adventure
description: Dive into a hilarious and action-packed adventure. Sausage Man Shooting Adventure is a fast-paced side-scrolling shooting game where you control a crazy, energetic sausage hero and blast through waves of enemies. Run forward, dodge traps, jump platforms, and shoot enemies with nonstop excitement! Collect airdrops to increase your damage.

title: Shanghai Town
description:
Mahjong matching game!
If you select the same mahjong block, it will be removed.
Please remove the last block!
Match the tiles to create a cool building!
Collect the buildings and create a cool city!

title: Digit Shooter
description: Digit Shooter! plays like a vertical-version shooting running arcade game. With 3D green numbers, you can launch green numbers to shoot green numbers and numbered walls. You can shoot them and collect them to make your number bigger. Don't waste bullets and time on red walls while avoiding them. When you reach the finish line, try to focus on one line to shoot, then you will collect more rewards

title: PaperWar.io
description: There are so many unexplored areas! Conquering them is the key to mastering the game. Expand your territory, eliminate other players who threaten your progress and aim to conquer 100% of each new map. Choose from 9 special skins to express your style!

title: Worm Escape
description:
Worm Escape is a fun puzzle game that tests your logic and decision-making skills. Move worms in the correct order to clear each level. A single right move can solve the puzzle, while a wrong one can block your progress.

As you advance, levels become more complex with tighter spaces and more worms. Analyze carefully and choose the right sequence to succeed.

Simple tap controls make it easy to play, but mastering each level requires planning and strategy.

title: My Castle. Merge & Story
description:
My Castle: Merge & Story is a relaxing merge 2 puzzle game set in a warm and atmospheric medieval world of renewal, mystery, and self-discovery. Merge items, restore and decorate an ancient castle, and follow the journey of a young princess who chooses a new path in life.
This calm offline merge adventure combines cozy gameplay, castle restoration, and a story about starting over — far from royal expectations, closer to one’s true self.
Restore and Decorate a Forgotten Castle

title: Halloween Stickman 2
description: It's a continuation of Halloween Stickman story. The streets are alive with people in costumes, glowing jack-o'-lanterns, and the buzz of tricks waiting to unfold. You were set to enjoy a thrilling Halloween night until your sly friend Stickman, the master of mischief, pulled another one of his classic pranks and set you up again. Now, it’s up to you to turn the tables, use your wits, and punish the trickster in this spooky adventure!

title: Challenger City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning muscle through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Toilet Time
description: Toilet Time is more than just a puzzle game—it’s a hilarious journey into the quirkiest parts of everyday life. Challenge yourself with toilet-inspired puzzles that combine creativity, wit, and humor.

title: Shadow Fighter
description:
It's a free side-scrolling role-playing fighting game. Shadow Fighter is perfect for you if you like ninjas, swordsmen, role-playing games, or fighting games. Compared with other RPG fighting
games, this is an excellent PVP game. The game has two main modes: Solo Match and Team Mode. You can also view the leaderboard. In a Solo Match, you have to choose three heroes until one
side is completely wiped out, that is, the other side wins. Don't worry about not having a favorite hero.

title: Bubble Trouble
description:
Avoid and pop the bubbles! Shoot the bubbles with your harpoon and split them in smaller bubbles, until eventually they disappear.
The classic arcade game from 2002, remastered.
Bubble Trouble (later Bubble Struggle) has been played hundreds of millions of times, labeled 'one of the top 10 online games'.

22 unique levels, for 1 or 2 players (on the same keyboard).
Final boss level.
Challenge other player's scores.

title: Cat Cut
description: A fun game about a hungry cat, get him a fish, cut the rope so that it falls directly to the cat. All objects move according to physics, do not miss the fish, do not upset the cat!

title: Gift Merge Santa World Tour
description:
Gift Merge: Santa World Tour

Help Santa spread Christmas joy across the globe!
Tap to generate gifts, merge identical items to craft new toys, and fulfill children’s wishes to raise each country’s happiness. Travel from snowy towns to sunny beaches, unlocking new festive destinations. Merge, match, and make magic — the more joy you spread, the closer Santa gets to completing his world tour!

title: Neon Dash: Cyber Run
description:
Neon Dash: Cyber Run is a high-speed endless runner set in a glowing cyber world.
Jump over deadly spikes, pass through portals to shift themes, and survive as
the game speed increases over time.

The game is designed for short, replayable sessions with instant restarts.
Perfect for both desktop and mobile players.

title: Cop Simulator
description: Cop Simulator is an exciting and dynamic gaming experience that immerses you in the world of a lawman with unlimited possibilities. In this game you will take on the role of a cop, where you are given complete freedom of action.

title: Sword Run 3D
description: Sword Run 3D is an easy to pick up action runner game. Collect sword pieces, cut off the obstacles that block your progress, and finally reach the finish line to win. More cool skins are waiting for you to unlock, what are you waiting for? Don't forget to share it with your friends if it's fun!

title: Noob in Geometry Dash
description: Move to the rhythm and help Nubik navigate challenging levels! Collect keys to unlock skins, complete courses, and see how high you can rank among the best players. Step into the beat-driven adventure!

title: Eat Donuts
description: Swap, rotate, and smash colorful donut rings in a vibrant 3x3 grid to create explosive matches and devour points like never before. Start with easy levels like our sunny beachside challenge—rack up scores to hit that juicy target of 800, earn shiny coins for power-ups like the mighty hammer smash or speedy rotates, and unlock endless waves of mouthwatering fun.

title: Hexon Rush
description:
Hexon Rush is a time limited puzzle game with a little bit of sci-fi look.

Main goal in the Hexon Rush is connecting all the lines inside the hexagonal tiles before time runs out.  There are 600 levels with increasing size, difficulty and complexity.

Don't worry, you will have two types of helpers to solve these puzzles. Be careful when you spend them because they are hard to obtain.

title: Zombie Highway Rampage
description:
Drive your Rhino truck through hordes of zombies in this zombie apocalypse game.

Avoid incoming obstacles such as land mines, bounders, cars and other hazard materials.

Shoot and destroy obstacles with bullets.

title: Human Leap Evolution
description: Want a wild evolution adventure from caveman to futuristic super warrior? Human Leap: Evolution is a high-energy action evolution puzzle game where every jump you make shapes your destiny. Choose wisely, evolve rapidly, and battle your enemies with unstoppable power!

title: Candy Jewels
description: It is a candy-filled puzzle adventure full of surprises! Match candies, break chests and collect coins as you progress through countless levels. Complete fun events like Time Attack or Coin Catch and use boosters to overcome tricky obstacles even faster!

title: Block Dropping Merge
description:
Block Dropping Merge is a special but classic number merge puzzle. It's easy to play but hard to master.
Show us how good you are among other puzzlers!

1024 2048 4096 8192 16384... Drop them numbers and merge to get bigger numbers and show how smart you are!

Play and share your best score now!

title: Squarehead Hero
description:
Squarehead Hero is a fun, turn-based puzzle game where you help a brave, square-headed hero explore dangerous dungeons full of monsters and treasure.
Plan your moves carefully on a grid board — fight enemies, grab loot, and gear up for the next challenge.
Think you’ve got what it takes to lead Squarehead to victory? Jump in and find out!

title: Board Kings Board Dice
description: Board Kings: Board Dice is a classic multiplayer strategy board game. Do you like to play Monopoly,Board Kings: Board Dice is similar to Monopoly. Become the real Board King by building and upgrading your empire with dice points, building and upgrading your board, or infiltrating other players' boards and attacking their buildings. This is a game where luck and strength go hand in hand to win,how is your luck today? Join us for more surprises waiting to be unlocked!

title: Color Sort: Impostor Edition
description: Color Sort Impostor Edition is a fun and relaxing puzzle game that challenges your logic and focus. Sort the colorful characters into the correct tubes so that each tube contains only one color. The rules are simple, but the puzzles quickly become more challenging as new colors and obstacles appear. Plan your moves carefully, avoid mistakes, and enjoy a smooth, satisfying sorting experience designed for players of all ages.

title: Rich Choice Run
description: Rich Choice Run is a fun swipe runner where every decision shapes your final lifestyle. Slide left and right to pick the best “boyfriend” choices and grab expensive items along the way. Your choices build your value and status—choose wisely, because one bad pick can ruin your chance.

title: Astral Escape
description: Astral Escape is a thrilling space game where you dodge asteroids, outsmart aliens, and survive cosmic traps in a fast escape game adventure. Explore galaxies in a sci-fi arcade escape with astronaut missions and star quests. Fans of cool math games, Roblox, Minecraft, snake game, or Kahoot-style challenges will enjoy this galaxy escape quest. Astral Escape blends action, strategy, and fun into one cosmic survival run.

title: Hidden Horrors
description: Ready to explore the haunted Halloween world? Play a hidden object game with 30 Halloween levels. Each level has 6 hidden objects. Find all objects before time runs out. If you need help, use a hint. The game is easy to play. Enjoy colorful Halloween scenes and fun gameplay.

title: Mahjong Pet Quest
description:
Dive into the colorful and engaging world of Mahjong Pet Quest, a fun and relaxing puzzle game where classic Mahjong meets adorable animal tiles!
Replace the classic Mahjong tiles with cute animal-themed ones! Each tile brings a charming, delightful touch to the game.
Explore a variety of levels, each designed to test your skills and logic. The difficulty increases as you progress, ensuring that you’re always challenged!

title: Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac
description:
Unwind and challenge your mind with Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac, a timeless puzzle game that blends strategy, focus, and relaxation. 
Match beautifully designed tiles, clear the board, and enjoy a calming gameplay experience anytime, anywhere.
Perfect for both beginners and seasoned players, Mahjong Solitaire Zodiac offers intuitive controls, elegant visuals, and satisfying puzzles that keep you coming back for more.

title: Merge Fruit
description: Looking for something fun, relaxing, and totally addictive? You just found it. Merge Fruit is a simple but surprisingly strategic puzzle game where you combine fruits to create even bigger ones. It’s a satisfying blend of logic, timing, and casual fun that’s perfect for any moment.

title: Mega Shark
description: One shark and a sea full of delicious fish. How hungry are you? You’ve got 60 seconds to prove it! Feed nonstop, survive the deepest waters and rely on your shark’s speed, strength and invincibility to complete each hunt. Collect coins and trophies to unlock and explore new stages.

title: Us Army Car Games Truck Driving
description: Army truck 3d simulator is a realistic military game in which they supply their weapons, foods also use them for the transportation of troops for war and to protect their city from terrorist attacks. Are you looking forward to have an amazing modern army truck driver game to drive your army vehicle and become an army machines driver, as much as you want.

title: MineBlocks 3D Maze
description: MineBlocks 3D Maze: A Mind-Bending Adventure in a Blocky World! Get ready to step into a world of puzzles and creativity with MineBlocks 3D Maze—an incredible game that’s perfect for kids and adults alike. If you’re a fan of brain-teasers and enjoy a good challenge, this 3D puzzle game is exactly what you need. It’s all about strategy, logic, and a little bit of muscle (virtual, of course)!  Push the blocks strategically to guide them onto the altars scattered across the level.

title: Save Stranding Fish
description: Help all the little fish that unfortunately wash up on the beach to escape their predicament.You must pay attention to the order in which you rescue the fish.

title: Logic Storm: Animals Puzzle
description: Logic Farm: Animal Grid Puzzle is a relaxing yet challenging logic puzzle game where your goal is to place cute animals on a grid following specific rules. With its soft pastel aesthetics and brain-teasing levels, it’s the perfect blend of cozy gaming and mental exercise. Can you find the perfect spot for every animal? Start sorting your farm today!

title: Brainrot Merge
description:
Merge adorably weird Italian brainrot characters! 
Combine them to unlock rare (and even weirder) species. 
Build the ultimate brainrot paradise!

title: Ellie and Friends Venice Carnival
description: Step into the glamorous world of Venice Carnival Dressup with Ellie and Friends Venice Carnival, where you can join Ellie and her friends at one of the most extravagant events of the year. The Venice Carnival is all about stunning masks, luxurious costumes, and endless glamour, and now you get to help Ellie and her friends get ready for the big celebration! Design unique looks and create the perfect carnival style with a variety of costumes, accessories, and masks.

title: Sort Game Toy Sort
description: Enjoy some adorable sorting fun in Sort Game: Toy Sort. This delightful match 3 puzzle and casual sort game challenges you to organize colorful dolls and toys. Match and eliminate all dolls within the limited time. When you encounter difficulties, use items to help you quickly clear the level. Such as Convert, Eliminate, Refresh or Break.

title: Cars Derby Arena
description: Welcome to the world of Car Derby Arena! In this exciting game you can enjoy the unique experience of changing the color of cars, improving their performance, and manipulating gravity and weather conditions. Your goal is to become an invincible master of destruction, pump up your car and crush everything in your path. Embark on exciting missions, compete with other players and prove your skills in this epic Car Derby Arena game!

title: Vex X3M
description:
VEX X3M, a new extreme hill racing game with bike stunts and obstacles, is here! 
Enjoy the classic Vex elements, but this time you will be racing your way to the finish line! 

Perform crazy bike stunts in 30 unique levels filled with danger - from spikes and shooting knives to rockets and lasers. Reach the finish safely and obtain stars to unlock new unique bike skins.

Complete all levels in easy and hard mode to crown yourself a master VEX X3M Rider.

Start your engines and enjoy VEX X3M!

title: Gun Evolution
description: Gun Evolution is both a shooting running game and a strategy merge battle game. With 3D cartoon models, you need to merge a power gun to win the battle after the finish line at each level. I recommend shooting the numbered pillars, you can claim money inside and get the items on them. When you earn enough money, you can upgrade the ATK and Speed to destroy more pillars more easily on the track. Good luck!

title: Ninja: Bamboo Assassin
description:
You will be immersed in the dangerous world of ninja art, where every movement, every breath are decisive moments in your mission.

Your goal is to approach your enemies unnoticed, and to achieve this, you will have to skillfully use your blade to cut through the bamboo thickets, making your way through the dense forest.

But be on your guard, your enemies are not slumbering, and you can be detected at any moment.

title: Dart Hero
description: Do you have the reflexes of a Hero? Step up to the line in Dart Hero, the fast-paced arcade game where timing is everything. Forget about complex aiming—just wait for the perfect moment and Tap to Shoot!

title: Squid Game Memory Card Match
description:
Step into the thrilling world of Squid Game Memory Card Match! Test your memory and focus as you uncover pairs of iconic Squid Game symbols and characters. Can you keep your cool under pressure and match all the cards before time runs out?
Challenge yourself or compete with friends to see who can master the ultimate memory test. With Squid Game Memory Card Match, every flip brings you closer to victory or defeat – can you handle the pressure?

title: Pixel Path
description:
Pixel Path is a platformer with a non—standard plot.?
Get to the portal at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem... The floor may collapse, the spikes will move on you, and your character will grow to huge sizes. One wrong step and the game is over.❌
You will have to keep your sanity, expect surprises, show a good reaction and most importantly: do not get angry.?
The game also has a table of the best players who completed all levels faster than the rest.

title: 2248 Block Merge
description: Upon beginning to play, you will undoubtedly become hooked on these 2048 puzzle games. They are crafted with stunning visuals and user-friendly gameplay, making them an excellent option for enthusiasts of number block puzzle games.

title: Falling Art Ragdoll Simulator
description:
The harder they fall, the more points they get!

Jump in and enjoy the beauty of falling art! Because let’s be honest - there is nothing more satisfying than watching someone hurt themselves in the most dumb and ridiculous way. Especially when that someone is a 3d model with ragdoll physics and you don’t need to feel sorry for it at all!
 
Just enjoy our crazy game, have fun, and stay safe!

title: K-Pop Hunter Halloween Fashion
description: Step into the glamorous world of K-Pop Hunter Halloween Fashion! In this fun dress-up game, you become the ultimate stylist, creating spooky yet stylish looks for popular K-Pop stars. Mix and match Halloween costumes, trendy hairstyles, and cool accessories to design jaw-dropping outfits for the season’s most exciting event.

title: Solitaire Story Tripeaks 6
description: The highly anticipated 6th installment of one of the most popular Solitaire Story card games of all time! Your good friend Foxy will take you on a journey to new destinations, visiting countries, landscapes, and landmarks like Japan, Egypt, Brazil, Korea, New Zealand, Madagascar, North Pole, and Fiji. With 6700+ levels, Daily Missions, Weekly Air Balloon and Pet Events, and dozens of new card designs, this is the biggest Solitaire Story game yet!

title: Moto Road Rash 3D 2
description: Rev up your engines and feel the thrill of the open road in Moto Road rash 3D 2! This high-octane motorcycle game immerses you in a heart-pounding racing experience where agility and precision are your best allies. Zoom through a dynamic, ever-changing cityscape, weaving between lanes, dodging traffic, and mastering daring stunts.

title: Pet Merge
description:
Merge adorable pets! 
Combine cute companions to unlock rare and magical species. 
Pass exciting levels in adventure mode or beat your high score in the classic mode.
Let's Play! Meow

title: Ultimate Sports Car Drift
description: Dive into the world of Ultimate Sports Car Drift and feel the rush of adrenaline as you take on the ultimate drifting challenges. Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newcomer to the world of drift racing, this game offers something for everyone. Buckle up, hit the gas, and let the drifting madness begin!

title: Rabbit & Carrot
description: Help the rabbit collect all of the carrots on each level and get to the flag. Lots of spikes and spiky enemies to avoid. Open gates and use bubbles to float across the screen. 48 challenging levels in this fun platformer.

title: Royal Garden Match 2
description: Royal Garden Match 2 is here! Join Aria as she tends the kingdom’s most prestigious Royal Garden. Restore it to its former glory by completing fun match-3 puzzles! Match royal flowers, fruits, and plants across hundreds of levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Enjoy a magical journey full of beauty, strategy, and rewards. Play Royal Garden Match 2 now and bring the Royal Garden back to life!

title: Merge Muscle
description: Create the most powerful gym, connect athletes!  A large gym is at your disposal. Your task is to get new athletes, combine similar ones to get more powerful athletes. The most powerful athletes can be taken to a boxing competition. You need to click as often and quickly as possible to defeat your opponent in a difficult battle.

title: Slope Spooky
description: Slope Spooky is a Halloween-themed! A ball rolling down difficult and eerie slopes is controlled by the players. It's almost Halloween, which means Slope needs some scary stuff!

title: Animation & Coloring Alphabet Lore
description: Learn and draw the Alphabet with Animation & Coloring Alphabet Lore, a fun and educational simulation game. You will discover the secrets of each letter before you bring it to life with your own colors and creativity. You can choose from sixteen letters and Free Draw mode to unleash your imagination. You can also use different tools and colors to make your drawings more amazing. There is no time limit or score in this game, just relax and enjoy the art of drawing!

title: Build a Go-Kart
description:
Build your karting empire from scratch — from simple straights to complex tracks with boosts and risky turns.

Design unique tracks using modular blocks: combine elements, optimize your route, and find the perfect balance between speed and profit. Every ride earns money — and your track design determines how much you make.

title: My Garden Journey
description:
Grow your dream garden, raise animals, and enjoy peaceful farm life!

Welcome to My Garden Journey! ?? Start your peaceful farming adventure in My Garden Journey, the ultimate relaxing farming simulator!

title: Puzzle Blocks: Fill It Completely
description:
Discover the world of exciting puzzles!

In this game, you have to collect shapes by filling them with blocks of different sizes and configurations. Each task is a unique logical task that requires attention, patience and a strategic approach.
Various difficulty levels - from easy for beginners to difficult for real masters.
Original shapes and blocks - each level is unique.

title: Obby Rescue Pin
description:
Obby Rescue Pin is a brain-burning, high IQ puzzle game that is especially addictive. How you pull the pins to rescue the Obby depends entirely on your logic and strategy!
Avoid Dangers: Navigate around bombs, ferocious animals, and deadly traps.
Outsmart the Room: Unlike simple rope rescue games, this experience focuses more on strategic adventures.
Help the Escape: Clear the path to help the Obby escape out of the dangerous room.

title: Axe Throw
description:
Ready to test your precision? Welcome to Axe Throw, the ultimate test of aim and timing. The rules are simple, but the challenge is endless. You have one goal: Break the target.

But be careful—the path to victory is rigged with danger. Explosive bombs are moving, and blocking your way. One wrong move, and it's game over!

title: Supermarket Simulator: Dream Store
description: Build and expand your shop: add shelves, displays, products, and decorations to attract more customers. Hire staff and manage their skills and motivation. Handle orders, discounts, and marketing campaigns. Every day, your store grows bigger and more profitable!

title: Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle
description: Dive into the relaxing world of Aqua Sort: Water Color Puzzle! Your goal is simple: sort the colored liquids into the flasks until each flask contains only one color. With over 1000 levels and unique modes like Color Fusion, Mystery, and Time Trial, this puzzle game will test your logic and patience. Unlock new themes and achievements as you play!

title: Perfect Tidy
description: Welcome to Perfect Tidy, a simple and relaxing cleaning simulator game that you can play for free. Are you good at cleaning work? Searching for something that is stress-relieving? Join Perfect Tidy, where you can dive into multiple cleaning tasks: Car washing, skin care, teeth fixing, pet care, and more. Unlike cleaning in real life, all you have to do in the game is click, drag, and enjoy the present moment.

title: Sword Life
description: The job of a blacksmith this one is not only how to forge the best sword! You have to get the most amazing materials, and then you have to sell the sword! But you can do it!

title: Dinosaurs vs Asteroids
description: Giant asteroids are crashing down on Earth. But the dinosaurs have a plan! They have special mounts on their backs where you can attach a variety of weapons: from miniguns and flamethrowers to alien shotguns and blasters. Additionally, there are special species of dinosaurs that can shoot powerful spikes or break asteroids with their claws.

title: Treasure Hunt Puzzle
description: Explore ruins, complete stone tablet puzzles, and collect treasures! Solve each puzzle by fitting all your blocks into the board using the symbols as hints.

title: Mr Bounce
description: Challenge yourself with Mr Bounce, the brain-boosting puzzle game that will test your thinking skills and reflexes. Each level is a new puzzle demanding strategic planning and precise execution. Mr Bounce is more than just a game; it's a mental workout that improves your cognitive abilities.

title: Stack Sorting
description: Welcome to Stack Sorting! Your task is to organize colorful cylinders by clicking on stacks. Move the topmost cylinder to an empty stack or one with a matching top cylinder. Navigate through Easy Mode with plenty of stacks and time, or challenge yourself in Hard Mode with fewer stacks. Complete all levels within the time limit to emerge victorious!

title: Jump Master
description:
You can jump further if you press down on the marker.
Press and release the timing so that it doesn't fall between the footrest and the footrest!
Why don't you compete with your friends for points with the sharing function?

title: Last Stand Warrior
description:
A thrilling third-person shooter where you play as an experienced shooter defending your land from endless hordes of enemies. Control the hero, apply precise punches, use skills and fight with waves of mobs to prevent them from breaking through. Upgrade your weapons and abilities to become a true defense champion!

Ideal for fans of dynamic gameplay, arcade battles and survival in the «wave of opponents» mode.

title: Lazy Workers
description: The employees in the office have started slacking off and everyone is asleep. As the boss, you need to get the office back up and running. To do this, use your mouse and send employees to rows of desks. Move workers so they do not bump into each other. Your job will get a little more difficult with each level. If you cannot pass the level, you can use the option to skip the level.

title: Just Dice - Random Tower Defence
description: ? Welcome to "Just Dice: Random Tower Defense"! Get ready to roll the dice and defend your territory against hordes of relentless monsters in this exciting tower defense game. With a unique merging mechanic and vibrant visuals, you'll be hooked from the very first roll!

title: Rescue Sharp Turn
description: Rescue Puzzle 3D is a lightweight 3D fun puzzle game. You need to click on the correct objects in the small three-dimensional scene to trigger mechanisms, remove obstacles or form a chain reaction to meet the level conditions and rescue the injured character. The levels are short but full of ingenuity: turn off the power switch, move rocks, release water to extinguish fire, synthesize props...

title: Special Holiday Solitaire
description:
Step into a festive world of fun with Special Holiday Solitaire! This cheerful card game combines classic solitaire gameplay with a holiday twist, creating the perfect escape for players of all ages.  
Whether you're looking for a relaxing break or a way to get into the holiday spirit, *Special Holiday Solitaire* is the perfect companion for the season. Challenge yourself, enjoy the magic of the holidays, and spread the festive cheer!

title: CANDY LOVE
description: Let's erase the same candies by matching 3 or more of them! You can take a candy from the tapped row and put it on the tapped row. The game ends when the candy reaches the bottom.

title: Merge Brick Breaker
description: Welcome to Merge Brick Breaker, the ultimate fusion of ball merging and brick-breaking action! Get ready to embark on a thrilling adventure that challenges your strategic skills and reflexes.

title: Find the Sprunki
description: Find out the hidden Sprunki in the specified images. Each level has 12 hidden Sprunki. There are 12 levels in total. The time is limited so be fast and find all hidden objects before time runs out. Clicking in the wrong place several times reduces the time by an additional 5 seconds. So, if you are ready, start the game and have fun!

title: School Escape: Obbie Run!
description:
Run Obbie! The teacher will catch up with you and take you straight to the principal! 
You will play as a schoolboy Obbie. After a conflict with the teacher, you need to escape from school. 
The teacher will try to catch up with you at school, you can't let this happen. 
Collect all the keys and escape from school.

title: SNAKES
description: SNAKES is a modern puzzle game that combines strategy and spatial reasoning. Players guide multiple snakes across a grid, filling every empty tile to complete each level. With clear visuals and intuitive mechanics, the game offers a relaxing yet challenging experience that sharpens logical thinking. Each level introduces unique layouts and obstacles, ensuring variety and depth as players advance.

title: Murder
description: Ready for the scary world of Murder? Colorful Halloween scenes, accompanied by scary ghosts and jack-o '-lanterns, enhance the immersion of the game. On this most mysterious night,let you try a nervous assassination adventure! You will be a cunning assassin who will seize the moment to kill the king. Play the king when you kill successfully.

title: Forest Glade Mysteries
description: Immerse yourself in the world of Forest Glade Mysteries — a magical forest where the cutest animals live! Each level introduces you to new fluffy friends and exciting challenges. This forest is full of mysteries, and every step brings you closer to uncovering ancient secrets!

title: Dungeon Master – Cult & Craft
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of a mysterious dungeon, where you are its keeper and master! Turn simple stickmen into devoted followers capable of mining ore and creating value for your dark empire. Develop the Cult, manage resources and expand the boundaries of your underground Universe!

title: Bowmasters
description: Bowmasters is a fun and action-packed game that combines creative physics with exciting Archery gameplay. Use different types of bows and weapons. Draw your weapon, judge the angle, and fire arrows to hit all enemies. The game shines with its physics-based mechanics, where timing, distance, and trajectory matter. You’ll need real skill and smart thinking to solve each shooting puzzle and land accurate hits. Every match feels different thanks to unique characters and varied weapons.

title: Sudoku Brain Blocks
description: Sudoku Brain Blocks is a relaxing yet addictive online puzzle game that blends classic Sudoku logic with block-fitting challenges (Tetris style). Drag and drop various shaped blocks onto a 9×9 grid to complete full rows, columns, or 3×3 squares to clear the board and earn high scores. Use strategy and planning to avoid running out of space and test your brain with every move!

title: Merge Food Puzzle
description: Merge Food Puzzle is a synthetic puzzle game. What is different from ordinary match-3 games is that successful matches will not disappear and will generate higher-level food. The game has two modes: Merge BBQ and Merge Fruit. Merge BBQ has a variety of barbecues waiting for you to unlock, including corn, cauliflower, fish, squid, and more. Have fun!

title: Strawberry Shortcake BoardGames
description: Visit the BerryWorks cafeteria and play checkers, memory, tic-tac-toe, connecting pairs, and complete jigsaw puzzles with your friends.

title: Blast Cubes
description: Blast Cubes is an addictive puzzle game where players strategically place cubes on a grid. When cubes align in horizontal or vertical rows, they explode, triggering an exciting chain reaction! After the explosion, characters of the same color as the exploded cube emerge and move towards vehicles of the same color waiting at the top. Once the vehicles are filled, new ones appear, continuing the cycle.

title: Metal Bay Top Blade Power
description:
Metal Bay Top Blade Power is a top-down action game inspired by spinning blade battles.

Control a powerful metal top blade and fight against enemies in the Metal Bay arena, using real-time physics-based collisions and spin power mechanics.

Master speed, impact force, and rotation control to understand when to attack, collide, or evade.

title: City Banana Man Agent
description: Begin an interesting fighting experience in City Banana Man Agent! You'll play as a strange banana agent passing busy city streets. Choose a spot to land and start exploring this wonderful city.Find the target and complete the task. And show your driving skills. Equipped with many powerful weapons and shoot enemies. Aim your gun at the enemy and attack him.

title: Gym Muscle Merge Tycoon
description: Gym Muscle: Merge Tycoon is an addictive game where you create your team of fighters and transform them into real muscle heroes. Connect fighters to strengthen their muscle mass, improve their characteristics, and earn profit. Participate in fighting tournaments to compete for cool rewards and become the most powerful fighter of all time!

title: Plug Man Race
description: Plug Head Race plays like a collecting arcade game with battery items. To win the level, you need to overpass the finish line in first place.
