Each platform requires a lot of red battery items, collect them, and use them to pass the current switch. When you are weaker than others, keep away from them and collect red battery items only.  Remember to buy your favorite skins when you have enough gold coins.

title: Twisted Rope
description: Get ready for a mind-bending challenge! ? Twisted Rope Puzzle 3D is a captivating game that will put your problem-solving skills to the test. Dive into a colorful world of tangled ropes and work your way through increasingly complex puzzles.

title: Hero Tower War
description:
Many monsters and enemies in the tower. You need to defeat them, get treasures and save hostages.

You can play everywhere ,every time. It is a boring killer game.

title: Daddy Cactus
description: Take control of a giant cactus with an unusual hunger for meat! Roam the colorful 3D world, collecting meat from unsuspecting humans and free chunks scattered across the map. As you gather more meat, your cargo will fill up, and once it’s full, you can deliver your haul to Mommy Cactus, who waits for your delicious deliveries. But be careful! The world is full of dangerous obstacles like cannons.

title: Garage Master - Nuts and Bolts
description:
Your goal as a Garage Master is to sort out nuts by color to corresponding bolt. Sounds easy, doesn't it? Think twice! The color sort game presents a challenges by mixing all the nuts and making it difficult to find the corresponding bolt.
It’s a perfect time to train your problem-solving abilities in this color sort game.
The best part is when your car is finished, open my super garage and customize it by choosing one of 4 skins.

title: Sportsball Merge
description:
Stretch, pull, and jump! Lets workout and be active in Sports Merge.

Drop the orbs filled with energy to discover new and exciting forms of exercise. Merge them all but be careful how high you jump!

What is the highest score you can reach? Come play now and lets find out!

title: VSCO Girl Aesthetic
description: Welcome to the VSCO Girl Aesthetic. Rainbow High school girls Sunny, Skyler, Ruby, and Violet are the trendy fashion girls. They planned to try VSCO fashion which is trending all over social media. Join and browse their wardrobe to pick some suitable outfits for the girls. Play and Have fun!

title: Grow a Garden 3D
description:
Welcome to Grow a Garden, a fun and peaceful game where you plant seeds and grow magical trees! ?
Explore different seasons, customize your character, and watch your garden grow bigger every day.
Every seed is special and every garden is unique!

title: Tank Fury: Boss Battle 2D
description:
Welcome to the world of tanks of the game "Tank Fury: Boss Battle 2D"! 
There are various tanks available in the game that can be controlled and pumped: T-60, T-54, T-70, IS-3, PLACES. Each of them has its own unique characteristics and capabilities. Choose your favorite tank and go to the battlefield!

title: Idle Hotel Empire
description:
Grow your hotel empire in this idle tycoon simulation game.

Construct different hotel floors to suit the needs of your customers. This includes construcing standard hotel rooms, cafe bistros, deluxe rooms, meeting rooms for corporate customers, vip rooms, infinity pools, gym and fitness rooms and of course, the bougee presidential suite.

Control hotel employees, move them up and down the elevators to move the cash, and finally CASH it in the reception office.

title: 2-3-4 Player Games
description: These games can be played with 2, 3, or 4 players. You can play 21 unique games with your friends, each with different scenarios. The objective of each game is to either score or be the first to reach the finish line. Move swiftly and outpace your opponents! It's time to enjoy with friends!

title: Hostage Fishes
description: A malfunction occurred in the aquarium filter pipes. The fish in the aquarium are in a very difficult situation. If you do not repair all the pipes within 1 minute, you may cause them to disappear.  You should fix the pipes as soon as possible to solve the problem.

title: CityMix Solitaire
description:
Play card games, relax and train your memory and brain with CityMix Solitaire. Solitaire CityMix is more than just another game♠♥♠♥!
Which would you prefer: decorating and restoring a quiet town, or solving puzzles and seeking adventure on a lost island? With CityMix Solitaire you can decorate, solve puzzles and mysteries, follow adventures and help brave heroes. Vicky and her pet Raccoon will help in this challenging quest.

title: Exit - Puzzle
description: Embark on an exciting journey in Exit - Puzzle, a captivating game where your mission is to rotate the puzzle and guide the ball to the exit! Each level presents new challenges, requiring you to think creatively and find the best route. Twist and turn the puzzle to navigate through obstacles and unlock the path forward. With a variety of levels and progressively harder puzzles, this game will keep you entertained and engaged.

title: No Pain No Gain - Ragdoll Sandbox
description: A ragdoll sandbox physics game where you place traps, cause pain, and earn coins for every hit. The more it hurts, the more you get.

title: Heist Defender
description: "Heist Defender" immerses players in the heart-pounding world of high-stakes bank robberies, where they take on the role of an elite security expert tasked with preventing a daring heist. As the mastermind behind the bank's defense systems, players must employ strategic thinking, quick reflexes, and cutting-edge technology to thwart the cunning thieves and protect the bank's vault from being plundered.

title: Jenny's Math Puzzle
description: Challenge your mind with Jenny’s Math Puzzle, a fun and brain-boosting online game where logic meets creativity. Arrange number tiles to solve equations, unlock new puzzles, and sharpen your math skills along the way. Play on your phone or computer — every move counts, and every solution brings you closer to becoming a true math master.

title: Dream Restaurant 3D
description: Ready for the ultimate restaurant challenge in Dream Restaurant 3D? Embark on a journey to establish your very own restaurant empire. The mission is straightforward: swiftly attend to customers, prepare delectable hamburgers, stack them up, and gracefully serve them around the tables. Expand your team by hiring proficient waiters, accumulate profits, and gradually construct an unparalleled restaurant empire!

title: SnakeMaxx
description: Dive into thrilling PvP battles or solo runs! Unlock avatars, skins, and boosters to power up your snake in this fast-paced action runner.

title: Going Balls 3D
description: Going Balls 3D is a relaxing 3D rolling game where smooth control and calm focus are the key to winning. Swipe to steer the wooden platform and guide the ball forward—no need to rush, just keep it steady and reach the finish line without falling.

title: Shape-Shifting
description: Choose different vehicles to adapt to various terrains, allowing yourself to navigate through the terrain faster and become the first in the race.

title: Farm Triple Match
description:
Looking for a fun tile-matching puzzle game? Try Farm Triple Match, a fresh take on tile-matching for puzzle lovers! This mahjong-inspired game is easy to learn but offers exciting challenges.
Beat levels and build your own farm with cute animals and a lovely garden.
Classic gameplay with a modern twist for relaxing brain training.
Explore a variety of tiles featuring fruits, veggies, animals, and more.
Use boosters to conquer tough puzzles and keep progressing. No time limits—play anytime!

title: Pin Master
description: Pin master: Screw puzzle quest & brain games challenges your problem-solving skills in a captivating pin puzzle adventure. Strategically tap to unlock screw holes on products, guiding metal plates to fall in the correct sequence. Navigate through intricate mazes of nuts, bolts, and plates. With each level presenting new challenges, immerse yourself in over 100 brain-teasing stages. Need a hint? No problem! Utilize the hint feature or remove random screws to progress.

title: House Deep Clean Sim
description:
House Deep Clean Sim is a home-themed cleaning game with a strong sense of experience. It has 9 scenes for you to clean, which are fence, sculpture, trampoline, pool, robot, fountain, ground,
car, and dining table. Not only does it have a rich scene, but it also has everything you need for a clean game, such as full 3D effects, resizable nozzle size, and the ability to move around at will.  Try it if you are interested. Have fun.

title: Chibi Doll Coloring & Dress Up
description:
Chibi avatar character creator: anime coloring book and dress up games for girls
First chibi dolls coloring book: meet the most customizable Anime Avatar Maker! Color pictures, become a real doll designer, create and makeover adorable anime characters with baby doll dress up games for girls and glitter coloring pages! (✧∀✧)/

title: Word Solitaire
description: Challenge your mind with a fresh twist on a classic with Word Solitaire! This addictive word solitaire blends clever word-building with strategic card gameplay, creating a unique solo experience. Find categories, reveal hidden words, and clear the board in increasingly challenging levels. Perfect for quick breaks or long sessions—relax, think, and master the art of words!

title: Dance On Hotsteps Mobile
description: Welcome to Dance On - Hotsteps Mobile, a modern dance game that you can play for free on H5games4u. Dress up your superstar in beautiful suits and dresses, follow the beats of the music, make perfect dance moves, and surprise the crowd in the dancing show!

title: Key Quest
description: Golden Key is a challenging escape game where you must solve a series of puzzles to escape mysterious rooms. Use logic and memory to find useful items, uncover secrets, and solve clever riddles until you discover the Golden Key.

title: Merge Combo
description: Immerse yourself in this captivating merge puzzle game! Combine matching blocks to score points and trigger epic combos. The more blocks you merge, the bigger the numbers and combos grow! Test your strategy and aim for the highest score—how large a number can you create?

title: Stickman Jailbreak Story
description:
An exciting puzzle game in which the player will have to help stick make a daring escape from prison. Stick found himself in a sinister prison, from which there is no way out, except for various ingenious paths, hidden objects and puzzles.
The player will explore the various rooms of the prison, paying attention to every small detail and examining objects in search of key clues. Each room is filled with riddles, traps and various items that can be used to escape.

title: Draw To Kill
description: Draw To Kill is a free online drawing puzzle game for boys played on PuzzleGame. First, you need to observe the distribution of the enemy and draw the route in advance. Then your character will assassinate the enemy according to your route, and you can succeed after killing all the enemies. Every operation must be done in one go. Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Enjoy Draw To Kill!

title: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator
description: Ninja Wars: Battle Simulator is a 3D strategy battle game where planning is the key to victory. Build your army of Swordsmen, Spearmen, and Archers, analyze enemy formations, and lead your ninja forces to triumph across challenging levels.

title: Supermarket Simulator: Store Manager
description: Supermarket Simulator: Store Manager is a dynamic retail experience where you juggle cashier duties and store management. Scan items, process payments, and keep customers happy while managing stock and organizing shelves.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: 3Dash
description: 3Dash is a fast-paced 3D rhythm platformer inspired by Geometry Dash—dash, jump, and flip through dizzying, rotating tracks while keeping perfect time. Tackle six hand-crafted levels, then build your own with the level editor for endless replay

title: Only Up Parkour 2
description: Only Up Parkour 2! is an exciting arcade game in which you have to overcome obstacles and conquer heights of 500M. Inspired by the popular game Your task is to guide the character through a vertical labyrinth full of various obstacles. You must react quickly, jump accurately and climb up dexterously to avoid crashing into obstacles and falling down. As you progress through the various levels, you will encounter increasing difficulty and new challenges such as Jumping platforms and obstacles.

title: Pet Fall
description: You can move animals from side to side. You have to collect full horizontal lines to make them disappear. Some animals are frozen and must be released twice, some are locked in cages and cannot be moved. Use bonuses when necessary

title: Black Pink Halloween Concert
description: Step into the spooky spotlight with Black Pink Halloween Concert, a thrilling dress-up game where you style the K-Pop superstars for their haunted Halloween performance. Choose from a wide variety of creepy-cute costumes, bold hairstyles, and festive accessories to make the members shine on stage.

title: Noob Village Tower Defense
description: Dive into the dynamic world of a 2D platformer, where you play as a noob fighting for the survival of your village! Your main goal is to protect the village from endless waves of monsters appearing from an ominous portal. Control the tower manually: select shells, adjust the trajectory and shoot enemies one by one. Only your accuracy and tactics will help you survive the onslaught!

title: Screw Spin
description:
Screw Spin is a satisfying logic puzzle where you unscrew colorful bolts and sort them into matching boxes. It’s relaxing yet challenging, combining planning, logic, and a touch of strategy.

Each level introduces a new layout with bolts of different colors. Your goal is to clear the entire panel by removing all the bolts, carefully managing your limited storage slots and placing each bolt in the correct container.

title: Vibe Colouring
description: Relax with your favorite color by number game! Paint hundreds of pictures — from funny memes to calm landscapes. Every drawing is a little story that comes to life with your colors. Over 100 levels already in the game, and the library keeps growing. All pictures are open and free — no limits or waiting. Hints will show you where uncolored areas are hiding. Check the leaderboard to see who colored the most areas.

title: Super Hero Driving School
description:
Drive unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts on multiple crazy tracks.

It’s a bird! No, it’s a plane! Or maybe a car? What the hell is that thing? I want to drive this right now! 

So buckle up and prepare for super fun times in Super Hero Driving School. Because even heroes need a driving license, you know! 

Drive, and fly unique super hero vehicles and perform stunts like never before. And be careful, because super heroes can have super crashes! :D

title: Merge Run Battle
description: Merge Runner is an exciting merge game where you combine power and speed to win every challenge. Play a merge runner game with fun arcade merge game mechanics like those in cool math games or reminiscent of roblox and minecraft thrills. Upgrade heroes in an idle merge game and fight in a merge battle game. This merge and run game blends strategy and fast-paced action—perfect for fans of snake game challenges or quick kahoot-style fun.

title: Zenith Rush
description:
Beat the track time to advance further! 
Switch the road and pickup upgrades, buy and upgrade cars to be faster and advance further!

title: Colossatron
description:
Take charge of a giant robotic snake and smash through cities with ease as you fight to create the most fearsome weapon of all time.
Unleash the power of Colossatron! A unique combination of Match 3 and Snake gameplay allows you to build a devastating machine by merging colored power ups to create new and more powerful weapons. With thousands of potential combinations, the key to victory lies in mastering the art of building Colossatron to take down formidable bosses.

title: Geometry Vibes X-Arrow
description: Geometry Vibes X Arrow is the newest evolution of the Geometry Vibes series, offering the most refined, competitive and customizable arrow experience so far. The goal is simple but demanding: guide your arrow through dangerous geometric paths, survive increasingly difficult patterns and reach the portal at the end of each route without touching anything.

title: Card Solitaire: Word Game
description:
Train your brain in a fun new way with Card Solitaire: Word Game — a clever blend of card sorting, word puzzles, and logic challenges!
Explore the exciting world of word solitaire, packed with clever associations, tricky word sort levels, and fun topic sort puzzles.

title: Coe Rabbit
description:
Coe Rabbit is a puzzle platformer where you control a cute bunny and teleport him between platforms! Progress through each level by teleporting to higher platforms, collecting power-ups to adjust the height of your portal, and find the perfect path to reach your destination!

Also have fun with the floating bunny, where you control a carrot ship and avoid crashing into obstacles. Play with your best friend in the challenging two-player mode. Who will win?

title: Ice fishing 3d
description:
❄ Fishing is a great kind of recreation and an opportunity to spend time with excitement! If you are a real fisherman at heart and are ready to test your skills, then this ice fishing game is just for you.

? Wherever you are in winter or summer - you can always find yourself on snow-covered ice among beautiful winter landscapes. Drill, rod, bait and a lake that always bites, what else does a born fisherman need?

title: Reversi
description: Challenge your strategic mind against the computer in difficulty levels from absolute novice to expert in this classic game of flipping disks.

title: Steal Brainrot Eggs
description: Steal Brainrot Eggs is a competitive action game playable in both 1 Player and 2 Player modes. Players buy eggs from a central conveyor, carry them to their Base, and hatch random Brainrot characters based on egg rarity. Characters generate coins over time, allowing access to higher-tier eggs. Defend your Base from thieves or steal eggs and characters from rivals, customize your character, raise evolving pets, and take part in timed events across the map.

title: Gun Shooting Games Sniper 3D
description: Step into the battlefield and test your precision in Gun Shooting Games: Sniper 3D, an exciting fps experience packed with nonstop action. This immersive first person shooting game puts you in the role of an elite sniper armed with powerful weapons and challenging missions.

title: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style
description: K-Pop Hunters Valentine Style brings romance, fashion, and K-pop glamour together in one stylish dress-up experience. Help your favorite K-pop hunters transform their looks for Valentine’s Day with stunning outfits, flawless makeup, and charming accessories.

title: Hoard Master
description: Hoard Master is a game to test your speed and responsiveness. Your goal is to collect more and more people, but you should prevent the income of explosives to avoid failure. Are you interested?

title: Piece of Cake: Merge and Bake
description: Piece of Cake: Merge and Bake is a puzzle casual game where you help Emily, the main character, breathe new life into her family’s rundown cafe while uncovering long-lost family secrets. Solve a variety of challenging puzzles, manage the cafe's operations, and craft creative item combinations to unlock new chapters of the story.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Cyber Highway Escape
description: Experience the thrill of high-speed cyberpunk bike racing under the neon lights of a futuristic metropolis, as you weave your way through the winding streets and dodge obstacles in this adrenaline-fueled nocturnal adventure.

title: What's In My Bag?
description: Unpack style and surprises in What’s In My Bag? – the ultimate dress-up and makeup game for fashion lovers! Choose cute outfits, glam makeup, and trendy bags, then reveal what’s inside each one. From influencer props to girly goodies, every bag tells a story. Get creative, show off your style, and join the viral “what’s in my bag” trend now! Perfect for fans of dress-up games, makeup fun, and aesthetic vibes.

title: Avenger Guard
description: Dark forces have destroyed your homeland—rise as the Avenger Guard! Merge heroes to unlock power, fortify defenses, and take vengeance. Lead your legendary squad to repel waves of enemies, upgrade through fusion, and reclaim what’s yours. Will you be the last line of defense?

title: Max Mixed Cocktails
description: Do you want to become a master mixologist? Create cocktails by blending ingredients at the bar. Choose your ingredients, mix them skillfully, and sample the concoction. You'll reach a delightful conclusion by discovering the perfect recipe. Utilize clues in the collections to unlock different endings.

title: Head Runner Dash
description: Head Runner Dash is a 2D platformer game where you need to run, jump, and climb walls to overcome obstacles and traps. Pass the obstacles and raise the flag to complete the level. Difficult levels will make you addicted and feel challenged.

title: Stickman Weapon Master
description:
Fight as a lone brave stickman against the tyranny and Evil
Fight as a lone brave stickman against the tyranny and evil Lord in the land of Stickman Weapon Master.

title: Mahjong Connect: Spooky
description: Connect two tiles of an identical type. A move can only be made if there are 2 or fewer bends in the line between them. Clear the board to advance to the next level, but be warned, the game is time sensitive.

title: Hide Me
description: Do you love the thrill of cat and mouse games? Are you ready to outsmart your pursuers and claim victory? Dive into "Hide Me", the latest hide-and-seek adventure that will put your wits and reflexes to the test!

title: Mermaid Wedding World
description: Mermaid Wedding World is a creative dress-up and decorating game for girls. The princess of the ocean kingdom is getting married to a human and they are going to have a wedding now. You can help prepare the food, set the table, serve the people, and play music. You may help the bride, groom,and other guests to dress up and makeup. You may also decorate the room to your liking.

title: Emoji Guess
description: Welcome to the entertaining world of Emoji Guess, a game where every emoji hides a clue. Use your creativity and logic to decode famous phrases, sayings, and movie titles represented by emoji sequences. Each level brings a fresh challenge that will test your imagination and make you smile. Play for free on your phone or computer and see how fluent you are in the universal language of emojis!

title: Labubu Pop
description:
Labubu Pop is a bright and cheerful puzzle game where the playful Labubus have completely taken over the box! Connect matching characters into chains, clear the board, and earn points to level up. Each stage brings fun surprises, and even more exciting combos!

With its colorful visuals, smooth animations, and simple yet addictive gameplay, Labubu Pop is perfect for relaxing and having fun anytime. The longer your chain — the higher your score and the flashier the effects!

title: Inspector Cat
description:
Inspector Cat is a competitive hidden object game where you play as a sharp-eyed cat inspector racing against other feline players!
Each round challenges you to find specific items on a crowded board full of objects. Be faster and more accurate than the other cats to earn points and climb the ranking.
Stay focused, react quickly, and prove you’re the best inspector in the pack!

title: Chicken Banana Run
description: Explore the World and Space with the famous Chicken Banana! Run and keep running to collect gold, diamonds and special items and finish with the longest distance to get a high score! Play now the new free runner game for everyone.

title: Disk Rush
description: Disk Rush is a reaction-based arcade game where players must quickly sort colored disks into their matching zones. The game challenges your speed and accuracy as disks appear faster over time. With simple tap mechanics and increasing difficulty, Disk Rush tests your ability to think and act quickly under pressure.

title: Maze Hide Or Seek
description: Maze Hide Or Seek is a free online escape and hide-and-seek game for boys played on PuzzleGame. In this game, you will be randomly assigned to different camps. Become a killer and kill everyone on the field. Or become a villager, turn on the switches and escape successfully. Use the complex terrain of the maze to complete the task given by identity, Play on Mobile, Tablet, or Desktop!

title: Barbiecore Aesthetics
description: Step into a whimsical world of pastel dreams and retro vibes with the Barbiecore Aesthetics dress-up game! Test your fashionista skills as you mix and match vibrant colors, fluffy textures, and vintage-inspired patterns to create the most stunning doll-like outfits. From quirky accessories to flouncy dresses, this game offers endless possibilities to express your style. Embrace the Barbiecore trend and let your creativity soar as you curate the perfect wardrobe for our beloved fashion icon.

title: Leap of Life
description:
"Leap of Life" is a short game that offers a true challenge! Every jump you make is a step towards victory but also a step towards losing a life.
Your task is to preserve each jump, calculating your path precisely to avoid depleting all your lives.

title: Springle Puzzle
description: Springle Puzzle is a fun and fast jigsaw game where you solve puzzles before time runs out. Choose from styles like Classic, Irregular, Hexagon, or Wave, each with a different feel. Play easy mode with fewer pieces for a quick game and lower score, or pick more pieces for a harder challenge and higher score. If time runs out, watch a reward ad and keep playing.

title: Angry Plants Flower
description: Angry Plants Flower Game is a beautiful and amazing game with monsters’ crops. You can discover the Fruits’ Kingdom story. The kingdom was attacked by many monsters and zombies. You are the King of the kingdom, and you have to use your fruits and plants to defeat all enemies. Join the game now!

title: Catch a Fish Obby
description: Catch a Fish Obby is a chaotic collector raider set in a bright obby world full of Fish and Brainrot Fish characters. Build a money making base with your favorite sea creatures, sneak into rival bases to steal their fish, and protect your own tank from greedy bots and other players.

title: Join Clash Color Button
description: Are you ready for a game of choices and surprises? Color Button is the game for you! You need to pick the right door and make it to the end safely. But be careful, each door can lead to a different challenge or enemy. You have to use your skills and strategies to avoid traps and obstacles. Teamwork is the key to success in this game. Color Button is an exciting game that tests your judgment and decision-making skills. Do you have what it takes to beat the enemies and reach the end?

title: Royal Pin
description: Royal Pin: King Adventure – A thrilling rescue puzzle game where you save the King, protect the kingdom, and rebuild the castle! Solve tricky pin puzzles, help the queen and princess, and become the ultimate king of this adventure!

title: Block Blast Jewel Puzzle
description: Block Blast: Jewel Puzzle is a vibrant block-stacking game that mixes calm strategy with thrilling speed. Fit jewel blocks to clear lines in Classic, Timer, or Level modes. Easy to start, tough to master, and super satisfying—compete worldwide and climb the leaderboard!

title: Squishy: Taba Paw ASMR
description: A cute collection of relaxing taba paws and other squishes on your smartphone! Relax by sipping squishes in different directions and enjoy sound of squishing!

title: Zombie Driver
description:
Zombie Driver features: - multiple cars - upgrades - multiple levels - fun gameplay
Personalize your car by changing its weapon or its armor. Also, you can buy new car models in the store. Kill all zombies in your way, gather as

title: Find Sort Match
description: Find Sort Match is a fun and creative puzzle that combines sort and match elements. Let you experience the joy of DIY! In the game, sort and match items of various shapes, colors, and types. And complete each level of the challenge.

title: Rough Ball
description: Bounce wildly in Rough Ball! Control your cute purple ball across wall-to-wall platforms, dodging spikes, skulls, and deadly drops. Collect shiny coins, unlock free burger skins, and conquer chaotic levels. Don't fall down—jump, roll, and thrive in pixel-perfect adventure!

title: Rainbow Balls 2048
description: A game in the genre of 2048, where you can skilfully use game physics to achieve victory. The main task is to connect the balls and reach the number 2048. The game also features a booster, which makes passing the game more fun and easier.

title: The Roman Empire Colosseum
description: The war in the colosseum has never been as epic as in this game! Arrange your units and send them into battle! This online game is a battle simulator similar to Totally Accurate Battle Simulator. Your units include warriors, riders, titans, dwarves, mages, and more.

title: Power Puzzle
description:
In Power Puzzle, you take control of a growing electrical network. Connect generators, route power through the grid, and bring every building to life — but every move matters.

? Gameplay
Connect power lines from generators to buildings
Manage limited connections and avoid inefficient routes
Every level is a handcrafted puzzle with increasing complexity
Multiple solutions are possible — can you find the most optimal one?

title: Ball Sort: Color Puzzle
description: An exciting and engaging puzzle game. Move the balls into the flasks to sort them and advance to the next level. The game has many levels, each more challenging than the last! Can you reach the end?

title: American Block Sniper Online
description:
With its informal look reminiscent of Minecraft, American Block Sniper Online is a top-notch first-person action game. In addition to a large variety of adversaries and stages, the game has an extensive arsenal of weaponry.
American Block Sniper Online is a first-person action game in the world of Minecraft where you must defeat all the enemies in each level before time runs out.

title: Zombie Survival Shooter
description: Ready for an all-out apocalypse escape? Zombie Survival Shooter throws you straight into a world overrun by zombies. Zombies attack from every direction. Keep moving, dodge smartly, and never stop running. Shoot the digital doors to gain more helpers or boost your attack speed, etc. Use your strategy to choose which digital door to go through.

title: 100 Rooms Escape
description: This is a brain-burning and challenging escape room online game. Interesting gameplay so you won't get bored. You need to open 100 doors to escape the room. Interact with objects and solve puzzles to complete the tasks in the escape game. Solve the puzzles, and take inventory of the hidden items. You may use them to open the room, move on to the next level, use your skills, and do whatever it takes to escape.

title: Idle Drive: Merge, Upgrade, Drive
description: Welcome to Idle Drive: Merge Upgrade & Drive! Unleash your creativity, craft a unique vehicle for travels. Start with a basic car, enhance it using in-game currency earned by tapping. Accumulate funds for components like engines and tires. Merge parts for higher levels, boosting speed and power. Visit the garage to customize your car. Idle DriftDrive offers exhilarating fun and satisfaction of creating your own ride. Perfect for car enthusiasts and racing fans. Exciting moments await you!

title: Stickman Rocket
description: You have a powerful cannon loaded with Stickman Ragdols which you must shoot far to reach your target! Solve all kinds of challenges as you collect gems, avoid obstacles and control your throws to reach the targets in each level. Try not to bump into obstacles along the way and use all the raggedy characters you need to have fun with these amazing challenges - good luck!

title: Mineblock Obby
description: Minecraft Obby is an amazing parkour game that you can play totally free! Do your best as you navigate through challenging obstacle courses, avoiding pitfalls and traps along the way. Collect coins scattered throughout each level to buy yourself a new sword and enhance your gameplay experience. With each jump and sprint, you'll improve your skills and push your limits. Dive into the blocky world of Minecraft Obby, avoid obstacles, collect those coins, and most importantly—have fun!

title: Chicken Banana Quest
description: Help the Chicken and Banana to solve all puzzle quest and find the play button. Use your skills to solve the puzzles before the lives run out and complete all levels with the less possible clicks

title: ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang
description: Step into the world of ASMR Girl: Livestream Mukbang, where you take on the role of an adorable mukbang streamer! Get ready to indulge in delicious food, satisfy your cravings, and share the experience with your viewers in a cozy, interactive livestream. The more you eat and engage, the more you earn!

title: Protect My Dog 3
description: Protect My Dog 3 is a fun casual puzzle game. The aim of the game is to protect our cute dog from bee attacks. For this, you must create a defensive drawing line at the levels. You should also protect your dog from lava, thorns and different environmental hazards. Fighting the Bees will continue for 100 Levels and things will get a little more difficult with each level.

title: Color Brain Test Games
description: Color Brain Test Game is a ring puzzle game. Do you want to train your brain?  You love fun spinning circle puzzle games with simple and colorful gameplay. Play Color Brain Test Games now!

title: Bank Robbery 3
description:
It is time for a new robbery!
Your new target is the most secure bank in the city.
According to the inside data, the bank is equipped with the newest automated anti-robbery technologies, which makes this robbery a tough one.
But it shouldn’t be much of a problem for a professional like you.
And as always, if you succeed, a big payday awaits you.
Come on, let’s do it!

title: CUBE KING
description:
Show them who's the real King here!

New cubes appear from the portals at the bottom. Your task is to connect cubes with the same numbers by moving them from one stack to another!

You get coins for every merge. Use them wisely:
Upgrade a selected cube!
Unlock new portals with cubes!
Increase the starting level of cubes!
Extinguish burning cubes or instantly shatter the ice on all frozen cubes!

But be careful: if a stack overflows, the game ends!

title: Devs Simulator
description: Welcome to the world of high technology and business! In this exciting strategy game you will become the director of a thriving IT company. Your task is to find the best programmers, assemble a dream team and lead it to success!

title: Ninja Survivor
description: Become a nimble ninja and embark on a dangerous adventure through many levels filled with traps, enemies, and puzzles. Explore colorful 3D locations, avoid deadly mechanisms, and fight zombies and powerful bosses using speed, reflexes, and strategy. Each level requires focus and skill. Upgrade your character, unlock new weapons, and collect stylish skins to grow stronger and overcome increasingly difficult challenges.

title: Ice Skating Ballerina
description: Dive into a winter wonderland and help Ellie and Ben prep for an exciting ice skating competition. Customize skates, curate dazzling outfits, and make a style statement on the ice. Browse through a vast collection of colorful ballerina and glam outfits, chic accessories, and shoes. Glide, twirl, and experience the fun-filled, fashion-centric icy adventure with this engaging dress-up game for girls.

title: Puzzles Balls Merge the New Year!
description: ● This New Year's game is more difficult than it might seem ?! You have a playing field? on which you need to throw balls and connect the same ones??! Until you get the biggest and most beautiful one?! Save up points?! Compete with friends and colleagues to become the best?! Enjoy your game?!

title: Obby Tower Parkour Climb
description:
Dive into the parkour adventure with Obby in the Hell Tower game theme. Climb colored platforms and get to the finished platform for a great reward.
The game contains three hell tower maps easy, medium, and hard. Play these maps in two different modes normal mode and challenge mode. Try to do your best timing in challenge mode in either single-player or 2 player game mode. You can also compete against your friend in normal mode in the 2-player game mode option.

title: Skating Park
description: Welcome to Skating Park, where skateboards meet high-speed racing madness! Dive into a world of adrenaline-fueled stunts and fierce competition as you shred through gravity-defying tracks. Master insane ramps, outmaneuver opponents, and conquer the leaderboard. Feel the thrill as you jump off the track, taking daring shortcuts to gain the edge. Get ready to grind and glide your way to victory!

title: Summon Tribe
description: Summon Tribe is a simple merge-and-defense game where you combine identical units to create stronger ones to stop enemies. It’s easy, mostly for passing time, and it also supports idle play.

title: Kings and Queens Match
description: Welcome to Kings and Queens Match! Dive into a magical kingdom , matching jewels and crowns to progress through levels. Unleash Royal Bombs, hammers, and wands for extra fun. Stunning graphics and an enchanting soundtrack will transport you to a world of magic and wonder. So what are you waiting for? Join Princess Bella on her quest for treasure and adventure today!

title: Mech Monster Arena
description: Mech Monster Arena is a robot-fighting turn-based strategy game. Differently in this fighting game, you don't need to learn how to operate the robot and release each skill. You only need to learn the basic skill counter rules and select the skills flexibly. By earning EXPs and coins from battles in Mech Battle, you can fight with AI opponents and develop your robot. When you have some sources to upgrade your robot in the Mech Warehouse, you can challenge other players in the Arena. Have fun!

title: Eat And Grow Fish
description: Welcome to Eat and Grow Fish, where survival is all about eating or being eaten! Start as a tiny fish and munch your way to the top of the food chain. Explore the levels in Story Mode, or challenge your friends in Duel Mode for two-player fun. Easy to play, fun to master! Are you ready to rule the sea?

title: Underwater Survival
description:
Dive Into a Mysterious and Beautiful Underwater World
Welcome to an unforgettable underwater survival adventure where exploration, discovery, and survival come together in a stunning ocean environment. Dive deep into a vibrant and mysterious sea filled with hidden secrets, breathtaking visuals, and endless possibilities.

title: Zombie Raft
description: Zombie Raft is a survival game. The zombie apocalypse is coming and it's time for a raft survival game! Protect yourself and other survivors from the looming zombie tsunami, and push them all back, it's your responsibility to survive on the raft! Squeeze the vehicles forward and push them if necessary! Keep going, escape the zombie tsunami, and conquer the barren land! If stranded survivors are found, you need to rescue them! Join us and experience the best zombie game!

title: Ship Control 3D
description: Get ready for an exhilarating ship sailing adventure in Ship Stack Racing, a 3D arcade game that will challenge your skills. You have to dodge various obstacles and make it to the beach in one piece. But watch out, as any collision will end your run. Ship Stack Racing is a game that will make your heart race and your adrenaline pump.

title: Shape Transform Blob Racing
description: Shape Transform: Blob Racing is a casual running game. In this game, you will control a little Blob, running, shape-shifting, and go through various challenges! It would help if you quickly switched the Blob’s shape while running to navigate various obstacles. For example, turning into a ball helps you roll through narrow passages. When you become a square, it helps you cross flat areas more  easily.

title: Rescue Rift
description: Embark on a heart-pounding mission in "Rescue Rift," an intense and immersive action-adventure game that challenges your tactical skills and courage. As an elite operative of an undercover rescue team, you find yourself thrust into the depths of danger as you attempt to save hostages who have been kidnapped and confined within the eerie confines of an old, abandoned hospital.

title: Word Connect Puzzle
description: Word Connect Puzzle is a relaxing yet brain-boosting word game. Swipe letters to form hidden words, unlock new packs, and watch the difficulty rise as your vocabulary grows. Earn stars, complete daily challenges, and use hints when you’re stuck. Play offline anytime, enjoy clean visuals and smooth controls, and chase streak bonuses for higher scores. Perfect for quick sessions or long puzzle runs—smart, simple, and satisfying for all ages.

title: Candy Color Sort Puzzle
description: Welcome to our addictive and fun ball sort color puzzle game! If you're looking for a game that challenges your brain and keeps you entertained for hours, you've come to the right place. You'll never get bored. Our game is perfect for those who enjoy brain teasers, puzzles, and games that challenge their cognitive skills.

title: Dig out of Prison
description: Dig Out of Prison is a casual puzzle game where you are an innocent man in jail, determined to plot your escape. All you habe in your jail cell is a spoon to use as a shovel to dig tunnels beneath your cell.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Animal Merge Zoo Park
description:
Animal Merge Zoo Park is a fun and addictive idle zoo simulation game where you build, manage, and expand your very own wildlife empire. Start with a small zoo and grow it into a world filled with animals, wild beasts, dinosaurs, monsters, and magical creatures like unicorns. Become the ultimate zoo tycoon by merging creatures, caring for animals, producing food, managing visitors, and unlocking new zones.
Merge Animals and Discover New Species

title: Slinger Block
description: Guide a red square through compact grid-based puzzles filled with sliding blocks and locked paths. Clear the way, collect every yellow key, unlock the yellow door, and reach the exit to win. Simple rules, clever layouts, and satisfying logic challenges make each level a fun brain teaser.

title: Princess Rescue: Save Girl
description: Dive into a heart-pounding quest in Princess Rescue: Save Girl, a thrilling puzzle adventure full of danger, strategy, and fast-paced action! If you're into dragon-themed puzzles that test your reflexes and thinking skills, this is your next favorite game.

title: Bloons Survival.io
description:
Bloons Survival. io is a fast-paced survival arcade game where you fight off endless waves of balloons!

Control your monkey hero, throw darts automatically, and pop incoming enemies before they get too close.
Collect coins and power-ups to grow stronger, but stay alert — one hit can end your run!

How long can you survive?

title: Digital Circus IO
description:
Grim AI gathered amazing creatures at the circus arena and offered them the chance to compete for life here!
Pick your character and get as much territory as you can! Run from your starting territory and return to add a chunk of space. Evade other characters or defeat them by stepping on their trail.

title: Reflect Beam: Laser Logic
description:
Logic game where every move changes the beam’s path. 

5 modes - 5 types of challenges.
Tunnel: rotate shapes and guide the beam through narrow passages.
Labyrinth: draw a safe path to the exit.
Same Colors: remove blocks of the right color to open the route.
Obstacles: move elements and clear the way for the beam.
Time is limeted: solve faster and more accurately before time runs out.

title: Fashion Dye Pro
description: Fashion Dye Pro is a fun-filled shirt DIY game. Follow the hottest summer trends! Tie-dye summer clothing and beach accessories! Show off your creative skills by customizing tie-dye outfits to your liking. Get requests from customers and paint garments at will. Being creative isn't hard: first tie it up, then dye it! Unleash your DIY art cells and leave everything to the dye! Get high this summer! Come join us!

title: Brainrots Lava Survive Online
description: Brainrots Lava Survive Online is an intense survival experience where rising lava transforms the map into a dangerous obstacle zone. Players must collect brainrots in risky areas and escape before the lava blocks safe routes. Online mode is available in 1 Player, allowing chat and interaction, while 2 Player mode offers local shared-screen competition. With more than 60 characters in normal, gold, diamond, Celestial, and time-limited Divine tiers, progression stays dynamic.

title: The Zombie House
description:
Protect your home from endless waves of zombies!
Defeat zombies to collect coins and ability drops.
Use coins to upgrade both your player and your house.
Each level makes the zombies stronger.
How long can you survive?

title: Merge 2048 Cake
description:
Merge 2048 Cake is a colorful and relaxing puzzle game where you merge matching tiles to create higher numbers!
Combine three or more identical tiles to form a new one with double the value. Plan your moves, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and aim for the ultimate 2048 tile!
Enjoy smooth gameplay, vivid visuals, and a cozy, casual vibe that’s easy to play and hard to put down.

title: Barbee Black Friday Fashion
description: Get ready for a fashion-filled shopping day with Barbee Black Friday Fashion, the ultimate dress-up experience for style lovers! Barbee is hitting the mall for the biggest sale of the year, and she needs your expert fashion sense to shine. Explore chic winterwear, cozy sweaters, stylish boots, and dazzling accessories.

title: Car Park Simulator
description: Welcome to Car Park Simulator, Are you ready to test your driving skills and master the art of parking? Navigate through 72 challenging levels filled with obstacles and narrow spaces...

title: Tricky Challenges: Mini Games
description:
Only 5% will pass all the Challenges! Ready to test your reactions and wit? Take the challenge and prove that you are better than thousands of bloggers!

✨ "Tricky Challenges: Mini Games" is a unique game that combines popular challenges from TipTop and puzzle elements.

title: Path ice
description:
Chill the soda, add some ice, but here's the problem, it's not so easy to get into the glass, you need to draw a path for the ice.

Draw the path as you like.
Go through many levels
Discover all kinds of ice and glasses

title: Happy Fluffy Cubes
description: Happy Fluffy Cubes is a bright and fun 3D runner with adorable cube heroes, tricky traps, and a collection system! Choose your Fluffy and fly through levels full of danger: fire, ice, lasers, and spinning saws! Simple one-touch control, but surviving takes focus and reflexes.

title: Shelf Shift Match
description: Test your strategy and speed in Shelf Shift Match! Shift items on the shelves to create perfect matches of three, clearing the way to reveal hidden shadowed items. But beware—unwise moves can block your shelves, leaving no space to shift and leading to game over! If you're stuck, use the shuffle button to mix things up and find new matches.

title: Hungry Snake Io
description: Hungry Snake.io is a classic game. Here you can try three game modes, Endless mode, Toilet Man, and Monster Brawl. Please note that there can be no collision between worms! In addition, our team takes user experience very seriously, we are always happy to improve the game so that every player can have a better gaming experience, if you encounter any difficulties during the game, please feel free to leave us a message!

title: Super Tank Wrestle
description: Welcome to the world of tank battles, where you can control tanks to fight with other enemies on different maps. There are also a wealth of tanks for you to choose from!

title: Machine City Balls
description: Machine City Balls is a ball parkour game. A must play game for those who like challenges. Collect rare balls and complete all ball game challenges to become a winner! Are you ready? Start your parkour journey now!

title: Blankets
description:
Put together cozy blanket pieces with the same colors and patterns to make them disappear and keep your board nice and neat!
With soft colors and a calm, happy feel, Blankets is great for kids who like fun puzzles without too much stress.

Can you build the coziest blanket and get the best score in Blankets?

title: Max Speed
description: Race shiny sports cars on thrilling 3D tracks full of jumps, stunts, and intense battles. Explore exciting locations with unique challenges, perform daring tricks, upgrade and customize your cars, and test your skills in fast-paced arcade races. Enjoy high-speed action, stunning visuals, and nonstop adrenaline right in your browser.

title: Animal Swipe
description: Animal Swipe is a fun and addictive puzzle game where players match adorable animal pairs on a colorful board. With easy-to-learn controls and exciting power-ups, the game offers a challenge for both casual and strategic players. Use your wits and boosts to clear levels and achieve your objectives!

title: Sky Riders
description: Sky Riders is a high-speed casual vehicle driving game. Put your driving skills to the test as you complete several challenging tracks.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Pool Master
description: From a rookie with a cue to a legend of the table, journey through 100 challenging levels with closed pockets, special balls to clear and more. Unlock custom gear, gain special boosts and rule the table with precision and power.

title: Sprunki Mini Games
description: We present you a compilation of several games with the famous characters Sprunki. The first game is the classic Sprunki game but with an expanded orchestra, that is, with 9 singers. In the second game, you are presented with 10 pictures to color. While the third is a game of finding differences where you have 20 levels with 10 differences on each level.

title: Eco Block Puzzle
description: Unleash your creativity in a classic block puzzle game, then collect pets like in farming games! You are commanding the team of ecologists who are restoring the valley after an environmental catastrophe.

title: Angry City Smasher
description: Angry City Smasher is a third-person RPG fighting simulation game with 3D-armed gorillas. Your goal is to defeat the enemy monster and destroy the marked number of buildings. Use the Ultimate Smash to make AOE damage and destroy more buildings with one hit. To be honest, it is necessary to defeat your opponent first because it will run to you on the level. No one wants to be disturbed by others. Good luck!

title: Block Sniper
description:
Pixelated sniper action game where you have to complete various missions in a blocky world. 
Game where you are a sniper who performs various missions in a block-based world.

title: Flag Puzzle Jam: Collect Flags
description: Immerse yourself in Flag Jam, a unique blend of puzzle-solving, flags collecting, and visual ASMR effects! Tap to match banner pieces, watch them glide smoothly into place, and clear the board as you complete each flag. With easy-to-learn mechanics and stunning visual effects, Flag Jam is the perfect game to help you unwind.

title: Cupid’s Story: Love Archer Bow
description: In Cupid's Story: Love Archer Bow, you play as a love archer armed with a trusty bow. Your mission is to shoot love arrows that connect hearts and spark romance. Aim carefully and watch as sparks fly and love blooms in the most unexpected places. Mix and match hearts to create unique and charming couples, from quirky characters to unlikely pairings. The possibilities are endless in this one-of-a-kind game.

title: Free Hoops
description: Welcome to Free Hoops, the ultimate puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving! Dive into a world of quirky challenges where your goal is to skillfully adjust iron bars and guide elastic bands into predetermined boxes. Once the bands are in place, use them to tie around objects and destroy them to advance to the next level.

title: Pew Pew Dose
description:
Build the weapon of your dreams and blast through hordes of cute… yet deadly zombie rascals!

Welcome to a bright and crazy post-apocalypse where only the most creative weapon makers survive. In this arcade 3D mayhem, you start with a simple gun… and end up wielding a monster built from multiple barrels twisted together into insane contraptions!

Craft without limits: attach barrel to barrel, add magazines, boost firepower, and create unique weapons that would make enemies run away…

title: Call of the Jungle! Animal Evolution
description:
Feel like the king of the jungle in this casual 3D runner about wild animals. Feed your hungry pet only the right food so that it develops. Collect crystals, level up your character and become the king of beasts in this free online game!

Dive into the exciting world of animals, where your pet will become a real king of beasts. In this exciting casual online game, you have to feed your animal so that it can grow and evolve. Go through exciting races and challenges in the wild jungle.

title: Spooky Chains
description: Spooky Chains is a fun Halloween puzzle game. Tap a tile and drag through matching nearby items to make a chain of 3 or more. The items vanish, and the tiles turn golden. Your goal is to turn all tiles golden. Sometimes a Flying Witch glides across the board. Tap her while she flies to watch a reward ad. After the ad, she blasts some tiles into golden. You can also watch a reward ad to remove the timer and play without time pressure.

title: Office Knight 3D: Castle Defense
description:
Office Warrior: Wield swords and axes as skillfully as a stapler!
Action Battles: Fight various enemies in dynamic 3D environments.
Progression System: Level up, improve health and damage right in the heat of battle.
Weapon & Upgrade Shop: Collect coins to buy hero upgrades and equip yourself.
Endless Challenge: Deflect waves of enemies and prove you are the ultimate defender!

title: Merge Pixel
description:
Attractive characters in dot, pixel style!
Combining the same characters creates a higher level of characters.
Repeat Merge to create a legendary character.

title: Hidden Kitty
description:
Hidden Kitty is an engaging and delightful hidden object game for kids, available for free! Step into a world of adventure as you help an old lady reunite with her beloved kitties, who are playfully hiding throughout the building.
Embark on a Kitty-Finding Adventure

title: Crash the Robot!
description:
An addictive physics puzzle game, the goal of which is to crash the robot on each level in all sorts of ways or give him the opportunity to do so himself. Arrange items from your inventory and trigger a chain of events to reach the goal! Also use cannons and jumppads.

The game has over 50 levels +5 bonus levels!

title: Fidget Trading Card Toy
description: Fidget Trading Card Toy is a fidget trading game that allows you to feel the fun of collecting toy cards! In the game, you will flip cards against opponents and even use the slap feature to set off a fierce trading duel! Your goal is to collect as many rare cards as possible, increase your card collection, and gain more advantages in trading!

title: Javelin Battle
description: Javelin Battle is a spear-throwing physics puzzle game with 2D stickman models. We need you to eliminate all incoming enemies at each level in the Normal Mode. When you destroy enemy infantry's shields, they will run to you quickly. I strongly suggest you destroy the enemy spearmen on the platforms first. Don't forget to choose skills to increase your abilities and power. Keep calm and aim carefully.

title: Bus Jam
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of "Bus Jam: Clear the Bus Stop," presented by Golden Guns Studio, a color sort puzzle, fun-packed game where your task is to skillfully bus match 3d passengers onboard onto buses of the same color. Imagine a busy Bus Jam stop with vibrant buses and puzzled passengers eager to board. Your mission? Ensure each person finds their way to the right bus, and brace yourself as the color puzzle master.

title: Royal Jewels Match
description: Matching jewels has never been so much fun! Unlock unique levels, participate in special events and take on surprising challenges. Collect coins with your matches and show off your decorating skills. Earn crowns as you progress and become a true master of the game!

title: Pesky Moles
description:
An ordinary farmer lived a quiet life and grew vegetables, but at some point, moles began to attack his garden and eat the entire crop.
After the next harvest, he decides to take everything into his own hands and protect his garden.
In Pesky Moles, you have to protect your garden from moles for a certain amount of time. The more pests you manage to neutralize and the more crops you save, the more coins you get. With the coins you earn, you can buy traps that will help you protect your garden.

title: Xmas Hexa Sort
description:
Xmas Hexa Sort is a festive twist on the classic hexagon puzzle!
Move and place colorful stacks of blocks on the board to create perfect combinations and clear space. Relax, think ahead, and enjoy the cozy holiday atmosphere as you solve each cheerful puzzle!

title: Solitaire Home Story
description: Solitaire Home Story is a puzzle card game where you play through multiple levels of the solitaire card game, which helps you unlock home renovations as you slowly unfold the dramatic story set in the town of Brook's End.How to Play Solitaire Home StoryYou play as Alice, who has just returned to her childhood home with her friend Tara, a few years after her mom passed away, only to find the place in terrible shape.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Bird Sort Challenges
description:
Bird Sort Challenges  is a fun and relaxing game where you sort colorful birds perched on branches, arranging them by matching colors.
Test your problem-solving skills as you strategize to ensure no branch overflows and complete each puzzle efficiently.
Whether you’re looking to unwind or sharpen your mind, Bird Sort: Color Sort Puzzle offers endless entertainment in a cheerful and visually pleasing world.
Good luck!

title: Black Pink Christmas Concert
description: If you’re a fan of Black Pink, the Black Pink Christmas Concert Dress Up game is perfect for you. This game lets you style the members of Black Pink for their exciting holiday concert. Whether you’re a Black Pink fan or love fashion, this game offers endless styling options. Celebrate the magic of Christmas while showing off your creativity.

title: Warping Bat
description: In Warping Bat you have to bounce from spring to spring in order to collect all of the coins in the level which will then open the exit gate. Face more than twenty levels, avoiding obstacles, and bouncing around each level! Try your best and see if you have what it takes to complete the game in its entirety!

title: Math Wall Simulator
description: Combine brainpower and action in this math-based Roblox adventure! Solve equations to break through walls, collect coins, and unlock new challenges. Progress through 20 classes of increasing difficulty, from basic arithmetic to extreme math puzzles

title: Egg Dash
description: Crack the code and dash your way to victory in Egg Dash, an egg-citing version of the rhythm-based game genre! Jump, dodge, and conquer egg-cellent obstacles in this fast-paced adventure.

title: Panda Dash Auto Shooting
description: Jump straight into explosive action with Panda Dash Auto Shooting! In this fast-paced side-scrolling shooting adventure, you guide a fearless panda warrior into chaotic arenas packed with endless zombie waves. Each battle throws you into intense combat where survival depends on positioning and strategy. Every round feels stronger, faster, and more thrilling than the last! Get ready, grab your gear, and dash into zombie chaos!

title: Shell Shockers
description: Shell Shockers (Shellshock.io) is a multiplayer .io FPS game featuring eggs armed with guns. You control one of these weapon-wielding eggs in one of four online game modes where the aim is to shatter your opponents with bullets and bombs.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Fish Out of Water!
description:
Dive into a thrilling adventure with Fish Out of Water, without ads or in-app purchases. A captivating game by Halfbrick Studios, the creators of Fruit Ninja and Jetpack Joyride. Launch a group of brave fish pals into the sky and over the ocean, helping them travel far and bounce as much as possible!

Experience remastered graphics and audio and enjoy a rebalanced crystal unlocking system for a more rewarding experience.

title: Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY
description: Welcome to Mobile Phone Case Design & DIY, the ultimate playground for those who love to personalize, design, and express their unique style!

title: Planet Demolish
description: Planet Demolish is a fun simulation game. The universe is a mysterious existence. In the distant outer space, there are many asteroids. They reflect the light of the sun and are the stars we see in the night. Humans have discovered and named Mars, Mercury, Venus, Jupiter, etc.

title: Cute Coloring Games
description: Cute Coloring Games is a fun drawing coloring game. Filled with fun, colorful and creative drawing tools, coloring games help kids of all ages have fun creating art. Follow the prompts will draw and finish coloring it! Don't forget to share the success with your friends!

title: Dolphin Dash
description: Launch your dolphin out of the water and smash through obstacles in this fast-paced underwater adventure. Collect coins, defeat bosses, and explore colorful ocean worlds full of surprises!

title: Road Of Fury 4
description: Road Of Fury 4 is a scroller shooter game set in a world of post-apocalypse. Team-up with other nomads, upgrade cars, guns and super-powers and use your skills to fight through 30 levels and 3 bosses.

title: PopSortica
description:
PopSortica is a new chapter in Poppy’s adventures! Join the underwater SORTING voyage! Challenging yet relaxing levels await as you sort things out.
The rules are simple, but the difficulty increases with each new level.
Special obstacles and conditions will challenge your skills, while boosters will help you achieve the best results faster.
Dive deep with Mermaid Poppy and challenge yourself in this exciting sea sorting adventure!

title: Hidden Object Adventure
description: Are you ready to solve puzzles and uncover hidden secrets? Become a detective in Find Hidden Object Game and test your observation skills! Explore detailed scenes in schools, houses, amusement parks, and zoos. Search for cleverly hidden items, challenge your brain, and enjoy fun, relaxing gameplay. Perfect for casual players and puzzle lovers alike. Train your mind and become the ultimate detective!

title: Ragdoll Arena 2 Player
description: Ragdoll Arena 2 Player consists of 14 super cool and challenging 2 player games. You can play these games in either 1 player or 2 player modes. Each game you will have a different goal but your main goal is to score three before your opponent. The games consist of fruit slicing, hammer challenge, chicken catching, rooftop shooting matches, and more. You can also customize your character from the shop. Earn coins from the matches and buy new costumes for your character.

title: Color Yarn Sort
description: Color Yarn Sort is a fun and relaxing puzzle game where you need to sort colorful spools of yarn into their matching buckets. The challenge? You have limited space to place the buckets, and you must think carefully about which bucket to move forward. Each yarn color must be placed in its corresponding bucket, but you can only move the buckets into the available spaces—there’s no room for error!

title: Spider Rope Hero City Fight
description: Protect the crime city by your extreme super powers. You will be a rope hero with ability of flying, crawling and spider. Now you have to eliminate the mafia. Your duty starts with the ultimate security of the president. The gangsters have kidnapped the state president, chased the gangsters and saved your president. Swing into action and unleash your superhero powers to save the city from chaos and destruction.

title: TicToc Braided Hairstyles
description: Do you want to get in on the coolest hairstyles out there? We've got a braided hair game that'll blow your mind. Meet our two main characters: Regina and Kiki. They're here to show you the hippest braids around—and Brian, the hairstylist who will create them, will tell you how it's done. Once you've got the perfect braid for your girl, customize it even more! And when you're done with the hair, dress your girl up in some cute clothes! This is your moment to shine, what are you waiting for?

title: Mr Long Hand
description: Immerse yourself in the quirky and delightful world of Mr Long Hand, where you take on the role of a stickman with incredibly long arms. Your mission is simple yet endlessly entertaining: use your elongated limbs to swing through obstacles, solve puzzles, and embark on thrilling rescues. Mr Long Hand offers a unique blend of creativity, challenge, and humor that is sure to captivate players of all ages.

title: Pet Salon
description: Take care of the cutest pets that you can bathe, and bring to the doctor! Pet Salon is very helpful for the daycare of your pet and have too much fun with this game.

title: BouncePop Quest
description: Guide Jumpo, a squishy and color-changing jelly creature, through over 150 vibrant levels filled with tricky obstacles, moving platforms, and environmental hazards. Charge and release powerful jumps to collect stars, dodge enemies, and unlock new worlds—from the icy peaks to fiery lava lands. Master timing, aim for achievements, and power up in this cute, bouncy adventure!

title: Spades
description: Have fun playing a classic internet Spades against 3 other opponents.  Release Date March 2019  Platform Web browser (desktop and mobile)
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: 67 Clicker
description:
Forget everything you know about gaming. Experience the absolute peak of interactive entertainment. It’s not just a number; it’s a lifestyle. Tap the 67 and watch your empire grow.

FULLY AUTOMATED STONKS: Buy upgrades to make the 67 click itself. It’s literally free real estate.

PEAK BRAIN ROT: No thoughts, just 67. The perfect idle experience for fans of "number go up" simulators.

title: Happy Brothers
description: The New Year has arrived, and the two siblings have decorated the house beautifully. The siblings are very happy, but they want to go outside. To leave the house, they need to find the key and the yellow diamond. If they find both and activate the portal, they can escape the house. The two siblings, wearing Christmas clothes, begin searching for the key inside the house. They also need to gather the gift boxes.

title: Capybara Coin Master
description:
Capybara Coin Master is a cozy yet addictive incremental tycoon clicker game where every flip counts!

Start small by buying your first coin and flipping it for income—heads mean profit! As your fortune grows, hire adorable Capybara Coin Masters to flip coins for you, even while you relax. 
Upgrade your coins to higher quality for bigger rewards, and unlock powerful Coin Mastery to boost your team’s flipping skills.

Flip. Upgrade. Profit. Rule the coin empire with your capybara crew!

title: GMOD Bombs
description:
Experience the power of a high-tech laser cannon in the GMOD Bombs! Collect bombs, create cities, and aim to destroy objects on the map and enjoy spectacular explosions.
GMOD Bombs is an exciting game where you take on the role of a bombardier armed with a futuristic laser cannon. Your task is to collect bombs and strategically destroy various objects and structures on the map. Each bomb has a unique flight trajectory and blast radius, which requires precision and aiming skills.

title: Slide Block Puzzle
description: Slide Block Puzzle is an addictive puzzle game. With no timer or pressure, every move is a calming and satisfying challenge for your brain. Solve color block puzzles, arrange blocks to escape from challenging boxes, a game that provides a fun and satisfying experience.

title: Happy Jump
description: Bounce into blissful heights with Happy Jump! Guide the cute chicken on its springy pogo to leap skyward amid lush trees and fun obstacles. Smash your personal best, snag stars, and chase trophies in this addictive, one-tap thrill. Endless jumps, soaring scores—pure joy awaits!

title: Flower Shop
description: Match 6 of the same flowers to ship them! You can place your flowers in any empty spot on the board. Place a flower next to a tray with the same kind to make them merge. When the right conditions are met, customers will come by to visit! Complete their requests to earn rewards. The game ends when there’s no more space left to place flowers.

title: Dice Puzzle
description: Dice Puzzle is a smart, satisfying merge game where you place numbered dice on a grid to combine matches and build higher values. Plan ahead, manage limited space, and handle dice that appear solo or in pairs. Every move matters—chain merges, grow your numbers, and test your strategy in this addictive dice challenge.

title: Hex Empire
description: Hex Empire is the action packed turn-based strategy game in which you will try and conquer all by domination of territory. You will start with a single nation, then your goal is to strategize and dominate the map by overruling countries attacking city by city with your armies and more importantly your winning tactics.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Animal Link
description: Animal Link is a puzzle game, the goal is to remove all the squares by eliminating the same pattern. The rules of the game are simple and require a certain amount of observation and quick reaction ability.

title: Skyscraper to the Sky
description: Challenge your skills as an engineer and architect in this  puzzle game. Build the tallest, most stable skyscraper across 30 levels, from small houses to huge buildings.

title: Jetstream Escape
description: Play Jetstream Escape free online and dive into a high-speed browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install required. This unblocked game loads fast and runs smoothly at school or home, making it perfect for quick breaks or long sessions. Race powerful boats, dodge coast guards, and outrun storms in this mobile-friendly arcade challenge. Designed for desktop and mobile players who love skill-based brain game style reflex tests, it’s a free online game built for pure,nonstop.

title: Meow Block: Color Collect!
description: A burst of color, clever thinking, and adorable cats await you in Meow Block: Color Collect! This charming puzzle experience turns simple movements into brain-teasing fun, where every swipe matters and every match brings you closer to victory.

title: COINs
description: A line of 10 coins with the same number changes to a coin with one higher number. Coins can be moved anywhere, even to empty lines or on coins with different numbers. You can add coins at any time. The game is cleared if you make a coin with the number 10! The faster the clear time, the higher the score.

title: Snow Road Puzzle
description: Play Snow Road Puzzle free online — an addictive browser puzzle game with no download, no install, and no login required. Slide icy tiles, create snowy roads, and solve fast-paced logic puzzle levels instantly. Perfect for fans of cool math games, unblocked games, and brain puzzle challenges at school or home. This free online puzzle game is mobile-friendly, fast-loading, and fully playable on desktop or phone. Enjoy endless winter logic puzzles and sharpen your brain anytime, anywhere.

title: Elemental DressUp Magic
description: Welcome to the fascinating world of natural elements and magic! The main characters of the game are already waiting for you - five beautiful girls representing various elements: fire, water, earth and air. The makeup and outfit of each of these girls is inspired by the element that she represents. The fifth heroine is special. This girl is an Avatar that combines all four elements!

title: Galaxy Clicker
description: Explore space in Galaxy Clicker, a free online game where you travel through galaxies with just a click. Play on your phone or computer and enjoy a relaxing space adventure that tests your strategy while keeping you entertained.

title: Marble Blast
description: Ready to match, blast, and conquer? This vibrant marble shooter game offers endless fun and challenges that test your skills and strategy. Clear colorful marbles, unlock powerful boosters, and prove you’re the master of marble puzzles! Whether you’re a casual gamer or a puzzle enthusiast, this game delivers excitement like no other.

title: Puzzle Blocks Asmr Match
description:
Puzzle Blocks ASMR Match is a block puzzle game that combines classics with innovation. It is different from the block jigsaw games and brick puzzle games you usually play. This game uses a
real physics engine. After the bottom blocks are eliminated, the upper bricks will automatically fall down, which makes the game more difficult. In the game, you cannot rotate the blocks to make
them fit more gaps, which means that you often only have one chance.

title: Energy Factory Idle
description: Energy Factory Idle is a relaxing idle factory game where you build and upgrade your own energy production system. Start with a small generator and turn it into a powerful factory by hiring workers, improving speed and output, and unlocking new generators. Your factory keeps working even while offline, letting you collect rewards and grow step by step. Simple controls, smooth progression, and a calm idle tycoon experience—perfect for short or long play sessions.

title: Funny Doctor Emergency
description: Do you want to be a doctor? In Funny Doctor Emergency, you treat patients in cute and funny emergencies. Patients come in many ages and situations. Every patient needs a different treatment. Choose the correct tool from the options to treat each problem. Follow simple steps to help patients recover and smile again. Watch them feel better after treatment. This game is playful and easy to enjoy.

title: Stick vs Monster School 2
description:
Stick vs Monster School 2 is now fighting zombies!

He's in for fights and epic battles in the world during the zombie apocalypse!

Game features:
- Make cool shot
- Buy guns
- Fight zombies and bosses!

Did you like the game "Stick vs Monster School 2"? - Then write a review and play all our games about stickmen.

title: Car Mechanic Simulator 2025
description:
In "Car Mechanic Simulator 2025", you are a master restorer who breathes new life into forgotten cars! 

Your task is to find old, broken, and abandoned cars, disassemble them down to the last screw, repair them, replace parts, and reassemble them, turning rusty piles of metal into shiny legends of the automotive industry. Search for rare spare parts, restore engines, choose the perfect paint, and bring every detail to perfection.

title: Dunk Challenge
description: Shoot and score with Dunk Challenge, a 2D basketball game that will make you bounce with joy. You will play as a basketball shooter. You will also enjoy a new explosive mode that adds more fun and challenge to your gameplay. You will tap the screen to shoot and use your 14 bullets wisely to make the ball rebound and land in the hoop. You will also collect purple diamonds and explore the store, where you can find 15 different ball skins to customize your game. Don’t miss this addictive game!

title: Drive Ahead Sports
description: Want to begin a pixelated sports showdown like no other? In Drive Ahead! Sports, you’ll be behind the wheel of amazing vehicles, engaging in exciting soccer matches! Enjoy the rush of driving and the fun of the game! Use your skills to kick the ball, attack the opponent's goal, and aim for victory!

title: Traffic Rider
description: Traffic Rider is a first-person driving bike endless game that puts you on a motorbike for an exhilarating ride. With a full career mode, lifelike bike sounds, and detailed graphics, it redefines arcade racing.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Sorting Xmas Balls
description:
Sorting Xmas Balls is a cozy winter puzzle game where you sort colorful Christmas ornaments into their correct tubes. Move the balls, group matching colors together, and enjoy calm, festive gameplay.

As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging with more tubes and more colors to organize. Bright graphics and a cheerful holiday theme make every level relaxing and satisfying to complete.

title: Merge Town!
description: Ever wanted to be Mayor? Ever wanted to run a town, develop the land, and see a metropolis grow? Well, look no further than Merge Town!, the newest title from Gram Games. The concept of the game is simple - you have a plot of land, and it’s your job to turn it into a town. Every so often, you’ll be gifted with a house. Each house can be merged with other houses of the same variety to form a bigger home.

title: Cube Drop Puzzle
description:
Colorful bears are waiting to splash water!

Welcome to Cube Drop Puzzle!

Are you ready to start puzzle solving? Play Cube Drop Puzzle now and make a splash!

title: Lode Retro Adventure
description: Relive the classic fun of Lode Retro Adventure, a 2D pixel game that will make you dig for gold. You will play as a gold miner who must collect a certain amount of gold coins in each level. You will use your shovel to break the ground tiles and trap the purple monsters, but be careful, they can escape and chase you. You will also find other treasures such as golden bananas that will boost your score. Lode Retro Adventure is a game that will test your strategy. Can you collect all the gold coins?

title: Mahjong build farm
description: A cozy blend of classic Mahjong and farm simulation! Start with a small green hill and turn it into a blooming farm by matching tiles and completing levels. The mechanics are simple and relaxing — find and match three identical picture tiles to clear the board. You'll have 90 unique levels with varying difficulty, from easy puzzles to real challenges for experienced players. If you get stuck, bonuses are always there to help.
