title: Galactic Golf Solitaire
description:
Enjoy a relaxing round of Golf Solitaire, a fun and easy-to-play card game. The goal is to clear the board by matching cards that are one rank higher or lower than the one on the discard pile. Don’t worry about suits—just focus on the numbers! If you’re stuck, you can draw from the deck to keep the game going. Play at your own pace and see how many rounds you can win.

Perfect for a quick break or to unwind at the end of the day!

title: Escape Tsunami for Brainrots!
description: Escape Tsunami for Brainrots is a multiplayer game where you race to collect Brainrots before a massive wave destroys you. Can you be quick enough?
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Planet Takeover
description: take command of your interstellar empire and set out to conquer the entire galaxy! Forge strategic alliances that can be either your greatest asset or, under the cover of darkness.

title: Funny Balls 2048
description: Funny Balls 2048 combines the 2048 genre with physics. Drop bouncing balls so that to collapse them with identical ones and get a ball of 2 times more value. The game has boosters that will make the game more exciting, as well as different ball skins.

title: Gas Station: Junkyard Tycoon
description: Build Your Dream Gas Station and Garage Tycoon Empire! Take charge in Gas Station Simulator Inc., the ultimate game for oil tycoon enthusiasts, idle games managers, and aspiring entrepreneurs! Manage, rebuild, and expand the gas station simulator, clean up your junkyard, and fix cars in this immersive and rewarding gas station simulator.

title: Battle Zone 2D
description: Immerse yourself in a dynamic 2D top-down shooter. Fight on a vast map, search for weapons, ammo, and gear to survive epic battles. Use strategy, cover, and tactics to become the last survivor. Simple controls, fast-paced matches, and thrilling gameplay make the game accessible to everyone. Test your skills, defeat enemies, and prove that you are the best fighter!

title: Solitaire Winter
description:
It’s cold outside and you’re snowed in with a game of Solitaire! Travel the icy land and rebuild 5 beautiful winter locations across 200 levels, plus unlock 18 bonus game variants like Klondike, Spider and Freecell!

Overcome obstacles like locks, frozen cards, chains, vines, and more to collect the bonus gems and coins in each level which you can spend in the shop for upgrades. 

Choose between multiple card decks, but don’t freeze up as you go for the elusive 3 stars on every level!

title: Tap Away Block Puzzle 3D
description: Challenge your mind with Tap Away Block Puzzle 3D! This relaxing logic game offers a satisfying brain teaser. Your mission: tap blocks to clear the screen. It's tricky blocks only move one way! Swipe to rotate the puzzle, find the right order, and watch them fly away. Puzzles get tougher as you go, perfect for training your brain. This free-to-play 3D puzzle is your ideal mental escape. Ready for the challenge? Start tapping now!

title: Striped Fruit - Watermelon Land
description:
Welcome to the enchanting world of Striped Fruit that full of strategy and fun. Here, you'll become a watermelon maker extraordinaire, mastering the art of fruit merge to create the juiciest combinations on the board. As a merge master, you'll tap, drop, and combine fruits in a strategic dance.

The challenge? To reach your way to the top, the first step is to merge 2 melons to create a watermelon - the King of Fruits. Can you merge 2 watermelons to smash them out? Let's check it out!

title: PolyTrack
description: PolyTrack is a classic car racing game with a slight twist. You race a car you've customized, on a track you might have designed yourself.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: ZombCopter
description: Enter the Zombcopter, a helicopter tricked out with more weapons than you can shake a rotting limb at. Your mission? Defend the last remaining intact City Hall from an endless horde of zombies. As the intrepid shooter in the Zombcopter, it's up to you to mow down waves of funny-looking zombies. You'll have plenty of zany upgrade choices to turn the tide of undead insanity in your favor. Get ready to laugh, shoot, and upgrade your way through the wackiest zombie apocalypse ever in Zombcopter.

title: Ludo Star
description: Enter the arena of strategy and chance! Choose your favorite mode, unlock stylish dice skins and climb the trophy road. Outsmart opponents, master your moves and prove you’ve got what it takes to rule the board and become a Ludo Star.

title: Destination Brain Test
description: Destination Brain Test is a great puzzle game to text your brain. You only need to drag to launch the ball to destroy all the blocks with various shapes. The farther you go, the more difficult levels you will meet. Luckily, you can try countless times in this game. So, try to challenge it now!

title: Marble Puzzle Quest
description: Marble Puzzle Quest is a fun and addictive casual puzzle game where your task is to sort colorful marbles into the correct slots. With each new level, the challenge grows — chains become longer and more colorful, while the space for moves gets tighter. Use logic, plan ahead, and clear the board! Watch out: the marbles fill four slots at the top, and only three of the same color will disappear. Place them incorrectly, and you lose the round.

title: Besties Chinese New Year Celebration
description: Besties Chinese New Year Celebration invites you into a joyful world of color, tradition, and friendship as you help best friends prepare for the Lunar New Year. Dress them up in beautiful traditional outfits, elegant modern looks, and festive accessories inspired by Chinese New Year celebrations.

title: Sword Play! Ninja Slice Runner
description:
Become a legendary kunai master in this thrilling combination of dynamic gameplay and classic ninja action. Play offline and enjoy the freedom to dive into the adventure whenever you want. Slice through foes, overcome obstacles, and set out on an epic ninja quest without boundaries.

Will you seize the blade and claim your place as the ultimate ninja warrior?

title: Food Card Sort
description: Food Card Sort is a unique and challenging 3D puzzle game that tests players' logic and reasoning skills. With a variety of food cards, each card displaying a different type of food, players must categorize them by placing similar foods together on the corresponding plate to pass each level.

title: Jump Up 3D: Basketball Game
description: Jump Up 3D is a sports basketball game where you shoot to get that slam dunk, but the one hitch is you're doing it by jumping on a trampoline. Not your ordinary basketball game, this one promises and delivers the excitement! Take aim, bounce on the trampoline, and score baskets before your opponent. With intuitive controls and addictive gameplay, it tests your precision and unleashes your inner dunk master.

title: 2048 Number Match
description: Indulge your brain and enjoy puzzle-solving and number-matching. Achieve the highest possible score and boast about your brain-power!

title: Merge Smith
description:
If you combine the same items, a higher level of items will be created.
Make legendary items and become the best blacksmith.

title: World War Brothers WW2
description:
⭐WORLD WAR BROTHERS⭐
World war brothers is a ww2 online first person shooter game. Play with your friends destroy enemy bases, capture the points. Traditional weapons, maps, and more will add soon. We need your feedbacks.
⭐ Features ⭐
- PvP multiplayer 8v8 Allies vs. Axis Teams
- Daily missions will come soon
- Omaha Beach, Pacific maps

title: Grass Defense
description: Grass Defense is a strategic tower defense where you must protect the wilderness from waves of fierce creatures. Build and upgrade powerful towers, manage resources, and adapt your tactics as enemies grow stronger. With dynamic environments, diverse foes, and challenging levels, you’ll test your strategy and skill to survive the untamed wilds and uncover hidden mysteries.

title: Sworded.io - Spin and Rub.
description: Test your skills in the game – an arcade simulator of sword fights! Fight waves of enemies, upgrade your character, unlock powerful weapons and magic spells. Demonstrate your tactics and reaction in dynamic battles!

title: Idle Inventor
description:
Grow your industrial powerhouse: become a heavy machine titan of industry!

Manufacture cars, trucks, planes, military vehicles, and high-tech instruments for space exploration!

Watch your factory grow from a single production line to a world-famous industrial powerhouse. And because you’re automating, your factory keeps working while you’re away - check in the morning,  it’s amazing to see how much money you made while sleeping

Try it now, and see how the idle tycoon life suits you!

title: Music Rush
description:
Music Rush is a 1-tap infinite and rhythmic runner where you play with iconic music stars and try to reach the highest stage in your career, while the song and the scenery evolve as you reach higher scores.

Try out 15 original songs and find out the genre you that fits you best!
- Electronic
- Rock
- Disco
- Pop
- K-Pop
- Classic
- Samba
- Latina
- Reggae
- Rap
- Medieval
- Dungeon
- Country

Try out amazing power-ups that affect your musical experience and much more!

title: Magic Solitaire
description: Welcome to the amazing magical world of solitaire! Here you can make yourself at home, playing layouts on a tavern table by the fireside, or in the shade of an oak tree by a majestic rushing waterfall. Your fairy helper will guide you through this magical world full of mystery and ancient secrets. Magic World Solitaire is the classic solitaire you love in an exciting new world.

title: Zen Tile
description: Are you a master player of matching games? Do you enjoy matching puzzle games? Come to challenge this addictive puzzle game: Zen Tile - Relaxing Match!

title: Word Cross
description:
Word Cross is an excellent way to loosen up and relax your mind.
Find as many hidden words as you can and improve your vocabulary everyday!

Word Cross combines classic crossword with a modern twist, offering hours of fun and brain-boosting challenges.

► Features:
     ◆ 6000+ challenging levels.
     ◆ Well designed grass & wooden theme.
     ◆ Dictionary: Expand your vocabulary!
     ◆ Hint and other boosters: magnifying glasses, firecrackers.
     ◆ No time limit, no pressure.

title: Hero Transform Run
description: Superheroes accumulate energy by constantly upgrading themselves, and at the end of the level they must quickly defeat different enemies. This is a casual combat parkour game!

title: JUMPER
description:
Bounce your way to record-breaking heights in JUMPER! Dodge epic traps, collect unique power-ups, and enjoy upgraded visuals as you climb higher and higher.

Unlock adorable skins and earn achievements as you master your jumps. Whether you're aiming for the top or just chilling, JUMPER offers a relaxing platform-hopping experience packed with charm.

title: SLIDE STONE
description: Horisontally slide the blocks and create a complete row across the board. Every time you slide a block and additional blocks are added from the bottom of the board. If you create multiple rows simultanepusly or create a row consecutively that becomes a COMBO! Good luck and let's aim for the high score!

title: Push The Colors
description: Push the Color game features colorful squares, obstacles, and color gates. It is a 2-player casual game where you can find various costumes during the adventure. The goal is to get the cubes to the finish line and challenge the giant at the end. The more cubes you have, the more power you will possess. You can defeat the color monster by having many cubes. Make wise choices along the way and increase the number of cubes in your possession.

title: Ragdoll Bounce
description: Jump into a fun 2D challenge where you control a ragdoll launched by a bigger ragdoll. Click to bounce on platforms and keep climbing. But be careful—missing a platform means a big fall!

title: Noob: parkour tricks
description:
Welcome to Noob: Parkour tricks!

This is a runner and timekiller in the minecraft universe about the adventures of Noob. Do parkour tricks and complete challenges.

Monster School kicked out Noob, and Herobrine turned him into a Gigachad!

Game Features:
- Run through the village with trials.
- Do parkour tricks.
- Complete challenges and avoid traps.
- Collect diamonds.
- Unlock new skins.

title: Highway Bus Rush
description: Welcome to the heart-pounding world of "Highway Bus Rush" – a game that propels you into an exhilarating journey along infinite highways. Brace yourself as you surge forward, navigating the ever-changing landscapes with precision and speed. The relentless pursuit of adrenaline awaits, as you weave through traffic and conquer challenging obstacles.

title: Frog.io
description: Frog io is a 2D PvP game where players control frogs battling for dominance. Use your frog's tongue to devour other players and grow bigger and stronger! As you explore the map, eat fruits and enemy frogs to boost your size and power. But beware other players are after you too! Outsmart them, grow massive, and become the top frog in this dynamic and competitive io game.

title: Connect Clues - The Missing Professor
description:
A tangled detective story is about to unfold.

Inspector Hale and Detective Crane are on the trail of a mysteriously vanished professor of history and archaeology — who also happens to be Crane’s old friend.
Professor Eldridge was always a touch eccentric, but disappearing without a word and leaving his office turned upside down was never part of his habits. He’s clearly in trouble — and in need of help.

title: Hidden Object: Clues and Mysteries
description: Hidden Object: Clues and Mysteries is a relaxing hidden object game set in cozy interiors. Solve mysteries with a detective, accompanied by soothing melodies.

title: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter
description: Doomsday Survival Rpg Shooter is a 2D side-scrolling survival RPG shooting game. Zombies occupy the whole city. You need to recruit the last survivors to fight against zombies for a living. As humans, you need weapons, ammo, food, and medicines. Send your teammates to dispatch different buildings, go to complete the tasks in this fallen town. Time is your life, get out of the safe house and find resources!

title: Nine Cards Of Winter
description:
Get into the holiday spirit with Nine Cards of Winter, a fun and relaxing tile-matching game!
Pick up to 9 Christmas tiles and match 3 of the same to clear them. Watch out — if your stack fills up, the game is over!
Use smart moves to uncover hidden tiles, solve tricky puzzles, and enjoy cute holiday designs.It’s easy to play, relaxing to enjoy, and full of winter charm!

title: Tap Away
description: Tap Away plays like a 3D block movement puzzle arcade game. Your mission is to launch all blue blocks out of the screen with their marked directions. Remember to rotate the whole combinations, you will find more available choices. I hope you will complete all levels and have fun!

title: Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY
description:
Style Anna’s outfits and bring her fairy tale story to life!

Anna's Story: Dress Up DIY takes you into a magical world of creativity and fashion! In this charming paper doll game, you’ll help Anna dress up for a variety of occasions, from costume parties and romantic dates to festive holidays like Halloween and Christmas.

title: Cat Life Simulator
description:
Experience what it's like to be a cat!
- explore open world
- hunt different animals
- complete quests for different animals and people
- upgrade your skills
- get rare things for your home
- collect food and cook food
- help your cat grow up and have a family
- raise children and make them stronger
- buy items for your home
- change the appearance of your cat and the appearance of your family members
- get rewards for your achievements
- the game supports various controllers and joysticks.

title: Survive The Night
description: Are you ready for the most terrifying night of your life? Survive The Night is an intense horror survival game where you’re trapped in a dark, creepy room with something lurking in the shadows. Choose between Normal Mode or Horror Mode to challenge yourself. In Normal Mode, you'll receive more hints, fewer rooms, and standard monsters.

title: Ping Pong Air
description: Table tennis, also known as ping pong, is an easy and enjoyable arcade game in which you control the bat as simply as in life: with the mouse or the movement of your finger. Several modes await you to suit every taste. In classic mode, you go through worlds, earn cups and unlock new opportunities. In Halloween mode, you have to banish spirits for a while, improving your reaction. In Career mode, you move up the tournament ladder, taking part in games against increasingly stronger opponents.

title: Drawer Sort
description: Do you like a cluttered space exactly where everything has its place? It is time to organize your life and become a tidying hero, conquering chaos one drawer at a time.  Be sure to plan ahead for this epic puzzle or you may find yourself with a messier hand than when you started! Each brain training task will challenge you to place various items in the right places. You'll have to aim for perfect precision if you want to make sure the objects fit snugly and achieve the ultimate tidy victory.

title: Stardom Alt-Girls Fashion Duel
description: Welcome to the world of daring alternative glamour! Meet two star heroines - Sydney and Sabrina. Help them go beyond the usual and try on the most daring alternative images: from a gentle soft-grunge princess to a gloomy rock diva. In the game, you can make bright makeup with arrows and sparkles; create unusual hairstyles; collect memorable outfits from tops, corsets, mini skirts and oversized jackets. Create your own collection of stunning Alt-girl looks!

title: Liquid Sort Deluxe
description: Liquid Sort Deluxe is a relaxing and addictive color sorting puzzle game where you sort colorful liquids into tubes until each tube contains only one color. Plan your moves carefully and challenge your brain with unlimited levels. Unlock an extra tube by watching a short reward ad to make the puzzle easier, or get unlimited time to complete tricky levels.

title: Paint It
description: An exciting coloring book in which you have to compete in speed with other players! A bright coloring puzzle will make you use your brain and spend time with pleasure!

title: Tiny Farm
description:
Tiny Farm is a small, cozy farming game where everything grows at your pace.

Harvest crops, collect goods from animals, and slowly upgrade your farm into something wonderful. Each upgrade brings visible progress, and each world unlocks exciting new possibilities.

Sit back, relax, and watch your tiny farm flourish.

title: Animal Blocks
description: Enter the colorful and cheerful world of Animal Blocks, where adorable creatures bring classic block puzzles to life. Match three or more of the same animal blocks to clear the board, earn points, and climb to higher scores. Simple to play yet full of fun challenges, this free online game is perfect for both mobile and desktop players who enjoy relaxing, strategic gameplay and charming visuals.

title: Capybara Block Blast
description: Capybara Block Blast is a cozy puzzle game where you blast blocks alongside the world’s chillest animal, the capybara! Match colorful block shapes, clear lines, and rack up points while enjoying adorable animations and relaxing vibes. Whether you’re chasing a high score or just unwinding, this game offers the perfect mix of challenge and comfort.

title: Office Spider Solitaire
description: Your objective in Office Spider Solitaire is to clear the table by creating suited sets from king to ace. The game has either one, two or four suits depending on the difficulty setting.

title: Clean The Ocean
description: Pick up waste, clean up oil spills and heal the oceans bit by bit! Venture out on your own boat, clear out parts of the sea and make sure you recycle everything properly. This game is the perfect way to teach kids about ecology and recycling, or just to pass the time in a mindful way. Level up the ship and leave a lasting legacy on planet Earth.

title: Tricky Life
description:
Welcome to Tricky Life, the funniest brain test puzzle game ever made!
Here, logic meets laughter every level is designed to make you giggle, think twice, and smile when you finally find the answer.

title: Bubble Up
description:
Help BUB, a tiny bubble, fulfill its dream of reaching the blazing sun. Use his bubble friends, BLE, to push BUB past obstacles, rise from the ground to towering buildings, and conquer the skies!

You only need to shoot out BLE by click left mouse, good luck!

title: Hair Stack 3D
description: Hair Stack 3D is a hair running game. Go through the numbered doors and collect more hair. Dodge the obstacles that make you less in number. Your ultimate goal is to make more hair so that the bald head at the end can have beautiful hair! Are you ready to help him? Let him applaud you!

title: Super Soccer Noggins
description: Select your preferred nation and guide them to triumph in the wildest soccer competitions. Experience 10 unique powerups and numerous diverse fields, each adding a distinct, whimsical touch to every game. Can you conquer all 6 trophies in this exhilarating soccer adventure?

title: CS: Upgrade Gun
description: The weapon is alive and ready to go hunting! In this fast-paced launcher, you control a cannon that runs itself and shoots at targets. Collect boosters, improve their performance and last as long as possible. The further you go, the more action and explosions!

title: Brain Test: One Line Draw Puzzle
description: In this engaging one-line puzzle game, challenge your brain by drawing shapes in a single stroke without lifting your finger. Each level presents a unique shape that must be drawn in one continuous line, testing your logic and creativity. With increasing difficulty, you’ll need to plan your moves carefully to solve each puzzle. Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers hours of fun while improving problem-solving skills. Can you master the art of drawing each shape in one go?

title: Monster High Spooky Fashion
description: In Monster High Spooky Fashion, step into the world of ghouls and ghosts as you style your favorite Monster High characters! Choose spooky outfits, eerie accessories, and haunting makeup to create the ultimate creepy-cool look. Mix and match from a wide range of outfits to give each character a unique spooky style perfect for any Monster High event. Whether it’s for a Halloween party or a night out in the graveyard, bring out your inner fashionista with Halloween Spooky Fashion!

title: Stand on the Right Color, Robby!
description: “Stand on the Right Color, Robby!” is a fast arcade race on shifting colored tiles. React to color changes, jump from tile to tile, and stay on the right color to avoid falling. Beat rivals to the finish, earn currency, and unlock fun Robby skins, items, and effects as you climb the leaderboard!

title: Cake Link Master
description: Cake Link Master is a fun puzzle game where you tap two matching cakes to connect them with a line. The line can turn up to two times but cannot go over other tiles. The game has 120 challenging levels, and the difficulty grows as you play. Clear the cakes, solve the puzzles, and enjoy hours of sweet, relaxing fun!

title: Robberies 3D
description:
Welcome to Robberies 3D, a fast-paced online shooter where you can don the mask of a real robber! Inspired by the legendary PAYDAY series, this game offers exciting gameplay: search for keys, break into vaults, use a drill, and steal whatever you can get your hands on.
Choose your style: engage in a loud battle with the police or operate stealthily like a shadow. But don't think it will be easy: each level is a test of your agility, strategy, and nerves.

title: Rummy 500 Card Game
description:
Features :
- Offline game.
- 3 Super Modes: classic mode, 3 player mode and Speed mode.
- Auto arrange the cards
- Game statistics.
- Easy to play 
- Excellent and fair ai to play with.
- Continue the last game from where you left.
- No login required

title: Zombie Road: Shooter with Destruction
description: Grandpa is eager for adventure again! Survive in a harsh zombie world. This time, Grandpa has to save the world from evil zombies. Zombies can drive and shoot! And Grandpa can destroy evil spirits! Fight the most dangerous mutants. Buy cool guns, find unique attachments, assemble your own unique gun and go into battle! Many locations, go through the whole world, from hot deserts to sea battles!

title: Clash & Run
description: One chance, no turning back. Speed is your only ally in a world that won’t wait. Race through ever-shifting terrain where every jump could be your last. Collect coins and unlock unique looks. Precision and quick thinking will keep you in the game longer.

title: Dragon Draw Joust
description: Prepare for a wildly creative showdown in Dragon Draw Joust, where your imagination becomes your strongest weapon! Instead of choosing gear from a menu, you must draw your own tools to defend your warrior and survive intense combat challenges. Every match feels fresh because your strategy starts with your creativity. Your creation instantly becomes part of your character, helping you block attacks or strike opponents inside the chaotic battle arena.

title: Traffic Run Puzzle
description: Traffic Run Puzzle is a popular car merge and racing simulator game. All Players can enjoy this game free online. Buy cars to merge, high-level cars can earn more money. Take it to the road to race, and watch out for other cars. Classic game-playing mode and car-driving content. Dear traffic cop, come to help them get through the intersection!

title: Farm Mahjong 3D
description: Have you ever imagined playing your favorite 3D mahjong game in a farm setting? Mahjong 3D Farm does just that! It brings the popular Mahjong 3D game into the charming world of farms, filled with adorable animals, crops, and farming tools for you to match! So why wait? Play Mahjong 3D Farm Connect now and solve the puzzle amidst the fields!

title: Merge Christmas
description: Merge Christmas is a festive puzzle game where you combine matching snowballs to create new character / bigger snowballs, and unlock a cozy Christmas world. Relax and merge Christmas-themed snowballs in a cheerful winter atmosphere perfect for the holiday season.

title: City Gas Station Simulator
description: Ever dreamed of running a bustling gas station? City Gas Station Simulator lets you experience the thrill of managing every detail of your very own station in a fun 3D casual simulator! From fueling cars to running a mini shop, every choice is yours to make. Fun and addictive casual management gameplay. Mix shopping and service for maximum efficiency.

title: Pim Path
description:
Reach the trophy at the end of the level to win, but it's not as easy as it might seem. You can't fall off the platforms; spikes and blades will be everywhere, making the levels more challenging. One wrong step and it's game over.
You'll need to stay calm, pay attention, be agile, have good reflexes, and most importantly, don't get angry.

title: Cooking Festival
description: Cooking Festival is a delicious management sim that will let you bake, fry and grill around the world! Become the master chef the cooking world has been waiting for and whip up some homemade pancakes, grill juicy ribs, bake aromatic original Italian pizzas, and serve delicious ice cream that everyone loves!

title: Magic Bubbles
description: Quick games, satisfying pops and constant rewards — what’s not to love? Enjoy a bubble shooter built for endless play, with weekly bonuses, boosters that change the game and the Lucky Wheel for a little extra fun. There’s always something new to pop.

title: Gold Miner Classic
description: Jump into the most classic gold mining adventure ever! Gold Miner Classic brings you all the excitement of being a real gold miner. Feel into the perfect casual relaxation experience. Your mission is simple but incredibly satisfying.

title: Broken City Combat
description: Immerse yourself in the chaotic battleground of Broken City Combat, a fast-paced FPS set in a desolate urban warzone. As the city crumbles under relentless attacks, you are tasked with surviving the brutal onslaught while rescuing survivors and taking down ruthless enemies. Navigate through abandoned streets, derelict buildings, and multi-floor complexes, each filled with challenges and surprises.

title: Ball Sort
description: Ball Sort is a fun and addictive puzzle game where you sort colorful balls into tubes – can you solve the puzzle with fewer moves?

title: Gravity Matcher
description: In Gravity Matcher, you’ll launch circles of various sizes and types into a dynamic gravity field. Your goal? Match identical circles by carefully aiming and timing your throws. But beware – gravity is unpredictable, and the slightest miscalculation can send your circles spiraling out of control!

title: Fashion Heroes Academy
description: Welcome to the Academy of Fashion Heroines, a place where style and superpowers go hand in hand! Three brave girls entered the academy in order not only to reveal their abilities, but also to create their own unique image. And you will help them in this. Choose outfits for studying, training and super battles. Experiment with makeup and accessories. Let each schoolgirl become a superhero and a style icon at the same time!

title: Interior Designer - Decor Life
description: Interior Designer: Unpacking House is a delightful and relaxing casual game that allows you to explore your creativity through interior design. Whether you’re tackling specific challenges or letting your imagination run wild, this game offers an immersive experience where you can design beautiful spaces and create captivating aesthetics.

title: Fashion Princess Dress Up
description: Fashion Princess: Dress Up is a casual game. With beautiful animations and sound effects, this game is sure to keep you hooked. Swipe left and right to control the character and choose the corresponding dress up according to the task to show off your matching trendy outfits, hairstyles, and make-up, you need to consider the theme of the fashion show, and the judge's preference. If your score is higher, you will win the battle and become the ultimate fashionista.

title: Word Rivers
description: Play Word Rivers - an exciting word game where you can enjoy a sea of words and fantastic crosswords. Find words from letters and discover the wonders of the world and words right now!

title: Mahjong Earth
description: Immerse yourself in the serene beauty of Mahjong Earth! This captivating game offers a tranquil escape with its soothing earth-themed soundtrack and stunning tile designs. Explore over 250+ unique puzzle layouts, each more challenging than the last. Use the Combo meter to match quickly and earn stars. Climb the leaderboard for recognition and claim boosters by reaching the top. Immerse in the relaxing soundtrack and earthy tiles for a truly calming experience!

title: Mr. Macagi Adventures
description:
Embark on a daring expedition through the whimsical landscapes of Mr. Macagi's Adventure! 

Guide Mr. Macagi through perilous terrains, braving cunning monsters. With 4 stages set amidst the dense foliage of the forest and 4 in the unforgiving heat of the desert, prepare for a test of skill and strategy.

Can you help Mr. Macagi collect apples and gold coins, and outsmart the cunning monsters that inhabit them? Explore, strategize, and conquer in this thrilling platformer adventure!

title: Jigsolitaire
description: Step into a peaceful world of beautiful images made from gentle, carefully crafted blocks. Jigsolitaire is a game you’ll want to return to every day: it helps you unwind, disconnect from stress, and enjoy a small moment of calm just for yourself. Each level reveals a new scene - warm landscapes, charming cottages, delicate nature details, and quiet corners you’ll love exploring piece by piece.

title: Seat Jam 3D
description:
Seat Jam 3D is surely an entertaining puzzle game in which you place the passengers in the correct seats. You simply need to click on the passenger and then click on the correct seat. The first few
levels are very simple, but before long, you'll have to think long and hard before you can put all the passengers in the right seats. Solve the bus rush. They can move
up and down, left and right, but not diagonally. Train your brain with engaging puzzles in Seat Jam 3D. Come and join the game!

title: Strategy of war. Tanks and helicopters.
description:
"Strategy of war" is an exciting strategy war game where the player has to control squads of tanks and helicopters, develop his base, choose battle tactics and fight the enemy.

The game offers a wide range of equipment and weapons, a variety of missions and tasks, as well as the opportunity to improve and develop their forces. It is important to properly allocate resources, as well as use tactical techniques to defeat the enemy.

title: My Happy farm
description: Welcome to farm land game – the ultimate farming adventure that brings the beauty of rural life, the challenge of resource management, and the excitement of running your very own farm straight to your browser. The game is not just about clicking and waiting; it’s about strategy, timing, and smart decisions. Do you invest in farms first or focus on crops? Should you expand your land or upgrade your equipment? Every choice matters.

title: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game
description: Find & Steal Brainrot: 67 Game is a chaotic puzzle hunt where you track a target brainrot through surreal, meme-soaked worlds. Each level pushes you to spot the same creature across dense, absurd scenes packed with icons like 67, Strawberry Elephant, Dragon Cannelloni, Spaghetti Tualetti, and La Supreme Combinasion. Fast-paced scanning, wild details, and pure internet nonsense create a frantic, high-energy experience for fans of intense spotting and brainrot chaos.

title: Sakura Branch
description:
The "Sakura Branch" is an interesting and beautiful puzzle game.

In the game you have pieces of a dry branch of a beautiful tree.
Turn them around and put them together.
If you combine all the pieces, life will return to the branch and it will delight you with beautiful flowers!
If you are new, you can play on a very small field on which there will be very little branches.
But if you feel strong enough, you can collect a whole tree on a huge field!

title: Doodle Football
description: Doodle Football is an imaginative and captivating 2D casual game that combines creativity, strategy, and fun. Your goal is simple: guide the football into the goal while overcoming exciting challenges across a variety of themes like the lush greenery of fields, the scorching sands of the desert, and the frosty landscapes of ice.

title: King Of The Hill
description: Exciting pixel races to the top of the mountain! Choose a bright car, avoid all obstacles and reach the top of the mountain in one piece! Compete with other players and become the King of the Mountain!

title: Miniblox
description: Miniblox is an online game featuring voxelated graphics and a diverse selection of minigames. Explore endless possibilities as you delve into a vibrant world of creativity and competition.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Robot Terminator T Rex
description: Ready for an adventure in Robot Terminator T-Rex! Enter the wonderful world where robot dinosaurs and zombies collide in a nervous battle. You'll control a terrifying robotic T-Rex, equipped with powerful weapons and amazing abilities.

title: Car Fighter
description: Get ready for an intense crash battle! Build and customize your tiny vehicles with sharp weapons to defeat opponents. Strategize by choosing the right wheels and weapons. In each round, make precise moves to outmaneuver your rival—smash their vehicle to advance. Keep battling until you lose, then restart and upgrade your weapons using collected coins. The stronger you get, the more challenges you conquer. Let the crash war begin!

title: Number Tricky Puzzles
description: Thanks for visiting Number Tricky Puzzles, an addictive casual puzzle game. Your goal is to categorize identical coins into a slot and then click the merge button to combine them into higher-level coins. Keep merging coins and trying to evolve to see if you can reach the coveted level 10! You can challenge yourself to become the master of coin evolution! Beautiful graphics and animations bring you more fun.

title: One Line Drawing
description: Welcome to One Line Drawing, a game that brings together a variety of line drawing gameplays. You can relax through relaxing line drawing gameplay, or challenge yourself through puzzle-type line drawing gameplay.

title: DON'T PANIC DUDE!
description:
Meet DUDE, a sassy AI who thinks you can't beat his game! Trapped in his chaotic simulation, your goal is simple: Jump, avoid deadly spikes, and survive to prove him wrong.

Features:

Fast-paced endless jumping action.

Unlock 40 unique and funny heroes.

Hilarious AI commentary and memes.

Increasing speed and difficulty.

Can you handle the chaos? Don't panic, just jump!

title: The Shape
description: "The Shape" is an online geometrical puzzle game where players create figures based on given references. This fun, educational experience is suitable for all ages, featuring a seamless, gesture-based user interface.

title: Horror Minecraft Partytime
description: Horror Minecraft Partytime is a spooky and interesting horror survival game. This time you will enter a familiar world of blocks. In this hide-and-seek mode, you will be the pursuer, looking for every corner. Find the weirdo in disguise and catch him.

title: MMA Super Fight
description: The crowd is roaring, the spotlight is on you. From rookie to legend — face endless fights, unlock unique fighters and upgrade power, defense, health and regeneration. With every match, the pressure rises. The ring never sleeps and neither can you.

title: Monster Arena
description: Be the longest monster ever! Beat out your rival monsters by eating fruits and grows. This snake io game let you roam free, grow large, and finish your enemies by making them crash into you. Be the king of the island!

title: Sausage Flip Free
description: In Sausage Flip Free, you're not just any sausage. You’re a daring, bouncy hero on a mission to overcome wild levels full of danger, timing, and precision! This action, casual game blends goofy fun with real skill challenges! Tap to launch your sausage with a perfect flip! Launch the sausage on the vine and keep moving to the next pot or shelf, etc. Use your perfect skills to master each tricky obstacle. Cross the finish line to win.

title: Back 2 School Makeover
description: Embrace the nostalgia and dive into our Back 2 School Makeover game, where you can fashionably express yourself, experiment with stunning looks, and relish into the feeling of heading back to school with style! Embark on a fabulous journey with our character, Amelia, as she transforms from an edgy e-girl to a chic, school-ready fashionista. Revamp her entire look starting with a haircare routine and a new haircut, a complete skincare routine, and a new, school makeup.

title: Obby vs Zombies
description: Obby vs Zombies is an innovative, fun-filled action game that captivated the gaming world. It challenges players to create mazes of different characters to fend off hordes of incoming zombies. The wide variety of options for attack and defense make this a highly strategic game with lots of replay value.

title: Magic Forest - Merge the Secrets
description:
The Magic Forest is full of amazing little places!
Do you want to take a walk here?
Then hurry and start your journey!
And to make it even more fun, you’ll have company - Masha, a young girl who loves discovering new and mysterious things.
Even if it sometimes means sneaking away from Grandma and missing lunch.

title: Cube Combo
description: CubeCombo is a casual puzzle game. In this game, players need to use their wits by moving blocks with numbers, and merge the same blocks together until only one block is left, to complete the challenge. When only one number block is left in the panel or the target number block is synthesized, the current level is passed and a new level is opened.

title: Coin Blitz
description: Fast-paced coin shooting action! Destroy waves of enemies, collect tons of coins, and grow stronger as you play. Drag and position your shooter strategically while watching satisfying coin explosions and smooth gameplay. Simple to start, hard to master — how long can you survive?

title: Bloons Tower Defense 4
description: Bloons Tower Defense 4, aka BTD 4, is a classic tower defense game initially released in Flash. Defend the path by avoiding Bloons from reaching the end.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Ultimate Tower Defense
description: Ultimate Tower Defense is an exciting strategy game that perfectly blends tower defense, battle, and fast-paced action into one addictive experience. In the game, you must carefully protect defense towers and deploy powerful heroes to stop endless waves of enemies. Each tower has unique attack abilities. Select your preferred mode to begin the challenge.

title: Counter Craft Sniper
description: Counter Craft Sniper is a first-person shooter where you step into the boots of an elite sniper sent to protect a city invaded by Minecraft mobs. Creepers, skeletons, and zombies have appeared in the middle of downtown, and only your precision and quick reflexes can stop them before the chaos spreads. Armed with your trusty sniper rifle, you must take position on rooftops and high vantage points to eliminate every hostile target that threatens the civilians below.

title: Perfect Piano Magic
description: Perfect Piano Magic is a fun casual game. If you are a big fan of Piano Magic games, then this is a game you can't afford to miss! The gameplay of this game is extremely similar to Piano Magic, you need to shoot the blocks with a gun to capture the beat. You have three chances per game, start now and feel the real music when you click the blocks, enjoy the beats, and get ready to experience the delightful music and become a rhythm master!

title: 1945 Air Force Airplane
description: Welcome to the 1945 Air Force: Airplane! Begin intense shooting battles in the sky as you engage in nervous fighting action. Upgrade your plane, defeat enemies, and enter epic aerial battles.Every victory brings you closer to becoming the ultimate air force commander.

title: Obby: Tsunami Escape +1 by Car
description:
A giant tsunami is approaching - and only you can outrun it! Dodge the waves, upgrade your car, and race to the finish line. The faster you get, the further you can go.

Buy new cars - each one gives you more speed, control, and capabilities.
Upgrade your vehicles to survive the most challenging races.
Defeat brainrots - from common to rare and legendary ones.
Practice, improve your reactions, and find the perfect strategy.

title: Brainrot Cleaning
description: Welcome to Brainrot Cleaning, the weirdly satisfying cleaning simulation that turns chaos into calm. In this fun and quirky casual game, your job is to scrub away the mess caused by the wild world of brainrot characters and their hilarious antics! In the Cleaning Italian Brainrot or the Underwater mode, you will finish various cleaning tasks.

title: What a walk
description: Whatawalk! silly walking with wobbly legsWhatawalk! is a highly addictive classical game. Even if you've never heard of it before, play it just once and you'll be hooked.

title: Hexa Tile Master
description: Welcome to Hexa Tile Master! Drag stacks of hex tiles from the bottom of your screen to empty spots on the board. Watch as similar tiles merge into bigger stacks, and collect stacks of 10 or more matching tiles to clear them. Your goal is to clear all the hex tiles before time runs out. Each level gets more challenging, but don't worry—fun animations and exciting rewards will keep you engaged. Enjoy the strategic fun and see how far you can go!

title: Little Dentist Dash
description: Little Dental Dash is a charming clinic management where you step into the role of a friendly dentist helping kids with their dental problems. From fixing chipped teeth to carefully placing braces, each patient brings a new challenge that tests your speed and attention to detail. Treat your young patients, keep them smiling, and earn rewards for your excellent work.

title: Block Cut Cleaner
description: An original block puzzle where the field is filled with triangle blocks! Pull out your shapes and place them on the field to clear at 100%. But be careful: each piece you place can create new blocks! Use smart boosters to turn the tide: refresh your inventory, remove three random triangles or place a "clean" square that doesn't leave blocks behind. Plan your strategy to clear the board completely!

title: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival
description: Woods of Nevia: Forest Survival is a one-tap action adventure where you battle and survive in the wild. Wield your axe to fend off wolves, chop wood, and build shelter as you explore for resources and hidden chests. Level up, choose upgrades, and outlast growing dangers while managing hunger and health in this engaging forest challenge.

title: BuildNow GG
description: The official web location for BuildNow GG, an online build-and-shoot game featuring various game modes, weapons, and maps.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Coin Color Sort
description: Dive into the colorful world of Coin Color Sort, an addictive online puzzle game that puts your sorting skills to the test. Arrange and match coins by color to create perfect stacks and clear each level. With its relaxing yet challenging gameplay, this free game offers endless fun and mental exercise. Play anytime on your computer or phone and see how far your logic can take you!

title: Mini Obby War Game
description:
Manage your little character and see him through the never-ending conflict in Mini Obby War Game, an action-packed 3D game set in a Roblox environment.

With over ten unique and challenging levels, this amazing game is within your reach. Keep sprinting to avoid being caught by the waves of enemy troops who will shoot you if they see you, and aim and fire at all adversaries.

As you defeat enemies, you'll find coins that may be used to unlock additional characters with unique abilities.

title: Pick Brainrot: 3D Battle
description: Choose one of two Brainrots, transform into them, and engage in intense battles with other players. Defeat opponents and unlock new abilities: a Brainrot morph, unique weapons, and powerful abilities. Every battle is a chance to prove yourself! At level 5, you'll unlock a protective shield, and at level 10, you'll unlock slow-motion , which will give you a huge advantage in battle. Earn titles for your victories, from "Noob" to a true "Pro"!

title: Cocktailz
description: Thirsty? Make all sorts of cocktails in this refreshing Match-3 game! Excessive alcohol consumption is harmful to health, but you can play this game without moderation.

title: Cake Merge
description: Cake Merge is a bright and relaxing puzzle game where you build whole cakes from colorful slices. Clear the tray, trigger satisfying chain reactions, and unlock new desserts as you play. With smooth animations, cute visuals, and easy-to-learn gameplay, Cake Merge is perfect for fans of casual merge, sorting, and matching games. Earn points, level up, and enjoy the sweetest merges!

title: Pato Vs Cops
description: lay Pato Vs Cops — the ultimate free browser police chase game! No download needed — jump into nonstop car chases, dodge roadblocks, and outdrive relentless cops in fast-paced arcade action. Perfect for fans of unblocked racing games, endless car chase games, and online driving challenges. Show off your reflexes, collect power-ups, and see how long you can survive the heat in this thrilling high-speed pursuit!

title: Over the Rainbow
description: Help Alex the Elf return the colors to the rainbow by jumping. Avoid enemies and find power ups to aid you in your quest.

title: Minicraft Winterblock
description: Winter has arrived, and everything is covered in snow. In the snow-covered forest, you must be very careful to survive. You need to find two chests and collect all the snowballs. But be cautious, there are monsters everywhere waiting to eat you. You must defeat the monsters and reach the hidden portal at the end of the level. You must leave the house safely and pass through the portal.

title: Dino Idle Park
description: Dino Idle Park is a relaxing leisure real estate tycoon where you create and develop a dinosaur amusement park. Expand plots, release and display dinosaurs, optimize queues and parks, hire staff, and upgrade investments to increase funds and income. Balance safety, visitor happiness, and research to keep the park thriving even when youre away.

title: Winter Maze
description:
Step into a frosty puzzle adventure with Winter Maze! Explore icy, snow-covered mazes and guide your ball through slippery, twisty paths that fill up with every move. Each level challenges you to think ahead, plan your route and clear the entire field to unlock the next stage.
Simply swipe to roll the ball in any direction and watch the maze come to life beneath you. Your goal is clear: cover every tile and leave no space untouched.

title: Moto Cabbie Simulator
description: Welcome to Moto Cabbie Simulator, where the thrill of the open road meets the fast-paced world of urban transportation! In this exhilarating and immersive gaming experience, players take on the role of a daring motorcycle taxi rider navigating the bustling streets of a vibrant city.

title: Hexa Sort
description: Hexa Sort is an addictive puzzle-sorting game that combines strategic matching and merging challenges. In this brain teaser, you will get to shuffle, stack, and strategize to create satisfying color matches.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Police Station
description: As the head of multiple police precincts, your mission is to boost the security rating in the district under your watchful eye. Begin your adventure by managing a modest police department, strategically hiring officers, and putting in the effort to cultivate a safer community

title: Excavator Simulator 3D
description: Drive and operate realistic 3D construction vehicles in Excavator Simulator 3D. You can choose from different trucks, excavators, and Pincer Jaws to complete various missions and tasks. Whether you need to dig, clamp, lift, hammer, or forklift, you can switch the attachments easily and quickly. Learn how to control these powerful machines and enjoy the realistic physics and graphics. Complete the levels faster and earn more money to buy more vehicles and unlock new challenges. Have fun!

title: Pet Me Maze
description:
Welcome to Pet Me Maze, the most hilarious and addictive maze puzzle game that combines humor, challenge, and adorable pets
Are you ready to test your wits and reflexes in a maze full of surprises, traps, and funny moments

title: Draw To Fly
description: Ready for a game that’s as creative as it is challenging? Draw Fly brings your imagination to life, turning simple drawings into pathways to solve puzzles and conquer obstacles. Whether you’re flying past traps or dodging tricky obstacles, this puzzle game will keep you entertained for hours.

title: Ammo Rush Master
description:
Get ready to run, multiply, and blast your way to victory in Ammo Rush Master!
Dodge obstacles, choose the right gates, and build the biggest Ammo army of bullets. Then, grab your blaster and unleash a storm of foam darts to smash through targets, enemies, and bosses!

title: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle
description: Color Nuts & Bolts Puzzle is a fun and engaging puzzle game that challenges your spatial imagination and color-matching skills! Match colorful screws to their corresponding nuts and watch as your puzzle-solving skills bring vibrant images to life. Perfect for players of all ages, this game offers hours of brain-teasing fun with a visually satisfying reward at the end of each challenge. Test your logic, precision, and creativity in this unique puzzle-solving adventure!

title: Murder Mystery
description: Murder Mystery – A fast-paced social deduction game. One player is the killer, another the sheriff, the rest are innocents. Use logic, stealth, and quick decisions to survive or expose the murderer. Perfect for high engagement and multiplayer retention.

title: Nuwpy's Adventure
description:
Nuwpy’s Adventure is a classic pixel-art platformer inspired by retro arcade games!
Help Nuwpy explore colorful worlds, collect coins, jump over enemies, and avoid traps.
Each level offers new challenges, hidden secrets, and a fast-paced journey full of charm and nostalgia.
Dive into the pixel world and enjoy simple yet addictive gameplay!

title: THE KULKA
description:
THE KULKA is a one-button bullet-heaven arcade game where your single shot evolves into chaos. Inspired by Flappy Birds, Vampire Survivor and Pattern Survivors: Bullet Hell. 

MUTATE YOUR BULLET. FLAP, EVOLVE, SURVIVE.

title: TRIVIA NATION
description:
Test your knowledge with quick and fun trivia questions!

Play through multiple categories including sports, movies, history, science, and more.
Challenge yourself in fast-paced quiz rounds and improve your brain skills.

Perfect for all ages — play solo or compete with friends and family!

• 400+ questions
• Multiple categories
• Fast and addictive gameplay
• Multilingual support

title: Celebrities Get Ready For Christmas
description: Step into the world of ‘Celebrities Get Ready for Christmas’! Join your favorite stars as they prepare for the festive season. Explore dazzling holiday outfits, glamorous decorations, and witness the magic of Christmas through the eyes of celebrities. Get ready for a star-studded holiday celebration! Play and have fun!

title: Jixora – Jigsaw Solitaire Puzzle
description: Jixora is a relaxing jigsaw solitaire puzzle game where you piece together beautiful artwork. Journey through 100 unique levels with increasing difficulty, or unlock Free Play mode to replay your favorites with custom grid sizes. Race against the clock to earn stars, use strategic power-ups like Hints and Time Freezes, and immerse yourself in a cinematic atmosphere with soothing music.

title: Cleaning Simulator
description:
Cleaning Simulator is a very fun simulation game. Although this game is 2D, it restores the shape of objects in real life very well. This game has a total of 12 parts, covering sports cars, technological products, daily necessities, and other elements, which will definitely meet all your
expectations for cleaning games. Want to know more about this game? Come and try it!

title: Sniper Freeze
description: Experience thrilling sniper action in Sniper Freeze, a unique online game where you hunt down moving rule-breakers marked in red. Sharp graphics and challenging gameplay await - stay alert and precise!

title: Traitor Beaver!
description: Beaver Traitor! An exciting game where one player takes on the role of the traitor, while the other players act as regular participants. Your goal as the traitor is to secretly kill all the other players, sabotaging their tasks at the nuclear power plant. You'll need to be cunning, careful, and think strategically to avoid detection and achieve victory. Use various tactics and deception to reach your goals.

title: Marble Run - Ultimate Race!
description:
Race, roll, and clash in Marble Run, the ultimate marble racing game! Guide your marble through physics-based tracks, dodge obstacles, knock rivals off the edge, and aim for the finish line. 

With fast-paced races, competitive knockout rounds, and fun marble skins, it’s the most addictive 3D marble runner you’ll play!

title: College Girls Team Makeover
description: Try our new fashionista app "College Girls Team Makeover". Here you can dress up 5 high school best friends. They are the most popular school girls and always together. Everyone would like to be in their girl squad! They manage to be the most stylish girls in school, because they have their own fashion stylist and that’s you! You can control their whole look from the color of their skin and eyes to hairstyle and makeup. More than 1000 items of clothes and accessories are at your disposal!

title: Tetro Merge
description:
Tetro Merge is a physics-based merge puzzle game where Tetromino blocks come to life.
You’ll drop Tetrominoes of all shapes—classic, extended, and brand-new originals. When two matching pieces touch, they merge into a bigger, more complex block.
Master the bounce, plan your stacks, and build powerful combos as the board slowly fills up.
Will you manage your space wisely… or let the blocks overflow?
A perfect blend of strategy, physics, and classic Tetris nostalgia.

title: SWAT & Plants vs Zombies
description: "SWAT & Plants vs Zombies" is an engaging tower defense strategy game where you can upgrade and unlock new members of the SWAT squad as well as plants. Together, they will stand against waves of advancing zombies.

title: Headless Joe
description: While playing, robot Joe literally lost his head. But it's not as hopeless as it seems. To get it back in place and screw it tightly, Joe needs to solve puzzles and collect all the bolts. But he can’t do this without your help!

title: Zindex
description:
You are in an epidemic-stricken zone. The streets are filled with hordes of hungry zombies, and the survivors have long since abandoned this place. Your only hope for rescue is to repair an abandoned radio tower and call for help.
Explore dangerous locations, scavenge houses, crates, and closets in search of valuable resources. Gather materials to craft weapons, tools, and essential items. Fight zombies in melee combat or use firearms—the choice is yours.

title: Mahjong At Home - Scandinavian Edition
description: Immerse yourself in the minimalist elegance of the North with 'Mahjong at Home: Scandinavian Winter Edition'. This high-quality Mahjong game celebrates the sleek, modern design of Scandinavian style, blending festive themes with clean, sophisticated aesthetics for a uniquely cozy winter gaming experience.

title: Little master of assembly
description: The gameplay of this game is puzzle assembly type, mainly according to the room suggested by the picture, according to the objects in the room, the use of parts to splice the room objects

title: Skibidi Toilet vs Cameraman Sniper Game
description: Camera man are trying to survive in toilet mans red light green light game. If there is a camera man moving when the toilet man says red light, you must destroy him with your sniper gun. When aiming, you have to make sure you hit the right player. If you shoot the correct player, you earn additional points. Compete with your friends by getting the highest score. Play Toilet vs Cameraman Sniper now!

title: Noob archer vs Stickman Zombie: zombie shooter
description: A fun shooting game in the world of minecraft with stickmen "Nubik and Zombie Stickmen" will allow you to play the role of a real archery pro! Nubik was quietly resting at home, lazily lying on the bed as usual, when suddenly Stickmen began to make noise, have fun and dance around with loud music. This needs to be dealt with. Fight zombies, help Nubik become a real pro in this challenge.

title: Minecraft Battle Party
description: Ready for a hot feast of square battles? In Minecraft Battle Party, you'll enter a pixel-styled battle arena where nervous fighting meets iconic Minecraft-style visuals. In this world, every game is a duel to the death. You will play different roles and use different weapons. For example, as a gunner, constantly move your character so that enemies are shot within your scanning range. Watch out for other people's attacks.

title: Formula Traffic Racer
description: Skid the wheels of 6 stunning F1 cars with modified body kits and drive them through 3 landscape highways without crashing. Show how well you can steer the wheels of these amazing cars with roaring engines and conquer 3 awesome game modes. Use replenishing nitro to overtake slow cars and drive in speed at all times. Customize and upgrade your cars with the best upgrades and get the most out of all the cars. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself in F1 Traffic Racer

title: Brainrot Click to Hatch
description: Enter Brainrot Click to Hatch, the most absurd and epic clicker at the same time. With every tap you release BRAINROTS, each one stranger and more chaotic than the last. Accumulate energy, unlock upgrades, and watch how the BRAINROTS evolve into impossible forms. From viral classics to MAX POWER versions, the challenge is clear: collect them all before losing your mind. Do you think you can dominate the Brainrot universe with just a click?

title: Magic and Wizards Match
description: Magic and Wizards is an enchanting Match 3 game where you and your friend Aurora embark on a mystical journey through a magical realm. With over 4000+ levels, match gems representing magical elements to overcome obstacles, using powerful boosters to progress. Complete Daily Missions, tackle tricky blockers, and uncover hidden treasures. With stunning graphics and immersive gameplay, Magic & Wizards delivers a captivating experience filled with mystery. Ready for your magical adventure?

title: Mr Long Legs
description: Get ready to wobble, stretch, and stumble with Mr. Long Legs, the funniest physics puzzle game you’ll ever play! Step into the shoes of a long-legged stickman hero and control his stretchy legs to cross impossible terrains.

title: VegaMix Match-3 Village
description: A cozy match-3 with a heartfelt story! ? Visit grandma in the village — she’s a true star with fun tales from her youth. Play classic match-3 levels, earn stars and complete quests for villagers. Bright puzzles, touching stories, colorful graphics and daily bonuses await you. Perfect for short sessions and relaxing breaks. ? For fans of match-3 with plot, coziness and helping heroes.

title: Mission Santa: Deliver the Gifts
description:
Santa must deliver gifts to children in time! There are many kids and only one Santa, so everything has to be done on the fly! Fly in a sleigh on Christmas night and throw gifts down chimneys to make children happy. 

The game helps you feel the atmosphere of the approaching holiday and prepare for the most magical time of the year!

title: Block Parkour Trials
description: Block Parkour Trials is a super fun and free-to-play parkour game. Your goal is to reach the portal at the finish line by skillfully jumping over obstacles. Have fun and enjoy the challenge!

title: Muscle Challenge
description: Run, eat healthy foods and proteins and avoid harmful foods, drinks and obstacles in the Muscle Challenge game! Defeat your enemies with the strength and muscular body you gained at the end of the race! The enemies get stronger in each level, so you have to get better too... If you want, you can also play the game in challenge mode with your friend in 2 Player mode.

title: Skillful Finger
description: Touch the screen and slide your finger along the glowing line without lifting it. Avoid barriers, stay clear of the edges, and react quickly as the speed increases. Customize your ball and tail, face dynamic obstacles, and enjoy endlessly generated paths that keep every run fast, challenging, and addictive.

title: Knock and Run. 100 Doors Escape
description: Become the fastest and most daring stickman in this fun arcade game! Your goal is to race through the corridors of the hotel, ring the doors, knock and slam them, arranging epic pranks. The main thing is not to get caught! Residents' reactions are unpredictable, and danger can lurk around every corner.

title: Cube Connect
description: Move the blocks and guide the ball to the goal. After a period of time, the ball starts to move. Connect the paths quickly so that the ball doesn't fall. Some blocks can jump and some can warp.

title: BUBBLE FEVER BLAST
description: Shoot the bubble at bubbles of the same color to drop them! When the bubble enters STAR, there is a chance for FEVER! If the bubbles reach the bottom line, the game is over.

title: Demolition Car - Rope and Hook
description: Do you like casual simulators with physics of destruction? Looking for a free 3d game where you can break buildings? Control a wrecking machine with hook and rope. Compete with your friends in destruction and prove that you are the best house destroyer!

title: Merge Home Mania
description: Welcome to an exciting game where creativity meets strategy! Merge items, build unique structures and decorate your perfect home. Use materials like stone, wood, textiles, flowers and plants to create furniture and decorations. Design beautiful rooms and show off your decorating talent!

title: Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting
description: Ready to become the coldest, deadliest sniper in the entire city? Mafia Sniper Crime Shooting is a FPS action shooting simulator where you complete high-risk missions. Use powerful guns to eliminate dangerous mafia targets.

title: Unstack Tower
description: Unstack Tower is a puzzle game that challenges players to dismantle a tower of colorful cubes in the correct order. Every move matters—remove or drop blocks carefully to keep the structure stable while freeing space for the next step. Different block materials such as glass or wood add variety and difficulty, making each level unique. With its blend of strategy and reflex-based gameplay, Unstack Tower offers a mix of tension and fun that keeps players engaged.

title: Lost Things - Hidden Objects
description:
Embark on an exciting adventure where your powers of observation are your main tool!
This is a relaxing hidden object game created for those who appreciate slow-paced gameplay and enjoy exploring detailed worlds. Forget about time pressure! Here you can explore huge, colorful maps filled with hundreds of artfully hidden objects at your own pace.

title: Day of Atrocity
description: Day of Atrocity is a voxel action game where you play as the hero, battling a relentless swarm of enemies that spawn at an increasing pace. Your objective is to stop them from overtaking the map by wiping them out before they dominate the entire space.

title: Backgammon Duel
description:
One of the oldest, most played and loved games, the classic backgammon game. 

Also known as Tavli (Greece), Tawla (Egypt), and Takteh (Iranian), but whatever you call it you can download it now and challenge yourself.

title: Stunt Multiplayer Arena
description:
Go solo in a free roam challenge where you can pull off incredible stunts like front and backflips. Navigate icy and dirt tracks as you push various vehicles to their limits.

In the multiplayer derby mode, choose your vehicle—whether it's a car, truck, or van—and engage in a fierce survival derby. Compete against all other vehicles in an intense, smashing battle. 

Jump into the action today and see if you have what it takes to rule the arena!

title: Mindblow
description: Get ready for a mind-teasing adventure in Mindblow, the ultimate word puzzle game that challenges your vocabulary and logic skills. Explore hundreds of fun and engaging levels — from simple to truly tricky — all designed to keep your brain sharp and entertained. Play for free on desktop or mobile, uncover hidden words from beautiful images, and enjoy new levels added every month. Think you have what it takes to become a true word master?

title: Egg Farm
description:
Join the egg-citing adventure of Egg Farm and unleash your inner fox as you embark on a fast-paced egg-catching frenzy! 
Dash with lightning agility, master obstacle evasion, and craft a fox character like no other with a range of custom skins. It's time to become an egg-cellent egg-catching maestro - your prowess will earn you legendary status!

title: Dreamy Jewel
description: If you put three or more jewel of thesame type together vertically or horizontally, they'll disappear! Special blocks appear when four or more are aligned and erased. Mixing effects when special blocks are crossed with each other!

title: Toytopia
description: Toytopia is a cozy merge-and-repair adventure where you combine art items to craft materials and restore broken toys. Every toy has its own look and challenge, so you’ll keep unlocking new fixes and surprises. Relaxing, creative, and gently strategic.

title: Draw Bridge Puzzle
description: Draw Bridge Puzzle is a creative and exciting puzzle game that combines drawing and rescue gameplay into one addictive experience. You become a bridge designer, using your finger to draw safe paths and complete thrilling rescue missions. Enter the car mode, draw a strong bridge to help a motor cross gaps, broken roads, and dangerous obstacles to reach the goal.

title: Fireboy & Watergirl 7: and Friends
description:
Fireboy and Watergirl need help to explore this new temple. This time with 3 new friends that will help them solve the puzzles, beat the times and collect all the diamonds! 

Play alone or with a friend to join Fireboy and Watergirl in this new adventure!

Turn levers and push buttons to complete these 36 new levels of the official Fireboy and Watergirl series.

title: Cute Kitty Merge
description: Step into the role of a farmer and grow your own fruits and vegetables. In Solitaire TriPeaks Farming you will spend time in beautiful nature and play fun and constantly changing levels that will never allow for boredom. It is all about having fun.

title: Men Vs Gorillas
description:
Men vs Gorilla – The Ultimate Evolution Battle!

Step into the wild showdown of Man vs Gorilla!
Upgrade your human’s strength, damage, and health to survive the rising fury of the jungle’s strongest beast. ?

Each level brings a tougher gorilla, smarter attacks, and intense battles but also bigger rewards!
Use your earnings to level up your power, evolve your fighter, and dominate every fight!

title: Jigsort Puzzles
description: Jigsort Puzzle is an app that is art puzzle and lets you complete jigsaw puzzle game for free! Various difficulty levels for casual and experiences puzzlers!

title: Athena Match 2
description: Athena Match 2 - the epic sequel returns! Join the goddess Athena on a new mythical journey through ancient Greece. Match 3 or more legendary artifacts to restore temples and unlock the secrets of the gods. Enjoy stunning visuals, immersive sound, and hundreds of new levels packed with daily missions and challenges. Step into the world of Greek mythology and prove your match-3 skills in this divine adventure!

title: Uncle Bullet 007
description:
Play as Uncle Bullet, a retired spy who’s back in the game to take down rival agents and save the day. Armed with an arsenal of bouncy bullets, you’ll use your wits and quick reflexes to outmaneuver foes and rescue hostages.

Shoot your bullets at walls, ceilings, and floors to make them bounce, ricochet, and curve around corners to hit your targets.

title: Stickman Punishment
description: When a mysterious radiation blast grants Stickman and his friends superpowers, heartbreak quickly turns into a quest for revenge! Betrayed by his best friend over a girl, Stickman discovers he can morph into any shape imaginable. Now, he’s ready to use his new abilities to create chaos and keep the pair apart. Dive into this action-packed story filled with unique animations, clever payback strategies, and endless creativity!

title: Guns vs Magic
description: Step into the shoes of Silvius, a courageous student of magic, as you fight to save the world from the dark powers unleashed by your former mentor, Lucius. Once a wise and benevolent wizard, Lucius has succumbed to the sinister influence of a cursed crystal, turning him into an evil sorcerer intent on dominating the world. Now, it's up to you to confront Lucius and his army of enchanted creatures in a battle of wits, power, and courage.

title: Picture Puzzles
description: the picture puzzles includes dozens of different puzzles. you can increase or decrease the number of pieces of these puzzles as you wish. so you can make it suitable for all ages. you can have a pleasant time by having fun and exercising your brain. come on we are waiting for you.

title: Kour.io
description: Kour.io is a multiplayer IO FPS game that plunges you into intense battles across various maps with many guns and modes to play!It's one of the most accessible first-person shooters, available on both web browsers and mobile.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Beat Music Battle
description: Step into the world of Beat Music Battle: 456 Survival, where rhythm meets creativity and fun! This casual music game is perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and party lovers alike.

title: Hydraulic Press 2D ASMR
description: You have in your hands a terrifying power that gives you the ability to grind dozens of objects! A very effective stress reliever. Try out your personal hydraulic press right now and start destroying all objects! Crush, crush, break!

title: Chiron City Driver
description: Get ready to skid the wheels of a stunning sports car through an expansive morning city map! Customize and upgrade your sports car with cool upgradables and become the best driver in the city. Take your dog with you in 3 driving challenges and conquer the missions together. Use nitro to beat slow traffic and beat all speed, stunt and drift triggers spread across the map. Are you ready to show your driving skills? Prove yourself!

title: Fun Golf
description: Immerse in lush 2D golfing, each swing a masterpiece. Each swing transports you to breathtaking landscapes, with realistic physics and intuitive controls making every shot a work of art. Master skill and strategy across diverse courses for endless entertainment.

title: Brain Draw Line
description:
Brain Draw Line is a minimalist puzzle game where you must complete shapes using a single, continuous line. There are no timers or unnecessary distractions — the focus is purely on precision and planning. Each level presents a unique figure that you must finish without lifting your finger or mouse and without crossing the line twice.
The experience is calm, strategic, and rewarding — ideal for players who enjoy logic-based challenges.

title: NinjaRoof
description: NinjaRoof is a fast-paced and addictive arcade game where players control a nimble character jumping from rooftop to rooftop while avoiding deadly obstacles and aiming for the highest score. Test your timing, precision, and reflexes in this endless jumping adventure built with smooth physics and clean visuals.

title: Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training
description:
Challenge your memory, speed and attention in "Try To Count The Boxes Brain Training". Watch boxes appear, remember the count, then submit your guess faster and more accurate each round wins.

Enjoy single-player focus mode or competitive rounds vs local friend or multiplayer. Simple tap controls, short rounds, addictive replayability perfect for quick brain workouts on desktop and mobile.

Train memory, logic, agility and reaction time now!

title: Draw a path to the finish line!
description: Draw a path and lead your character to the finish line! Use your creativity and planning to avoid obstacles and reach your goal. Whether you're playing on a computer or phone, this fun puzzle game is all about finding smart and artistic ways to win. Great for all ages!

title: Cut Grass
description: Do you know powerful a ring blade is? Cut Grass will show you a famous Mexican weapon in a 3D collecting puzzle arcade game. Here is some weed on the mud, your mission is to cut them all down at all levels. Without time and score limitations, keep calm and have a good time!

title: Word Guess Game
description: Are you good at guessing a word from provided letters in random order? Here is a word-guessing puzzle game with arcade play rules. There are four different modes with more letters from four to seven. More difficult modes have more time for you to use. Keep calm and make a new reword!

title: Maze Craze
description: Step into the captivating world of Maze Craze, a puzzle game that combines creativity, humor, and strategic problem-solving. Perfect for puzzle enthusiasts and casual gamers, Maze Craze offers an endless journey through a variety of mazes, each with its own unique set of challenges and surprises.

title: Idle Town Billionaire
description: Dive into the world of entrepreneurship by purchasing lots in the town and building a variety of businesses. This idle game allows your businesses to automatically generate profit, even while you're away. Hire managers to boost your earnings and optimize your operations. Expand your business empire by strategically investing in new properties and upgrades.

title: Jet Fighter Airplane Racing
description:
Are you a fan of car traffic games & street racing? Do you like planes and the sky? We have something new to play! Try a plane flying game with different missions, improve your flying skills and become a true professional in racing piloting in Jet Fighter Airplane Racing!

Are you looking for exclusive aeroplanes?
• MiG-21 “Fishbed"
• McDonnell Douglas F-4 Phantom II
• MiG-29 “Fulcrum”
• F-16 Fighting Falcon
• MiG-31 BM “Foxhound”
• F-22 Raptor
• SU-35 “Flanker-E”
• SU-47 "Firkin"
• SU-57

title: That's my seat!
description: That's My Seat! is a fun and engaging logic puzzle game where you must place characters in the correct seats by analyzing clues. Each level presents a new seating challenge with unique rules and relationships between the characters. Study the hints, think carefully, and figure out where everyone belongs. Perfect for fans of logic puzzles, brain games, deduction games, and casual puzzle games that test your thinking skills.

title: BitGoblins RPG Simulator
description:
Become the protector of the kingdom from goblin robbers!

Get stronger by fighting goblin armies! Upgrade your hero with every battle, earn gold and get new items

Defeat the leaders of the goblins - the ogres! Gain strength after fighting goblin armies and test your skills

Explore the possibilities of this game! Start as a young wizard and upgrade your abilities, get new equipment and become the menace of goblins.

title: Nightmare Couple Halloween Party
description: Nightmare Couple Halloween Party is a spooky and stylish dress-up game where you can help the ultimate nightmare couple prepare for their eerie Halloween bash. Select from a variety of creepy costumes, haunting accessories, and makeup styles to give the couple their perfect spine-chilling look. Unleash your creativity and fashion sense to make this Halloween party an unforgettable one for the nightmare couple!

title: Cool SuperCars Stunts PvP
description: Skid the wheel of a stunning supercar through 3 awesome game modes and showcase your driving skills.
