Customize your car according to your taste and drive in style with the roaring engines. Feel the heat in 2 player mode where you go head to head with your friend in 2 amazing game modes! Are you ready to conquer the stunt city? Prove yourself with Two Stunt Racers!

title: Void Orbit
description: Void Orbit is an addictive space arcade game where you orbit a central core and dodge incoming enemies. Tap to reverse direction and survive as long as possible! Unlock cool skins, dynamic themes, enjoy challenging modes like Echo Mirage and Tower Build. Multi-language support for global players. Free to play, endless fun!

title: Coffee Match Rush: Sort Puzzle
description: Get ready for a deliciously challenging in block puzzle game - Coffee Match: Block Puzzle. In this game, you’ll be tasked with block jam 3d puzzle - sorting coffee cups into the right trays. Each level presents a new set of challenges where you’ll need to move the coffee trays around and strategically place the cups before the timer runs out.

title: Candy Riddles
description: Candy Riddles is a puzzle match-3 puzzle game bursting with tasty-looking, mouth-watering sweets! Prepare for a world of sugary fun as you match cookies, donuts, ice creams, and more to rack up points and progress through challenging levels.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Hill Station Bus Simulator
description: "Hill Station Bus Simulator" invites players to step into the shoes of a skilled bus driver navigating the challenging terrains of picturesque hill stations. As the primary protagonist, your mission is to efficiently transport passengers through winding roads, steep ascents, and captivating landscapes, while managing a thriving bus service. The game offers an engaging blend of realistic driving simulation, strategic decision-making, and immersive experiences.

title: Nubik Courier An Open World
description: Become a top pizza delivery expert! Race through city streets, dodge obstacles, and switch between vehicles to deliver pizzas on time. Earn money, upgrade your gear, and master exciting challenges. Fast-paced, fun, and addictive—start delivering now!

title: Merge & Construct
description: Merge & Construct is an arcade game where you can be creative to build the ultimate vehicle for driving, flying, and smashing! Show off your imagination as you construct a vehicle capable of crossing the finish line in action-packed car trials.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Airport Security
description: Airport Security is a casual simulation game that immerses you in the high-stakes world of airport safety, placing you in the role of a vigilant security officer dedicated to safeguarding a bustling terminal. Your mission is to maintain a secure environment by identifying suspicious passengers, spotting fake passports, and uncovering hidden contraband using cutting-edge X-ray machines.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

Plan your moves, follow the arrows, and solve each level using logic and strategy. Knit Rescue is the perfect casual puzzle game for fans of brain games, logic puzzles, and strategy games.

description: Unleash your creativity with Pixel Number – DIY Coloring! Choose from a huge collection of pixel art images – from cute animals to cool patterns – and bring them to life with color.

title: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup
description: Black Hole: Beauty Makeup is a game where the player controls a black hole trying to devour as many objects around it as possible. Eat more, grow more, then create a beauty makeover!  Cool black hole simulator. Absorb different objects. Unlock skins. Do you like black hole and simulators?

title: Taylor Dress Studio Preppy & Wild West & Glam
description: Welcome to the dress-up game, in which the pop diva tries on three completely different fashionable looks: a youthful preppy bow, a cowboy outfit and a glamorous stage look. In addition, you can experiment with hairstyles and change the makeup of the heroine. Complete the images with accessories: glasses, hats and jewelry. Choose clothes and combine elements from different sets to create delicate, daring or superstar bows. Turn Taylor into an icon of any style!

title: Escape the Horror Craft
description:
Immerse yourself in a thrilling horror adventure set in the Minecraft universe. A regular, unassuming worker in Minecraft's universe becomes disoriented and has to figure out how to get out of each level and map in order to do the jobs.

A Minecraft nightmare comes to life in this eerie, ghostly realm. Stay calm as you navigate the terrain in search of an escape. Is it possible to complete each level without dying? If you're looking for a new game to play, check out kiz10.com.

title: Mojicon Emoji Connect
description:
A fast, fun twist on classic Onet puzzles!
Get ready to match and relax with Mojicon: Emoji Connect – the cheerful tile-linking puzzle bursting with personality!
Connect identical emoji tiles, clear the board, and enjoy satisfying spark effects with every perfect match.
With hundreds of cute icons, calming backgrounds, and rewarding combos, Mojicon delivers endless relaxing fun for all ages.
Play anywhere, anytime – no downloads, just pure emoji joy!

title: Warfare 1942 - online shooter
description:
Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of World War II, where every battle is a unique fight for survival!
The game is designed for military enthusiasts and those who love intense online battles. It’s the perfect choice for players who prefer shooters with detailed gameplay, a variety of characters, and customization. Suitable for both seasoned fighters and newcomers.

title: Witch & Fairy BFF
description: Two unusual girlfriends - a Fairy and a Witch - study together, although they are so different. Fairy, with her delicate pink outfits and impeccable sense of style, is always ready to offer fashion tips and create vivid images. Her girlfriend-Witch, who prefers a Gothic style, chooses mysterious and gloomy outfits. Players will be able to help both heroines choose outfits for various events. Join magical friends in their exciting fashion adventure where style and magic go hand in hand!

title: Solitaire Summer: Klondike
description:
Ready to experience a summer full of Solitaire?
Finally, it's summer! Time to relax! What's better than to lay back, listen to the smooth tunes, enjoy the warm breeze coming from the sea and play some Klondike Solitaire.
Your goal in Solitaire Summer is simple, yet so addictive: Arrange all cards sorted by color in 4 stacks, from lowest to highest value. Can you remove all cards in the correct order and solve the Solitaire Summer puzzle?

title: Merge cubes 2048 3D
description: A completely new approach to the classic game 2048?! Now in 3D and with dynamic physics?! Number cubes don't just merge - they bounce and collide?, adding an element of surprise to every game! Compete with friends or colleagues?!

title: Alphabet Lore Maze
description: Alphabet Maze: Escape Letters is an exciting puzzle game that will help develop the struggle of minds and learn the letters of the alphabet. In this educational game you will explore the maze, defeating monsters, teddy bear and letter creatures. Choose characters from the collection that include Huggy, Teddy Bear, Harry and many other unique characters. To get out of the maze, you need to choose rooms with a smaller number than yours and avoid monsters larger than your level.

title: City Tower Builder
description: In the game, you need to develop your own city, build houses, and place them around the city. You need to build the houses evenly so that the blocks don't fall to the ground. The game is a combination of a city-building simulator and an exciting arcade game where you need to build even houses out of blocks so that the blocks don't fall and the houses don't collapse.

title: Mahjong connect tiles
description: Mahjong Connect Tiles is a classic tile-matching puzzle game. We have combined the authentic charm of the traditional Mahjong Solitaire with modern convenience to create the perfect game for seniors and puzzle lovers of all ages. If you are looking for a relaxing yet intellectually engaging way to spend your time, this game is designed for you.

title: Zip Zap
description: Step into the fascinating world of Zip Zap, a unique online physics puzzle game that blends mechanics, movement, and precision. Tap, twist, and control your way through clever levels filled with moving parts and intricate structures. Every stage tests your timing and creativity — can you reach every target? Play for free on desktop or mobile and enjoy a perfectly balanced mix of challenge and relaxation.

title: HOTGEAR
description:
Join HOTGEAR, a brand-new racing game where the thrill of the chase is just beginning. The pursuit is on, and it's time to put your skills to the test! The game offers a wide range of customization options, allowing you to create the car of your dreams and make every chase even more thrilling.
So, what are you waiting for, racer? The pursuit has begun, and you're wanted! Time to get in the driver's seat, customize your car, and take on the streets!

title: Stickman Zombie vs Stickman Hero
description:
Stickman Zombie vs Stickman Hero is a stick war game about zombies, stickman, noob and pro who stole lucky block. The zombie boss is chasing them to bring the lucky block back to the roblox world, but the stickman hero escapes, resurrecting his allies along the way/

Game Features:
- You run away from the zombie boss and then play as him against the animator
- Various zombie, baldi and stickman animations
- The game is similar in style to minecraft, stick war, roblox and noob vs p

description: Assassin Commando Car Driving is a vertical-version car battle arcade game with 3D cartoon vehicles. Your car is equipped with a mechanic arm, a machine gun, and a baffle. You can crash enemy vehicles, punch them at the side, and shoot them when the machine gun skill is ready. I strongly suggest you upgrade the baffle first. Crashing the backside of the target is easier than attacking at the side.

title: Snake Go - Escape Puzzle
description: Your goal is simple: guide the snake through tangled grids and help it escape without getting stuck. Each level challenges you to think ahead, choose the right order, and find safe paths through tight spaces. Blending classic snake mechanics with modern puzzle escape logic, every maze feels handcrafted — clean, clever, and satisfying to solve.

title: The Last Tiger: Tank Simulator
description:
An incredible adventure in the world of tank battles awaits you!
Get ready to immerse yourself in the exciting world of tank battles. In this game, you will take control of one of the most famous tanks of World War II, the Tiger. Your task is to survive and win the fiercest battles.

title: Noob: Jailbreak 2
Dino Egg Shooter
description:
Dino Egg Shooter is a fun and addictive puzzle game set in a colorful prehistoric world.
With 100 levels of increasing difficulty, players aim and shoot colorful dino eggs to clear the board. 
Each level presents unique challenges, from tricky formations to limited shots.
Easy controls and charming visuals make Dino Egg Shooter perfect for all ages.
So, get ready

description: Dino Shooter Pro is an exciting gun battle game. You are on an island. There are many dinosaurs and bad guys on this island. They are extremely ferocious and attack everyone they see. Your weapon is a gun. When there are dinosaurs and bad guys around you, pick up your gun, aim at the opponent, and fire bullets in rapid succession.  Try to kill all of them, good luck!

title: Connect Image
description: Play an exciting puzzle game about rainbow friends and other characters! You just need to assemble a picture of the parts.The game is similar to both puzzles and games in the style of "dop". Use logic, turn on your brains, pump attention and ingenuity!

description:
UNO Online is a strategy card game. In the game, the first player to clear his hand will become the winner. In order to win, you need to guess the deck of cards in your opponent's hands and  arrange your card order reasonably. There are also function cards in the game. When you draw a function card, think about how to turn the situation to your advantage. You can use color cards to
change the color of the game, or use +2 cards to make your opponent's cards never run out.

title: Small Wardrobe
description: Small Wardrobe is a casual game designed specifically for cotton dolls. Collect and create beautiful and cute dresses for your cotton dolls, and experience heartwarming and fun stories. The game offers a variety of adorable doll clothes, shoes, and accessories. Let's happily organize and tidy up the doll's wardrobe together!

title: Pottery Master
description: Pottery Master is a casual art game where you paint your way to crafting perfection. Use your virtual hands to mold your clay, then your tools to shape and paint them.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Survival Island: EVO
description: Play a fun adventure and simulation game in Survival Island: EVO. You are alone on a mysterious island, and the challenge begins: survive, build, and thrive. Gather more resources like food, water, wood, and stone. And craft the tools you need to stay alive. Build your shelter, light a fire, and protect yourself from hunger and wild animals. Explore hidden corners of the island, discover secrets, and unlock new crafting recipes. Become the true survivor.

title: Hidden Objects
description: Hidden Objects is a visually stunning puzzle game that challenges your observation skills. Explore beautifully detailed scenes filled with cleverly hidden items. Use hints if needed, but the real reward lies in uncovering every object on your own. Dive into a world of mystery and sharpen your perception.

title: Block Stacking
description: Block Stacking is a very fun, leisure, and pressure-relieving game. The game is very delicate and fresh. In the game, you will play by combining many different fruits. As long as you can complete the target tasks, you will have a chance to get rewards! By eliminating the fruits on the screen, you can successfully pass the level. It's extremely easy to operate, which makes you feel very addicted. Come and try the game!

title: Archers Random
description:
Archers Random is a fast-paced stickman archery game that tests your reflexes and aim.

Fight endless enemy waves, explore new areas, and earn coins to unlock helmets, armor, and triple arrows. Upgrade speed, damage, health, and arm power, master 12 special arrows like fire, poison, rocket, and electric, face epic bosses, and survive nonstop action.

Play solo or challenge a friend in 2 Player mode on the same device for intense head-to-head battles.

title: Merge Balls New Years Toys in 3D!

Connect as many balls as possible to make the biggest one, save up points?! Be the first on the leaderboard?! Play and relax ?!

title: Gladiators. Merge and Fight
description: Gladiators: Merge and Fight is an engaging arcade game that combines character attribute creation and enhancement with combat. In this game, you start with basic materials and improve your gladiator's attributes by upgrading weapon, shield, armor, and helmet materials. Every decision affects your hero's stats. After preparing your gladiator, press the "Start" button to begin the second part of the game: arena battles.

title: Spider Solitaire
description: Get ready to dive into the timeless classic Spider Solitaire, reimagined for mobile with sleek design and intuitive gameplay! Perfect for players of all skill levels, this game offers a relaxing yet challenging card puzzle experience anytime, anywhere.

title: Happy Monsters
description:
The collection of fun games is designed for children of any age and will not leave anyone indifferent.
Monsters play different games in which you need to collect fruits. Help them collect as much as possible to earn postcards with animals. Collect the whole collection of postcards!

description:
Build and manage your own cinema empire! 
Unlock movie rooms, snack and burger corners to attract more customers.
Hire staff, upgrade facilities, and keep your theater running smoothly.
Earn cash even while you’re offline and grow your business.
Become the ultimate cinema tycoon in this fun idle arcade game!

title: Tappy Bird - Avoid the Spikes
description: Tap on the screen to move bird up, avoiding the spikes as the level progresses more spikes appear and the possibility to collect coins increases.

title: Asylum: Baldi Granny Slender
description: You'll be heading into the forest to find a mental hospital. Legend has it that this mental hospital is where rare Brainrot figurines are found. Characters like Baldi, Granny, and Slenderman guard these figurines. A bipedal deer also lives in the forest, so be careful not to fall into their clutches! You can hide under beds in the mental hospital to avoid being caught by the monsters.

title: School Teacher Simulator
description:
Evaluate the students' answers in the Teacher Simulator game! Give grades to students, check your homework  and test your school knowledge! This is a cool game for teachers, as well as for students who want to try themselves as a teacher!

In the Teacher Simulator game, you will have to evaluate students' answers, check their homework, conduct tests for two-year students and check your school knowledge. Become the best teacher and cope with any challenges that your students throw at you!

title: Anomaly Content Record
description: Welcome to Anomaly Content Record, a terrifying horror adventure where your only goal is to escape and survive. You’re a field investigator sent to explore a restricted research facility that went silent overnight.

description: Fast-paced, two-player game where players try to control a "Goon Ball" to paint the  floor their color before time runs out.

title: Stickman Halloween Survive
description:
Now that Halloween is here, the gloomiest day of the year, it's time to bring back the courageous white stickman who is an expert at vanquishing monsters. Stop procrastinating and start enjoying Stickman Halloween Survive right now on your preferred mobile device. It's a fun and free online game. 
Every living thing on Earth is frightened to death when monsters emerge from their underground lairs on Halloween night.

description: The Impossible Quiz is an online quiz game that is… Almost impossible. The questions are all difficult to answer and require lateral thinking.

Arrange numbered tiles in order by sliding them into the empty space. Perfect for brain training and logic improvement!

description:
Immerse yourself in an atmosphere of tranquility with "Just Mahjong" — the perfect implementation of classic mahjong solitaire. Enjoy pure gameplay without unnecessary complications, where all attention is paid to the very essence of this famous game.

Endless Enjoyment: Hundreds of carefully designed layouts guarantee long hours of play.

title: Stabfish 2

description:
You wake up alone in an empty apartment where everything seems calm… until the first knock at the door. Nameless parcels, mysterious objects, eerie creatures, and meaningless incantations turn your cozy home into a nightmarish trap.

Who is sending you these items — an enemy or a savior?
Why do toys come to life, eyes grow on the walls, and a ceiling-high worm bursts from the bathtub?

title: Mega Ramp Bike Racing Tracks
description: Are you a real bike driver? Get this moto racing simulator from the bike simulator games and prove yourself as the best bike rider. Perform dangerous stunts on high sky impossible tracks and drive bike on crazy impossible tracks. Control the motorcycle in city superhero motorbike racer to become the ultimate bike rider.

description: Crowd Battle Gun Rush is a weapon evolution history parkour game. At the beginning of the game, you only have an ax, which is the least lethal weapon. You must keep moving forward. On the way forward, you must collect bundles of money. , which can be used to purchase weapons and ammunition. When you prepare your weapons, you can target the groups that remain and continue to attack and eliminate them.

title: Horror Escape Granny Room
description:
In case you are ready for a creepy adventure full of horror and exploration, then choose Horror Escape: Granny Room without hesitation! In our game, you are going to go on a dangerous journey.
Collect clues and keys while trying to escape the clutches of horrible granny. Your path is full of dangers. You must dodge the monsters lurking in the dark corners.  To unlock these areas, you must collect keys and reveal secrets. What awaits you? Only time will tell.

title: Kitchen Star
description: Introducing "Kitchen Star," the ultimate puzzle challenge for visual thinkers! In this captivating game, players are tasked with unraveling intricate images by strategically rotating connected chunks of lines. Your mission? Reveal the full image in as few turns as possible by rotating different sections. With each twist and turn, the true picture emerges, but can you decode it before you're all twisted up? Get ready to sharpen your spatial skills and become the ultimate Kitchen Star!

title: Real Flight Simulator
description: Real Flight Simulator plays like an airplane driving simulation game with 3D models. In 6 levels, you can learn how to drive an airplane including starting, steering, and landing. All of the complicated instrument panels are simplified for players to learn. The more expensive the airplane you drive, the better acceleration of it you can enjoy including the Power, Speed, Solution, and Brake. Good luck in the sky!

title: Neko's Adventure
description: Neko’s Adventure is a vibrant platformer starring Neko, a playful cat trying to rescue his girlfriend. Explore 20 challenging levels, unlock the Power Beam to shoot fire, and face quirky enemies in a whimsical, fast-paced adventure full of charm, excitement, and cartoon fun!

title: Water Dig Rescue
description: Dive into the captivating world of "Water Dig Rescue," a physics-based puzzle game where strategy and water manipulation go hand-in-hand. Players carve their way through sand to guide streams of water, aiming to fill a waiting truck at each level's end. With a touch of ingenuity and the laws of physics, can you solve the puzzles and achieve a triumphant splash?

title: Maze Escape : Craft Man
description:
Objective:
Navigate through a series of craft doors and escape the maze without being killed by terrifying entities.

Gameplay:

    Explore the Maze: Move through a maze filled with multiple doors, each leading to new and more challenging areas.
    Survive the Entities: Avoid or outsmart various entities that lurk in the maze, each with unique behaviors and attack patterns.
    Find the Next Door: Continuously search for the next door to progress to subsequent levels of the maze.
    Collect Items: Gather keys to unlock doors, coins for upgrades, and useful tools to aid in your survival.

title: Simon Super Rabbit
description:
Simon and his friends have turned into superheroes and now they must look for the evil Professor Wolf and get their marbles back.
Grrr… That boastful and braggart Professor Wolf and his minions don’t want to give the marbles back to Simon and they have challenged him to a super mega competition which he must win to get them back. If you beat him, he will be giving the marbles back to you. Surely you can win and get them all back. Go for it!

title: Reach 2048
description: The classic 2048 puzzle — slide numbered tiles on a grid, merge them, and reach the legendary 2048 tile! Simple to learn, impossible to put down. Challenge your brain with this addictive number puzzle. Plan your moves carefully, build combos, and aim for the highest score. How far can you go beyond 2048?

title: Mahjong Cute Tiles
description: Enjoy a classic Mahjong game, now in another dimension! Rotate the board, explore fresh tile layouts and challenge your mind. Show off your skills and use powerful boosters like undo moves, tile shuffles, bombs and hints to help you advance faster.

Put your mind to the test in this fun and challenging brain puzzle game! ?
Solve tricky riddles, make tough decisions, and uncover mysteries in each level. From saving lives to solving absurd situations, every case challenges your logic and creativity.

title: Magic and Wizards Mahjong
description: Enter the enchanting world of Magic & Wizards Mahjong! Match mystical tiles adorned with runes, potions, and magical artifacts across beautifully crafted layouts. Enjoy smooth gameplay with boosters like Hint, Shuffle, Undo, Torch, and Freeze. Race against the clock to earn time bonuses, or use extra seconds to finish your quest. With 50 rotating layouts and stunning wizardly visuals, every match feels like a spellbinding adventure for Mahjong lovers and casual players alike.

title: Sprunki Coloring Book
description:
Dive into a colorful adventure with Sprunki Coloring Book, a delightful game designed for kids and adults alike. Choose from a wide variety of adorable Sprunki characters, captivating landscapes, and fun designs to color your way. Whether you're a budding artist or simply looking to relax, Sprunki Coloring Book offers endless possibilities for self-expression.
Start coloring today and discover the joy of creativity with Sprunki Coloring Book!

title: Dig out of Prison
description:
You are a prisoner determined to break free. Dig tunnels with a spoon, shovel, or anything you can find. Discover valuables, trade with fellow inmates and even the guards, and earn the prison’s top currency — toilet paper.

Upgrade your digging and trading skills, unlock better tools, and speed up your escape. But be careful — plan your moves and avoid drawing attention, because freedom is the prize only for the most cunning.

title: Draw One Part Brain Puzzle
description: Ready to test your creativity and logic? Draw One Part: Brain Puzzle is a fun and clever brain teaser puzzle game that combines thinking with drawing. Each level shows an incomplete picture, and your task is to draw the missing part to solve the puzzle.

title: Sand Block Blast
description: Play Sand Block Blast free online and enjoy a relaxing browser game you can play instantly with no download and no install. Drop sand-shaped blocks, watch them crumble into grains, and clear lines in a clever logic puzzle that feels both calm and strategic. This unblocked game loads fast and works smoothly at school or home. Mobile-friendly and optimized for desktop and mobile, it’s a free online brain game perfect for quick breaks and focused play anytime.

Every victory takes you further into a colorful balloon-popping adventure filled with cheerful worlds, playful action, and satisfying explosions. Unlock new challenges, enjoy vibrant visuals, and become the Super Ninja Balloon master.

Can you master the art of parking in Beach City without getting busted?

Take control of a powerful spaceship, engage in intense battles to destroy alien blocks, upgrade your ship with advanced features, and conquer a series of challenging levels. This fun and colorful game tests your reflexes and speed. Perfect for kids and casual players who love simple but addictive gameplay!

Defeat foes and gather experience points to level up and grow stronger. Unlock and master powerful spells, evolving them to take down enemies even faster. Good luck in your battles!

title: Rock Crawling
description: Welcome to the thrilling world of 3D Rock Crawling Racing, where speed meets strategy and off-road dominance is your only goal. In this high-adrenaline off-road simulator, players take the wheel of powerful 4x4 rock crawlers and navigate some of the most extreme and rugged terrains ever designed in a browser game. From sharp mountain ridges to slippery mud tracks, this is not your average racing game—it’s a true test of control, timing, and grit.

title: Baling Bum
description: Jump into Baling Bum, a hilarious arcade adventure packed with silly challenges, funny levels, and nonstop action. Perfect for students looking for cool math games, silly games, or quick school break fun. Play free online, test your reflexes, and laugh with every move. This casual game mixes arcade chaos with funny bum battles, making it a must-play for fans of funny games, free kids games, and online school games. Can you survive the bum escape?

title: Fishing the Russian Way
description:
Embark on a journey through Central Russia: picturesque rivers and lakes, different types of fish, and the exciting process of fishing. Improve your tackle, control your rod, decide the fate of your catch, and add to your collection of rare finds.

Use your car to discover new locations, complete tasks, participate in tournaments, and receive daily rewards. Freedom of choice and the path to becoming a true fishing master await you!

title: Fluffy Mania
description: Step into the charming world of Fluffy Mania, where bright, fluffy creatures are ready to test your puzzle-solving skills. This online game combines adorable visuals with clever gameplay, creating a fun and relaxing challenge. Play on desktop or mobile and dive into colorful levels full of lovable characters. Connect matching creatures, score points, and climb through progressively tricky stages.

title: Rescue Hero
description: The hero begins his journey for treasure and save princess, but the puzzles in front of the hunter trapped him. What you need to do is to pull the pins in the right order, so that the hero can take the hidden treasure and save princess away from dragon, wolf and monster safely.

title: Jump to the Mountain for the Brainrots
description:
You'll play as Obby, a character located on a tall mountain.
Various Brainrots will randomly appear on the mountain, guarded by enemies.
Your task is to jump up the mountain and rescue the Brainrots. Collect the entire Brainrot collection without falling into enemy hands!
Sell Brainrots to increase your jump height and reach the very top of the mountain. Rare Brainrot species live at the very top.

title: Poppy Player Puzzle
description: Solve the riddle of this fun game. In each of the many stages of Poopy Player Puzzle, the small player must use his or her wits to direct the doll to the right keys that will release it from captivity.The goal of the game is to rescue the small doll from Poppy's clutches to progress through the levels, you'll need to keep an eye on the things in the labyrinth; pressing certain buttons may speed up the game or remove hazards.

title: Ghostly Graveyard Halloween Special
description:
This Halloween, experience the thrill of Ghostly Graveyard is a spooky platformer adventure where you explore a haunted graveyard and unravel its mysteries. Navigate challenging levels, collect coins, and avoid ghostly encounters. Can you solve the graveyard's secrets?
A Halloween Special Spooky Puzzle Adventure.

title: Bubble Shooter Wild West
description: Saddle up for a Wild West adventure in Bubble Shooter Wild West! Join Sheriff Bonnie as you pop colorful bubbles to defend your frontier town. Travel through dusty deserts, lively saloons, and scenic canyons while enjoying toe-tapping country tunes. Track your progress with detailed stats showing your best, current, and previous scores across Novice, Expert, and Master modes. With its vibrant Western visuals and exciting challenges, this bubble shooter brings cowboy spirit to every pop!

title: Slingshot Chicken
description: Launch your fearless chicken from a slingshot and smash through unstable pig-filled towers in an endlessly fun physics adventure! With infinite levels and constantly evolving challenges, no two runs are ever the same. Perfect your aim, trigger explosive TNT chain reactions, and watch satisfying collapses unfold as you clear every pig before your shots run out. The fun never stops — how far can you go?

title: Miracle Mahjong
description: The panda has a challenge for you. You will face five tests on your way to the top. Attempt to finish all stages and earn the honor of being a Mahjong master.

title: Mr. Mine
description: Mr. Mine is an addictive idle mining clicker arcade game that puts you in charge of building a mining empire from the ground up!
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Brawl Stars Sound
description: Listen to the voices and enjoy the visuals of the Brawl Stars characters. Start your sound-filled brawling adventure and enjoy a unique auditory twist in your gaming routine!

title: Fruit Merge Reloaded
description: Dive into the juicy and colorful world of Fruit Merge Reloaded, a captivating merging game that combines the addictive gameplay of 2048 with the sweetness of your favorite fruits! Your task is to merge identical fruits to create new and exotic varieties, aiming to reach the ultimate fruit fusion.

title: Celebrity E-Girl Vibes
description: Step into the world of edgy street style with Celebrity E-Girl Vibes!  This game lets you dress up celebrities in the bold, trendy looks that define E-Girl fashion. Experiment with colorful hairstyles, graphic eyeliner, oversized hoodies, crop tops, ripped jeans, plaid skirts, chokers, and statement accessories. Pair each look with vibrant makeup and nail polish to complete the vibe.

title: Solitaire Mahjong Farm 2
description: Welcome to "Solitaire Mahjong Farm 2," the sequel with more fun! Featuring Quick Play for random layouts and Chapter Division for structured progression. Complete chapters to unlock new ones, each filled with unique puzzles. A new shuffle mechanism solves tricky tile pairs, enhancing gameplay. Perfect for strategic minds seeking engaging, themed challenges. Join now and continue your Mahjong farm adventure!

title: Dinosaur Rampage
description: When the rampage ends, you’ll compete against other dinosaurs in the same arena and get ranked based on your destruction performance. Unlock many different dinosaur types, collect cool skins in the shop, and prove you’re the ultimate king of chaos. Fast, satisfying, and perfect for stress relief—just stomp, smash, and climb the leaderboard!

title: Fun Mini Games For Kids
description: Welcome to Fun Mini Games For Kids, a casual minigame collection for kids on H5games4u. Are you a game lover? Want to enjoy diverse types of relaxing minigames all in one? Join H5games4u's best kids games. Play doctor simulation games, match shapes in avatar-making games, dress up Brainrot memes, or design room settings.

title: Crazy Tunnel
description: Crazy Tunnel is a fast-paced, first-person arcade game. Navigate through the tunnel at breakneck speeds and aim for the longest distance possible.

title: Treasure Champion - Chest Capture
description: Dive into the exciting world of stickmen in this exciting team game! Your task is to capture the chest in the center of the field and deliver it to the base together with your team, avoiding traps and tricky moves of your opponents. Each successfully delivered chest brings points, and the dynamics of the game keep you in suspense until the last second.

title: Bus Collect
description: The aim of the Bus Collect game is to collect the passengers waiting on the road by making the right directions and deliver them to the finish point. To do this, direct the roads the vehicle will follow with arrow signs. Try to reach high scores by carrying as many passengers as possible to the finish point.

title: Flag Master: World Flags Quiz
description: Flag Master is the ultimate test of your flag knowledge and geography skills! Paint and recreate flags, solve jigsaw puzzles, guess capitals, match neighboring countries, and take on a variety of engaging challenges in a fun, fast-paced experience.

title: Backrooms
description:
Trapped in the eerie maze of the Backrooms, your only goal is to escape or survive, trying.
Play solo or team up with friends in this online multiplayer horror experience. Explore surreal levels, avoid lurking entities, solve puzzles, and use proximity voice chat to stay connected… and stay alive.

title: 2048 Mayhem.io
description: Welcome to 2048 Mayhem.io! Combine the classic 2048 puzzle mechanics with thrilling .io snake survival gameplay. Collect cubes to grow your tail, merge identical numbers, and hunt down smaller players to become the biggest 2048 cube in the arena. Use your dash ability to escape danger or catch your prey. Can you reach 2048 and dominate the leaderboard?

title: People Playground: Ragdoll Battle
description:
Welcome to People Playground: Ragdoll Battle!
Carefully control your character to strike the right spots on your opponent’s body. Attack strategically to destroy and crush your enemies. Earn gold coins to unlock new characters and upgrade your skills.
Have fun and dominate the arena!

title: Ole Bunny
description: Ole Bunny plunges you into a crazy arena where a cute bunny finds himself because of his love for roses ! Now you must show courage and skill to escape the wild bulls and collect as many fragrant roses as possible. Can you become the best bunny matador of all time?

title: Witch Craft Potion Sort
description: Step into the witch’s lair this Halloween night and test your skills in a spooky potion puzzle! Sort the eerie liquids, mix glowing brews, and fill each cauldron with the right color to complete your craft.

title: Save the cats - Bubble shooter
description:
Think strategically, aim, shoot and get rid of all the bubbles.

Explore hundreds of levels with different levels of difficulty.

Be as accurate as possible to free all the cats.

Buy and use boosters on challenging levels.

To win - clear the field of all the balloons.

title: Blockibo: Color Blocks
description:
Blockibo: Color Blocks is a fun and thoughtful puzzle game where every move matters.
Move colorful blocks, unlock gates, overcome obstacles and use boosters to clear the board.

title: Crazy Motorcycle
description:
Drive Nubik along exciting tracks. Jump over gaps, go around obstacles and reach the finish line! Lots of different levels, drive a motorcycle, get there without destruction.

You have to drive a motorcycle with a noob and get to the finish line.
Jump over gaps and go around obstacles at high speed.
Exciting levels are waiting for you!

title: Chicken Math
description: I am Archimedes. I've been trying to solve this difficult problem for a week, and those chickens have stolen my numbers again. Grab the rifle and head to the backyard. Find and retrieve my numbers. Just be careful — I need the correct numbers!

title: My Cat Restaurant
description: Welcome to My Cat Restaurant, a casual kids cooking simulator game that you can play for free. Act as a chef and restaurant manager. Take orders, cook food, serve customers, and collect money. Plan your moves and workload in advance, and figure out an efficient routine.

title: Get a cool gun!
description:
The dynamic gun runner game gives a shooting experience with the creation and evolution of weapons. Combine parts to get new weapon modules.
Shoot obstacles and enemies to unlock an arsenal of powerful weapons. Test your marksmanship by shooting at targets and enemies.
Improve your firepower by creating and combining weapon parts. Follow the evolution of weapons, from simple firearms to advanced weaponry. Become a true master of weapon creation!

title: Sandstorm Covert Ops
description: Welcome to Sandstorm Covert Ops. As the leader of an elite team, your mission is to infiltrate a desert region controlled by a deadly terrorist organization. Navigate harsh terrains, gather crucial intelligence, and execute precise strikes to dismantle the enemy network.

title: Hidden Objects Island
description: Discover the ultimate hidden objects game and embark on a journey through stunning locations, captivating puzzles, and mysterious adventures!

title: Rocket Fest
description: Control the rocket to collect energy or other useful props along the way, and bomb the target at the end! This is a casual stress relief game.

title: Hotel Manager
description:
Have you ever dreamt of being one of the biggest landowners in the world?

Get your (virtual) chance in this extremely addictive game!

Build hotels all over the world, upgrade them and crowd your opponents out of the market, leaving their customers to come to you!

title: Super Stock Stack
description: Super Stock Stack challenges you to sort food cans onto shelves with speed and clever organization! Match the cans by their labels, manage the growing stock, and test your skills as the levels get tougher. Can you become the ultimate stock master?

title: Circle Shooter Master
description: Circle Shooter Master is a cool and exciting game about destroying the boss in the circle. You run in circles, shoot the boss, get materials, build towers, defend roadblocks and grab things that fall on the circle. You have to watch out for the boss’s attack and kill him before he hurts you. Join the game now!

title: Juicy Match
description: Tired of candies? Dive into Juicy Match and explore a world of natural, fresh, and juicy delights! You run the best Juice Bar in town, where you match a variety of fruits, from tropical to classic, to create the perfect juice blends. Your cheerful friend, Tiki will guide you with tips and tricks. Match three or more identical fruits to juice them and complete levels. Create chain reactions for extra bonuses and points. Enjoy a refreshing, juicy adventure with Juicy Match!

title: 1945 Air Force Space Shooter
description: Prepare for nonstop action in 1945 Air Force: Space Shooter! Inspired by the classic shooter era, this game combines vintage visuals with thrilling bulletstorm gameplay that will test your reflexes and precision.Fly through endless waves of enemy aircraft. Avoid storms of bullets and unleash devastating firepower from your Force fighter.

title: Draw to Fish Fight
description: Are you ready? It's time to smack some fish with Skibidi! This fun and crazy game lets you dive into Skibidi's exciting adventure and discover his fish-smacking skills. Smack the fish that come your way and collect points. Avoid obstacles and collect bonuses to power up Skibidi. The more fish you smack, the higher your score! Share your high scores with friends and compete with them.

title: Animerge
description:
Animerge is a cute, fun and cozy casual game where players merge cute adorable animals, starting from the tiniest mouse, all the way to the majestic elephant! 

Combining these animals playing solo or battling with friends, the cozy Lo-Fi music and hand drawn art create the perfect atmosphere for unwinding. 

Merge, strategize, and relax in this fun and laid-back adventure!

title: Mermaids Spot The Differences
description: Dive into an enchanting underwater world with "Mermaids: Spot The Differences"! Explore vibrant ocean scenes teeming with mermaids and sea creatures as you sharpen your observation skills to uncover subtle distinctions. Immerse yourself in the magic of the deep blue and embark on an adventure of keen-eyed discovery!

title: Monster Slayers
description: Monster Slayers is a single‑player mobile roguelike RPG where you must survive endless waves of monsters all by yourself. Every run is a new chance to build the perfect hero, outplay growing hordes, and prove that one warrior can stand against an entire army.

title: Granny 3 Return the School
description: The Granny Series continues with Granny 3: Return to the School. As Granny and Slendrina pursue you, you must discover the ammunition-filled pistol and all the keys to the classrooms of the deserted school. Entering the classroom, you'll find a solitary desk labeled "Granny" and the necessary keys to unlock the closed door.

title: Arrow Escape: Master
description: Solve funny brain puzzles by moving the arrow and finding the correct path. Each level challenges your logic, reflexes, and creativity in a light and addictive way.

title: Tile Farm Story - Matching Game
description: Are you tired of your dull daily routine? Discover the magical world of the remote corners of the Earth where life is in harmony with nature. Help the heroines in the game build parks and nature reserves in the most exotic countries and populate them with the greatest variety of animals. But first, they will have to solve the mystery of the inheritance that the Stone sisters were left by their mysterious Grandpa.

title: Jigsaw Fantasy
description: Jigsaw Fantasy is the perfect game for puzzle lovers! Choose from a wide collection of puzzles, each offering a relaxing and fun experience. Want a personal touch? Upload your family photos and turn them into custom puzzles. Simply drag and drop the scattered pieces into place to complete the image. With intuitive controls and a clean interface, Jigsaw Fantasy is great for kids and adults alike.

title: Bubble Shooter Aura
description:
Bubble Shooter Aura brings a fresh, glowing twist to the classic bubble-shooting experience.
Enter a world of soft colors, smooth animations, and relaxing “aura” effects as you match and pop bubbles to clear levels and reach high scores.

Perfect for both casual players and bubble shooter fans, this game offers intuitive controls, satisfying gameplay, and a modern look that feels calm, fun, and addictive.

title: Fishing Bear
description:
Tap to reel in your fishing line and catch as many fish as you can!
But stay alert—mischievous creatures in the sea will try to get in your way.
And when you pick up a mysterious Treasure Shell… something exciting might happen!
Enjoy a simple and addictive fishing experience!

title: Fireside Solitaire
description:
Fireside Solitaire is a cozy card puzzle that combines logic and relaxation by the warmth of a crackling fire.
Place cards in sequence — one rank higher or lower than the current open card — to clear all columns.
Think ahead: once the draw pile runs out, it can’t be reshuffled, and the game ends.
Enjoy calm music, soft light, and the comforting atmosphere of a winter evening by the fireplace.

title: Lost in the Forest
description:
Lost in the forest is a classic adventure game. The protagonist is an airman who ends up in a storm, loses control of his plane and falls into a mysterious forest.
The next day is stuck under a tree and must find a way to break free and solve various puzzles to make it back home safely.

title: Zombie Arena 2 Fury Road
description:
The player assumes the role of a driver in Zombie Arena 2 Fury Road, whose objective is to navigate a confined arena populated by zombies while using their vehicle as a weapon to overcome waves of the undead and unlock new levels.

Also, there are modes where you have to beat the clock or fend off waves of zombies, respectively, and games where you have to live as long as possible.

title: Tank Battle.io
description:
Players can control the tank to perform various exciting missions and defeat the enemy. Players will have to synthesize a variety of weapons for tanks.
There are many tanks in the game that you can choose according to your preference. While completing the task, you must avoid obstacles at any time, and also constantly resist fire from enemy tanks
Each level mode has a different difficulty that you can choose from.

The higher the level, the higher the stable income received.

title: Turbo Trucks Race
description: Turbo Truck Race, an intense racing game with diverse trucks, unique abilities, and action-packed modes. Experience the adrenaline with realistic graphics, strategic gameplay, and the freedom to explore different landscapes in FreeMap mode. Turbo Truck Race brings a new level of excitement with powerful trucks!

title: Coin Empire
description: Embark on a journey of idle empire building in Coin Empire, where you'll construct your empire with gold, utilizing a slot machine mechanic to earn resources, engage in strategic actions like attacking settlements or looting for crystals, unlock powerful heroes such as Iron Musk or Thor, and progress through ages as you expand your dominion. Build your base, and be the slots coin master!

title: Furry Wedding Proposal
description: Hi, young stylist! You will find a very unusual couple in love - a brutal fox and a feminine bunny - who are preparing for their future wedding. They dream of looking stunning on this holiday and you will become their main assistant in this exciting adventure! You have to dress the characters in beautiful wedding dresses, choose stylish hairstyles for them and apply light makeup. Create, fantasize and create a fairy tale!

title: Daily Solitaire Mahjong Classic
description: Daily Solitaire Mahjong Classic is a relaxing tile-matching puzzle game where you clear the board by pairing identical tiles. Play a new puzzle every day, unlock missed days with ads, and keep your weekly streak for exciting rewards! Track your progress in the Weekly Record, where you can challenge yourself to beat your All-Time Best Score. Enjoy smooth gameplay, balanced difficulty from easy to hard, and use helpful boosters like Hint, Shuffle, and Undo to master every layout.

title: Artillery Vs Tanks
description: In this game, you take control of an artillery unit and engage in combat against enemy tanks. The result of the battle hinges on how precisely you target your shots – will you obliterate all the tanks before they reach you, or will they overpower you? Take out your foes and collect rewards to enhance your howitzer's performance and acquire fresh, more formidable artillery weapons!

title: Build Your Aquarium
description: Build Your Aquarium is a popular Sea World fishing game for players! You run an aquarium with customers with different needs. You need to keep going to the bottom of the sea to fish, collect all kinds of fish, unlock new tanks, expand your operation and your customers will grow! Become the richest aquarium tycoon! Join us now!

title: Real Parkour Simulator
description: Real Parkour Simulator is an addictive 3D parkour adventure game. You play as an ambitious protagonist determined to conquer the world of parkour. Taking you on an exciting journey to new heights as you run, jump and climb in an immersive world. Will you rise to the challenge and become a parkour master?

title: Dragon Escape
description: The cute dinosaur wants to reach the exit by eating Sandwich in the area protected by robots. If you want to help him, try to pass the levels by using laser traps without entering the robots' field of vision.

title: Obby Halloween Danger Skate
description: Obby is skateboarding on the rooftops and performing dangerous tricks. He wants to skateboard on the rooftops during Halloween. Help Obby reach the finish line safely. You must be very careful! Since it's Halloween, the city is flooded with toxic water, and if you fall from the building, you will die. Jump from barrels to containers and climb to the top of the building. Collect all the pumpkins along the way to earn money. Gather all the pumpkins and reach the finish line!

title: Crazy Zoo Monkey
description: Crazy Zoo Monkey is a chaotic sandbox romp where you step into the cage as a mischievous monkey and decide how to handle curious visitors. You grab, throw, eat, or smash whatever’s nearby while humans react in funny, friendly, or aggressive ways.
genre: Basketball, Bike, Car, Casual, Controller, Browser Game

title: Two Dots Remastered
description: Welcome to Two Dots Remastered, a fun and popular HTML5 connecting game enjoyed by gamers of all ages! Two Dot Remastered’s gameplay is straightforward: Match two or more dots in the same color (not diagonal ones) and then blast them! Enjoy playing Two Dots Remastered, the ultimate connecting game for gamers of all ages, and become a master at connecting dots!

title: On Fire Basketball Shots
description: The gym is packed, and the crowd is roaring! The scoreboard's ticking down, and your team is trailing. The only way to win is to sink blazing basketball shots from the court. You're the star player, but the pressure's on—every shot counts, and the hoop's rim is red-hot, making each attempt trickier!

title: Gun War Z1
description:
The world is in danger, a deadly virus affects more and more territories, turning people into zombies.

Clean up locations and save people

title: Tower Stack 2026
description:
​Tap the screen or click the mouse to drop the block. The goal is to stack blocks perfectly and build the highest tower possible. It requires timing and precision.
Stack the blocks as high as you can! Test your precision and timing in this addictive arcade game.

title: Coin Stack Up
description:
Coin Stack Up is a colorful and satisfying puzzle game where strategy meets stacking fun!
Connect and stack coins of the same color to create powerful combinations and clear the board.
To make a valid move, you must connect at least 3 coins of the same color. The bigger the stack, the better the results! Each level comes with specific goals shown at the top of the screen - plan your moves carefully to complete them before you run out of moves.

title: Pet Doctor Business Tycoon-Pet care game
description: Step into the world of animal care with Pet Doctor – Animal Hospital Simulator! Become a kind and skilled veterinarian as you treat adorable pets including cats, dogs, rabbits, and more. Use realistic medical tools to diagnose, clean wounds, check heartbeats, and perform surgeries. Each level brings new challenges where you must care for sick, injured, or pregnant animals in a friendly hospital environment.

title: Brick Game Classic
description: Brick Game Classic is a classic Tetris online game. If you are a fan of classic games, then this game that has been popular for many years is just right for you. When any row or column is filled, it is eliminated. You can change the shape of the cubes before they fall to eliminate them quickly. You can also make them fall faster if you are satisfied with their shape.  Now join the world of fun games.

title: Chicken Wars Merge Guns
description: The lands of the chickens are under attack. They are trying to defend themselves with their guns. Help them! It is a tower defense game in which you merge chickens and create more powerful chickens to defend your lands. The enemy will come over you wave by wave. Make sure they don't break your defense.

title: Bonnie Fitness Frenzy
description: Bonnie decides to get her figure in perfect shape for the summer season. Join the girl in her adventures in the gym, where you will perform a variety of exercises to help her burn off extra calories. After intensive training, Bonnie will start applying makeup. And finally, it's time to dress up! Help us choose fashionable and elegant sports outfits to emphasize the fitness style of our heroine. Join Bonnie on her exciting journey to the perfect figure and style!

title: Glacier Rush
description: Welcome to "Glacier Rush," an exhilarating endless driving game set in the breathtaking icy landscapes of a frozen world. Brace yourself for an adrenaline-fueled adventure as you navigate treacherous snow-covered terrains, speeding through towering glaciers and sweeping icefields.

title: Countryside Driving Quest
description: Immerse yourself in Countryside Driving Quest, a dynamic driving game that lets you explore picturesque rural landscapes with a variety of challenges to master. Navigate through charming country roads, test your parking skills in tight spots, and perfect your drifting on winding paths. Designed with realistic physics and stunning visuals, this game brings the peaceful yet thrilling experience of countryside driving right to your screen.

title: Italian Animals: Create Your Own Brainrot!
description: Create your own crazy Brainrot! Mix bodies, heads, and legs to create absurd Italian creatures, listen to their "passports" and keep your masterpieces as keepsakes. Creative chaos is in your hands!
